body:
| | |

I just wanted to send you a quick note, friend.
I'll be completely honest with you: When I reached out earlier today, I didn't think we were going to hit tonight's $10,000 midnight fundraising goal. **But after thousands of folks across Nevada and the country donated to help, we've made incredible progress – and we're nearly there!**
We just need a few more supporters to chip in and help us raise what we need to defend this seat and our Senate majority.
**_The Cook Political Report_ just DOWNGRADED my race to a "Toss Up," friend,** and the only way for me to fight back and win is with your grassroots support. We're so close to hitting our goal, and I know we can close this gap before midnight. So please, if you can:

**[Will you rush your first donation of $5 now to help us reach our midnight goal, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85164061/473867123/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3811-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY5YjM0NS1hYTE0LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyrsY6nCx9V4Iia_0pn1z0LkDUakFph4e_mh6JPVeo4=)**

Thank you,

Jacky Rosen
|

That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. [**Will you chip in now to win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85164069/473867190/1598999503?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY5YjM0NS1hYTE0LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyrsY6nCx9V4Iia_0pn1z0LkDUakFph4e_mh6JPVeo4=) You can also [**text JACKY to 30508**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85164071/473867204/1077135989?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTY5YjM0NS1hYTE0LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WyrsY6nCx9V4Iia_0pn1z0LkDUakFph4e_mh6JPVeo4=&emci=374db722-2612-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c169b345-aa14-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3800590) to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. subject: Here’s why patriots across the country are endorsing Josh

body:
| | | Peter,

Americans have come through in the thousands to endorse Senator Josh Hawley, and here’s what some of them had to say about why they’re proud to support him:

_**“Josh is a true patriot who never gives in to the woke socialist wackos!”**_

_**“He has strong Christian values and puts his faith first in everything he does.”**_

_**“Senator Hawley stood by President Trump no matter what, even when everyone else in politics wouldn’t!”**_

_**“Josh is tough as nails and nothing scares him!”**_

We couldn’t agree more, Josh Hawley is one of the strongest conservatives in the Senate, and he’ll stop at nothing to protect the conservative values we all cherish.

Our team couldn’t be prouder of all his work, but there’s one problem: **_we noticed your name was missing from our list of endorsements..._**

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: A Death Threat from Beijing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.theusapatriots.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=c7bc438925274aad9adeffa45e5a8497&_t=4W40fwg3DiqMkrCmCXZuDXiPnJHOuze5LcKencV7qWqPdOvq7-FbsQsT38vCZ-jjsEKvTAp0NaOqnXqsurwOHV75cm1tcay9lFHf-rCG8Sg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.theusapatriots.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=c7bc438925274aad9adeffa45e5a8497&_t=4W40fwg3DiqMkrCmCXZuDXiPnJHOuze5LcKencV7qWqPdOvq7-FbsQsT38vCZ-jjsEKvTAp0NaOqnXqsurwOHV75cm1tcay9lFHf-rCG8Sg%3D)

---

Fellow American,

[](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7bc438925274aad9adeffa45e5a8497&_e=BQwzD_634PoO3v0C8wMCVfQ2TY59rphb5h-vemgGSVyKiWwU9ODHcxKeRpGUspEXh3hi6NpCctWHPlFSeq6qeFcDRVis32crwMWFI6ymgOgMYXBIQklBJB-QNbjGbir5x5XxQM2y0VvDthsmdTUlqPvmyP1sdWzZpt4SZRpiBz8q2uarS-EgmhuM0gm8YZdegyH1EbbfXfVQQBmKhSPtUmhTRs-WkEgY8UgXa9rMTS03B6_FYI_wdTf3kuRqyV00Zes5FpfcK38g3zyi12YrK54KeCoMfjoVpii7TkJ9GnOx8io6Xb000zsV4ZXixrnajEVP8HkdENlILRLZ8TPCb47oNiBpKl0isAKjPVFyZYUT73NENF6wdsJh0j0Dr_mbvRPhyx_p22uzBBDrIQsQvSixVYuxZJLcP625YkT6LgQ%3D) Yes. I received a death threat from Beijing because I love Liberty, Freedom, and the United States of America. More on that in a minute.

Right now, I want to introduce myself.

_My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I fled Communist China and escaped the evil Communist indoctrination. I'm running for Congress because I fear the country I love is becoming like the country I left._

You see: I was born to illiterate working-class parents in China's western Sichuan province just before Mao's Cultural Revolution. I grew up in extremely poor living conditions with food rationing, social chaos, and indoctrination into Communism.

At a young age, I learned a hard lesson about surviving in a Communist regime: conform and keep your thoughts private. Do not trust anyone, even your friends.

Everything changed when an American exchange student showed me a pocket-sized version of "The Declaration of Independence." Even with my limited English skills, I could understand most of these words: "We hold these truths to be self–evident...." It's like a lightbulb came on. I had never heard such beautiful words before, and I loved them so much that I spent many hours with my American friend to learn more about these new concepts and America.

_**I had a new dream: I wanted to go to America.**_

In 1988, I made it to America with only $100 in my pocket, which I borrowed, along with a $1,200 loan from my sponsor. I spoke very little English. In the 33 years since I have enjoyed living in this great country. I received a graduate degree, got married, raised three children, started my own business, and was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in 1995.

Fast forward to today: I've spoken out against Communism and Socialism appearing on Fox News, Tucker Carlson Tonight, Fox Business, Newsmax, Timcast, Huckabee TV, John Stossel, Joe Pags Show, Gothix TV, Shawn Ryan Show, Epoch Times TV, and Glenn Beck Radio.

I've authored opinion articles for The Epoch Times, Town Hall, National Review, Union Leader, Concord Monitor, and Granite Grok.

_And here's where the death threats from Beijing started: when I decided to run for Congress._

The Democrats don't want my story to reach the ears of my fellow Americans because they hope to enact their Socialist Agenda.

But more importantly, you and I cannot afford to let the woke liberal elite plunge the America we know and love any further down the dark path of Communism and trample on our God-given rights.

**[Please, will you stand with me and make a special donation of $25, $50, or $100 to stand with me?](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7bc438925274aad9adeffa45e5a8497&_e=BQwzD_634PoO3v0C8wMCVfQ2TY59rphb5h-vemgGSVyKiWwU9ODHcxKeRpGUspEXh3hi6NpCctWHPlFSeq6qeFcDRVis32crwMWFI6ymgOgMYXBIQklBJB-QNbjGbir5x5XxQM2y0VvDthsmdTUlqPvmyP1sdWzZpt4SZRpiBz8q2uarS-EgmhuM0gm8YZdegyH1EbbfXfVQQBmKhSPtUmhTRs-WkEgY8UgXa9rMTS03B6_FYI_wdTf3kuRqyV00Zes5FpfcK38g3zyi12YrK1Y4bykLdqQxQmU8-Ztt5fala7gEfyhnj9PS67CW-FRLZhUAG9QczhMmT-Zuifx_qOXQv6slQ0M5X6y4x6-B987e7t3glSdDOIsylwlYKPfCc9k4hcVoxTFHqS9PSqLo4BocOlhPPya04CapNrJbojc%3D)**

_Believe me. I'm not fear-mongering when I say you cannot imagine the horrors of Socialism and Communism. It is evil._

**[That's why I need you to stand with me and preserve the freedoms and values of our American heritage.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7bc438925274aad9adeffa45e5a8497&_e=BQwzD_634PoO3v0C8wMCVfQ2TY59rphb5h-vemgGSVyKiWwU9ODHcxKeRpGUspEXh3hi6NpCctWHPlFSeq6qeFcDRVis32crwMWFI6ymgOgMYXBIQklBJB-QNbjGbir5x5XxQM2y0VvDthsmdTUlqPvmyP1sdWzZpt4SZRpiBz8q2uarS-EgmhuM0gm8YZdegyH1EbbfXfVQQBmKhSPtUmhTRs-WkEgY8UgXa9rMTS03B6_FYI_wdTf3kuRqyV00Zes5FpfcK38g3zyi12YrK0wkbI7zucpNq6t_vGMk5Geov13q-MwiYnWEvKUn_4rfE-BvKnZRw0COv30PG1QvCAUQAwpiYXpY_qGpxxtzbUp3hMi8ZDs2J7mNRMHLgpiteIndlfKydWnWQTyaK3DmFDOSBV8ckk5u7-9JzOrKEJY%3D)**

For freedom,
Lily Tang Williams

**[P.S. Even if all you can afford is $5 — I will use every penny wisely in my campaign to defeat my liberal opponent who has been a rubber stamp for Biden's America-Last agenda. We can win this together.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7bc438925274aad9adeffa45e5a8497&_e=BQwzD_634PoO3v0C8wMCVfQ2TY59rphb5h-vemgGSVyKiWwU9ODHcxKeRpGUspEXh3hi6NpCctWHPlFSeq6qeFcDRVis32crwMWFI6ymgOgMYXBIQklBJB-QNbjGbir5x5XxQM2y0VvDthsmdTUlqPvmyP1sdWzZpt4SZRpiBz8q2uarS-EgmhuM0gm8YZdegyH1EbbfXfVQQBmKhSPtUmhTRs-WkEgY8UgXa9rMTS03B6_FYI_wdTf3kuRqyV00Zes5FpfcK38g3zyi12YrK-fXhwkG2FkhTOS6efQg51nub25nQ_472mq1-CbbzIXMx0ajhiifL8a4thCnTGnRHqpjROet309PKfIVorkok93IynMAkR8EecCfbb9FP-KxCBigxqYJXp6McC1KF82tUy0-ojHIb9zdy2m8yIpsR5w%3D)**

| _I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress.

_It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children_._
---

Even with my limited English skills, I could understand most of these words: "We hold these truths to be self–evident...." It's like a lightbulb came on. I had never heard such beautiful words before, and I loved them so much that I spent many hours with my American friend to learn more about these new concepts and America. I had a new dream: I wanted to go to America. In 1988, I made it to America with only $100 in my pocket, which I borrowed, along with a $1,200 loan from my sponsor. I spoke very little English. In the 33 years since I have enjoyed living in this great country. I received a graduate degree, got married, raised three children, started my own business, and was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in 1995. Fast forward to today: I've spoken out against Communism and Socialism appearing on Fox News, Tucker Carlson Tonight, Fox Business, Newsmax, Timcast, Huckabee TV, John Stossel, Joe Pags Show, Gothix TV, Shawn Ryan Show, Epoch Times TV, and Glenn Beck Radio. I've authored opinion articles for The Epoch Times, Town Hall, National Review, Union Leader, Concord Monitor, and Granite Grok. And here's where the death threats from Beijing started: when I decided to run for Congress. The Democrats don't want my story to reach the ears of my fellow Americans because they hope to enact their Socialist Agenda. But more importantly, you and I cannot afford to let the woke liberal elite plunge the America we know and love any further down the dark path of Communism and trample on our God-given rights. Believe me. I'm not fear-mongering when I say you cannot imagine the horrors of Socialism and Communism. It is evil. For freedom, Lily Tang Williams | I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress. It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children. | Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee Lily4Congress Committee PO Box 406 Weare, NH 03281 Copyright (C) 2024 Lily4Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: “Strap on a Glock”
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
This kind of talk has no place — not in politics, and certainly not in the U.S. Senate.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21414%2E4449941%2Ei1xGOK)
---
Friend, Kari Lake can’t stop.

For all the talk about moderation, she is one of the most dangerous, most extreme politicians in the entire country.

She called for political violence after Trump’s first indictment.

And last month, she told her supporters to “strap on a Glock” as part of their efforts to take back Arizona’s Senate seat.

“Strap on a Glock” are her exact words, friend.

This kind of talk has no place — not in politics, and certainly not in the U.S. Senate.

We only have one way to stop Kari Lake, and that’s at the ballot box.

And that’s why we’re humbly asking you to chip in to Ruben Gallego’s campaign. name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Your last chance to order or sponsor a Lucas Kunce yard sign for $20!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Help us put Lucas Kunce’s name in front of voters all across Missouri.
#
Peter — **we’re reaching out to let you know this is the LAST weekend to order or sponsor a Lucas Kunce yard sign for just $20.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49594?refcode=em20240517-5540&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK)
Getting Lucas’ name and message in front of as many voters as possible is critical if we want to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat — and yard signs are a great way you can help us spread the word and show your support.
Just last week, over 500 signs were claimed by households in Missouri, and over 180 signs were sponsored by generous donors from all over the country. **Can you help this grassroots effort reach 1,000?**
If we blanket the state with these yard signs, it’ll be a massive proof point for the strength of our grassroots movement — and we’re just getting started. But we need your help to make sure we cover every single county in the state.
**[Please make a donation of $20 or more today and we’ll send a Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate yard sign straight to your door.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49594?refcode=em20240517-5540&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK)** (Once you’re done, we’ll send an email asking for your address to make sure we send it to the right place.)
**[CLAIM YOUR YARD SIGN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49594?refcode=em20240517-5540&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK)**
**[Or, if you’d like to sponsor a yard sign, we’ll send it to a Missouri voter who’s ready to defeat Josh Hawley. Please chip in $20 or more to make it happen!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49594?refcode=em20240517-5540&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK)**
**[SPONSOR A YARD SIGN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49594?refcode=em20240517-5540&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK)**
The yard sign order form will close at midnight on Tuesday, May 21st. After it closes, yard signs will be available on the website at a slightly higher cost.
This is our shot to elect Lucas, take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, and finally put real working people in charge of our country. And shows of support like this from people just like you are exactly how we’re going to make it happen.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Team Lucas Kunce
If you live in Missouri and would like to display a yard sign but are unable to make a donation at this time, **[please submit your name here.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20240506-ys?t=6&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=5540%2E614464%2EIR4_SK). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Failed MAGA Prophecies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
their messaging is basic psychology, but it works in a nefarious way.
---
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=logo)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# Failed MAGA Prophecies
---
Look, Ever wonder how the MAGA crowd constantly gets conned into believing the next "big lie" from Trump and the GOP? _It's basic psychology_ , **but it works in a nefarious way**.
|
## 1.) The burden of proof constantly shifts
---
Example: Trump began his 2020 Big Lie trend by stating that if he lost, it would be "because of fraud." He primed his base to already believe that the system was set up "against him." Recall that at the same time in this country, in some areas, his supporters were chanting "stop the count" while others were calling for "**count every vote** " and recounts So when Trump lost, it was because there were too many "fraudulent votes" and the system was somehow rigged not to count the other votes.
|
## 2.) Evidence to the contrary
---
The evidence against Trump is somehow spun into a "gotcha." The documents case is a good example of this as it was originally stated he "had no documents," then it devolved into his "ability" to declassify whatever he wanted. The GOP has also blamed the FBI and claimed that the documents were "planted." The obviously broken law was the **possession of the documents** , but the MAGA GOP is now framing it as a casual mishap, some classic "_whataboutism_ ," AND a plot against Trump. **The fact that we now know he had the documents is the "proof" that it was a "targeted attack" on Trump (or a "raid," as they've described it.)**
|
## 3.) Blissful Ignorance
---
Finally, their more infuriating tactic is that of simply denying and ignoring the truth. Stating "fake news" when prompted with facts or refuting any evidence with clearly biased "proof" from sites like Fox News and Breitbart. It can feel like numbers and raw data don't matter to them because they aren't accepting them as "real." **The same applies to Trump's crimes; when polled, even recently, his base has claimed he didn't do anything wrong.** The burning question is: which members of the MAGA GOP are aware of the charade that their side is operating? How many of them are fully aware of the lies that they are selling for political gain and retaining power? [**These people are making our laws. They are selling nothing more than a grift while clutching power close to their hearts. We can fight back, but we need your help. Chip in today and help us reach rural voters far and wide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=lnk)
| [ CHIP IN & FIGHT BACK!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=other)
---
| | | No Dem Left Behind
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | |

Adam might not say it, but I will.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85164584/473879124/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk1NzBjMS1hZDE0LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCL1F3Gr4wjPl_Cuc_HjkkogDeVPwkSaWXPKSgFwU7E=&emci=b0da03db-a414-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=859570c1-ad14-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
When my husband Adam Frisch ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, we were the underdogs until the very end.
Adam did not receive any national support. We were heavily out-raised and out-spent by Boebert and her Washington allies.
Ultimately, though, Adam lost to Lauren Boebert in a recount by just 546 votes – the closest race in the entire country.
The worst part is that it wasn’t because we didn’t work hard. Our family, our team, and our volunteers gave it everything we had. We just ran out of money.
In the final weeks of the race, we had to cut back. Right as Boebert was increasing her advertising – right as we _knew_ we were on her heels – we had to pull TV ads, cancel digital buys, and make a lot of hard budget decisions.
Adam might not say it, but I will: If we had had additional resources and been able to fully fund his campaign until the end, Adam would probably be in Congress right now – and Lauren Boebert would be a footnote in a history book.
It’s part of why Adam announced so early that he was running again. We need to make sure that we have the money to build a campaign that can sustain all the way through to November 5, 2024.
But with Lauren Boebert having run off scared, this race is now going to be a lot harder. The Super PACs are already attacking Adam, and he’s not taking any money from corporate PACs. If he is going to win this critical House seat, Adam needs grassroots donors like you to chip in right now:
[**This was the closest race in the country in 2022. It could be even closer in 2024. Please, will you give $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign – any amount you can afford will go a long way – and make sure we have the resources to win this critical House seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85164586/473879129/1610638071?refcode=em20240517pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=859570c1-ad14-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTk1NzBjMS1hZDE0LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCL1F3Gr4wjPl_Cuc_HjkkogDeVPwkSaWXPKSgFwU7E=)

name: Christa Kinsley
subject: Mario for Congress: The time to Get Out The Vote starts now!
body:
Dear Friends and Supporters of Mario,

What a busy spring season it has been! Hopefully you are following Mario on one of his social media platforms to see the many opportunities we have had to meet with voters throughout the district. District 24 covers all or part of New York's 14 counties, and it has been a privilege for Mario to get to know the families, businesses and communities he will hopefully soon be representing in D.C.

It's hard to believe we have less than 6 weeks until the June 25th Primary Election Day! And even less than that with early voting starting soon.

We need your help to get the word out to others in the district about Mario's race and to be sure they get out to vote!
Would you be willing to help us?

We are gearing up to mobilize our ground team for the final weeks ahead. We could use help with things like making phone calls to voters in the district, putting up yard signs, attending events, or handing out cards to friends, neighbors & businesses.

Whether you have a little or a lot of time to offer, every little bit brings us one vote closer to victory!

Please reply with your availability and interest if you are willing to be part of our volunteer ground efforts.

We have many challenges facing us in our nation today, but tackling those challenges here in NY-24 starts with having the right person in office - someone who will stand without compromise for our Faith, Family & Freedom. And that's exactly what Mario intends to do.

Thank you again for your support. Be sure to follow us on Facebook or X at Mario for Congress to find activities and updates throughout the district.

Best regards,
Christa Kinsley
Field Director
Phone or text 315-399-7313

[cid:f43b3e56-8739-4cc5-92a4-718d6f2089d7]

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley + Harrison Butker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| This is actually crazy, folks.

You probably already heard about that out-of-touch speech from Chiefs kicker Harrison Butker. You might not have heard that Josh Halwey is already defending it: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68322?t=6&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz) | [DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68322?t=7&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
---
It’s not surprising, exactly.

**We already knew Hawley was a leader in the fight to criminalize reproductive rights in our country.** After all, his corrupt family business led the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade AND the effort to ban the abortion pill mifepristone all the way up to the Supreme Court. Hawley himself even pioneered the legal arguments that led to shutdowns of IVF clinics in Alabama earlier this year.

His obsession with “manhood” and “masculinity” have been pretty obvious too. Just take the weird book he published last year, _“Manhood: The Masculine Virtues America Needs”_ — his attempt to convince all of America’s men that they should be made in his own creepy image.

But now, Hawley’s standing by Butker’s attack on working women.
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68322?t=8&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68322?t=9&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
---
This guy wants to control every little thing about our lives — what we do in the workplace, in the bedroom, and in the doctor’s office. He even wants to be in charge of what we do with our own bodies.

**It’s weird. It’s creepy. And it’s sure as hell not his job.**

I’m running to replace him in the U.S. Senate because I believe everyday people should have the power to make decisions about their own lives without some control-obsessed politician or elite getting in the way. That’s a message that resonates with Missourians of all parties, all across the state.

But if we’re going to reach every Missouri voter about our people-powered campaign between now and November 5, I need your help.

[**So please, will you split a donation of $10 or whatever feels right to you today between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project so we can get this message in front of voters, defeat Hawley, and take back power for working people this year?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68322?t=10&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68323?t=11&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68324?t=12&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68325?t=13&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68326?t=14&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68322?t=15&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
Hawley thinks he can get away with attacking women, workers, and anyone else he thinks poses a threat to his corrupt status quo.

This year, we’re holding him accountable.

Thanks for all your help,

Lucas
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=14615%2E878179%2Ejawqmz)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: making sure you didn’t miss this
body:
IMPORTANT info inside...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I sent one of my most important emails this year to you yesterday, and I'm writing to you today to make sure it didn’t get buried in your inbox.

You see, the Republican National Convention is just around the corner where we will witness GOP Convention Delegates craft and finalize the Republican Party’s new platform – the first since _Roe v. Wade’s_ reversal.

**And Pro-Life Friend, if you and I want the Republican Party to stand strongly for Life in 2024, we have to take action NOW.**

That’s why I’ve decided to launch _GOP for Life_ and lead the fight for a pro-life America at the Republican National Convention!

In doing so, I’m following in the footsteps of my mentor, Phyllis Schlafly, who fought long and hard to ensure the Republican Party stood strong for Life, beginning in the 1970s.

It’s also why I’ve included a special link for you to **[please sign your STAND4LIFE! Petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-y/).**

You’ll see this petition strongly urges the Republican National Committeeman and Committeewoman from your state, _along with all the other Convention Delegates,_ to take action like:

● NOT WEAKENING THE GOP PLATFORM ON LIFE _(which is being discussed in the back rooms in D.C. right now);_ and
● Publicly supporting including the passage of a federal _Life at Conception Act_ to abolish abortion nationwide in the GOP Platform.
**[So, will you stand with me and fight for Life by signing your STAND4LIFE! Petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-j/)?**

I’ve included my email I sent to you yesterday below so you can read more about our plans for GOP for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

_— Begin Forwarded Message —_

Dear Pro-Life Friend,

There’s a massive battle raging within the Republican Party right now.

_Will the GOP stand strong for Life?_

_Or will the Republican Party** _run away from the abortion issue**_ – and only seek to save a few percent of the hundreds of thousands of preborn babies who are killed by abortion every year?_

What if I told you that we’ll both find out this July – specifically the 15th through the 18th?

Those are the dates of the upcoming Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, where GOP convention delegates will craft and finalize its new platform – the first since _Roe v. Wade’s_ reversal.

And this platform will lay the foundation for the Republican Party at least for the next four years.

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-i/) **Pro-Life Friend, if you and I want the Republican Party to stand strongly for Life, we have to take action – NOW.**

That’s why I’ve decided to follow in the footsteps of my political mentor – Phyllis Schlafly – to launch GOP for Life.

**No, I’m not stepping away from _Students for Life!**_

But I am preparing to lead the fight for Life at the Republican National Convention!

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to please sign your STAND4LIFE! Petition right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-d/).**

As you’ll see, these petitions simply insist that your state’s Republican National Committeeman and Committeewoman – and all the other Convention delegates from your state:

• DO NOT WEAKEN THE GOP PLATFORM ON LIFE;

• Publicly support including passage of a federal _Life at Conception Act_ to abolish abortion nationwide in the GOP Platform.
My goal is to make sure that every Convention delegate understands that REFUSING to **_STAND4LIFE_** could cost them big this November.

Sadly, I’m already growing worried that could happen.

If November turns out to be as close as many polls suggest, _turnout is going to be key_.

_And I’ve heard from a number of pro-lifers who are disappointed that all President Trump and some other Republicans are saying abortion isn’t a federal issue OR saying they will only consider a 15-week _Abortion Prevention Law_._

Some tell us we’re supposed to be excited that 6% of preborn babies could be saved under legislation like this.

But the truth is, it won’t even be that many.

And even those backing these bills know that.

_Do they really expect abortionists to abide by the honor system – and not kill a preborn baby that’s a day, week, month, or few months “over the line?”_

They know better, Pro-Life Friend.

We just need politicians with the GUTS to stand up and say . . .

. . . abortion is wrong . . .

. . . it’s killing an innocent human being . . .

. . . and it should be abolished!

Now, THAT would get people fired up!

**But if the Republican Party won’t say it, who will?**

The good news is, RNC Convention Delegates aren't slick politicians who’ve had D.C. consultants in their ears for years.

They’re people just like you and me who are committed to changing America for the better – including standing for Life.

_But there are going to be snakes who try to water-down the platform in hopes they can ensure there will be**NO** pro-life party in America anymore_.

They will try to convince other delegates to take a bite of the apple . . .

And sometimes slick words trick good people.

That’s why I’m going to fight this.

And I’m asking you to stand with me by signing your **[STAND4LIFE! Petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-h/).**

**[And, if at all possible, please agree to your most generous contribution of $1,000, $500, or $250 to help me gather as many of these petitions as I possibly can](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-k/)!**

**[Or, if that’s too much, could you agree to $100, $50, or $25](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-u/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, states are busy selecting their Republican National Convention Delegates now.

So, now is when we need to take action – not when Convention Delegates are sealed off from the rest of America!

**[Please sign your STAND4LIFE! Petition today, and agree to your most generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 TODAY](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-o/)!**

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

P.S. – At the upcoming Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, GOP Delegates will craft and finalize its new platform – the first since _Roe v. Wade’s_ reversal.

What happens here will go a long way to deciding whether or not America has ANY pro-life political party anymore.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to please sign your STAND4LIFE! Petition right away and agree to your most generous contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or $25 TODAY](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-gbjklk-duchtdja-b/)!**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-gbjklk-026154D2-duchtdja-n) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-gbjklk-duchtdja-p/)
**

**
---

Those are the dates of the upcoming Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, where GOP convention delegates will craft and finalize its new platform – the first since Roe v. Wade’s reversal. And this platform will lay the foundation for the Republican Party at least for the next four years. Pro-Life Friend, if you and I want the Republican Party to stand strongly for Life, we have to take action – NOW. That’s why I’ve decided to follow in the footsteps of my political mentor – Phyllis Schlafly – to launch GOP for Life. No, I’m not stepping away from Students for Life! But I am preparing to lead the fight for Life at the Republican National Convention! . As you’ll see, these petitions simply insist that your state’s Republican National Committeeman and Committeewoman – and all the other Convention delegates from your state: • DO NOT WEAKEN THE GOP PLATFORM ON LIFE; • Publicly support including passage of a federal Life at Conception Act to abolish abortion nationwide in the GOP Platform. My goal is to make sure that every Convention delegate understands that REFUSING to STAND4LIFE could cost them big this November. Sadly, I’m already growing worried that could happen. If November turns out to be as close as many polls suggest, turnout is going to be key. And I’ve heard from a number of pro-lifers who are disappointed that all President Trump and some other Republicans are saying abortion isn’t a federal issue OR saying they will only consider a 15-week Abortion Prevention Law. Some tell us we’re supposed to be excited that 6% of preborn babies could be saved under legislation like this. But the truth is, it won’t even be that many. And even those backing these bills know that. Do they really expect abortionists to abide by the honor system – and not kill a preborn baby that’s a day, week, month, or few months “over the line?” They know better, Pro-Life Friend. We just need politicians with the GUTS to stand up and say . . . . . . abortion is wrong . . . . . . it’s killing an innocent human being . . . . . . and it should be abolished! Now, THAT would get people fired up! But if the Republican Party won’t say it, who will? The good news is, RNC Convention Delegates aren't slick politicians who’ve had D.C. consultants in their ears for years. They’re people just like you and me who are committed to changing America for the better – including standing for Life. But there are going to be snakes who try to water-down the platform in hopes they can ensure there will beNO pro-life party in America anymore. They will try to convince other delegates to take a bite of the apple . . . And sometimes slick words trick good people. That’s why I’m going to fight this. And I’m asking you to stand with me by signing your . ! ? Pro-Life Friend, states are busy selecting their Republican National Convention Delegates now. So, now is when we need to take action – not when Convention Delegates are sealed off from the rest of America! ! For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life Action P.S. – At the upcoming Republican National Convention in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, GOP Delegates will craft and finalize its new platform – the first since Roe v. Wade’s reversal. What happens here will go a long way to deciding whether or not America has ANY pro-life political party anymore. ! Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization. |

I'll keep this one short, Peter.

With the filing deadline behind us, we are laser-focused on what we need to power this campaign to this finish line. I'm talking about the volunteers we will need to knock on doors, the campaign literature we will print to spread our message, and the ads we'll run as this election draws closer. Election day will be here before we know it. **That's why I'm reaching out today.**

I'm proud to run a people-powered campaign — one that relies on friends like you chipping in $5, $10, or more to ensure WA-08 remains blue. We don't have special interest billionaires to fall back on, so getting the resources we need can only happen with your continued support. And right now, we're short on the funds we need to win.

**[We need to raise $2,784 to close the gap before tonight's midnight deadline. You would not believe how expensive this campaign is going to be! I could really use your support to keep us on track. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Illegal Aliens Vote – in DC!
body: Biden Spending More Tax Dollars on Illegal Aliens [INSIDE JW] New Documents Reveal DC Training for Noncitizen Voting [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32401&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS8wNmZ2eWxOS3gzUT9zaT1YUlRLVE5UZnpYTUpSOTlBJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=0c9917ac029195c3fe05d52b6aa8c106062963d8b17e00333ce9e598832f9cfc] If you think concerns about illegal aliens becoming voters are overblown, look no further than your nation’s capital. We received [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32402&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RjLW5vbmNpdGl6ZW4tdm90aW5nLXRyYWluaW5nLTIwMjQvXTEzLXBhZ2VzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=ecd6d73cb4b60d04ae8521180e2efe4f2fe8c4519852865da51f424dc95af0f9 [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32369&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RjLW5vbmNpdGl6ZW4tdm90aW5nLXRyYWluaW5nLTIwMjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cc5ed37698b01c6a4e2209decd9b2c11a2842d26c02fda05a642fdaca47ef9e8] of records from the District of Columbia explaining to illegal aliens and other noncitizens how they can register to vote in local elections. The records came in response to an April 12, 2024, FOIA request for: * Materials presented and/or provided at the training; * Communications advertising/promoting the training; and * Materials provided to participants/attendees after the training. On April 10, 2024, DC held a training [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32403&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kY2JvZS5vcmcvRXZlbnRzL05vbi1DaXRpemVuLVZvdGluZy1FZHVjYXRpb24tVmlydHVhbC1UcmFpbmluZ11ldmVudD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e8a2df3880b88b05b44b7e174c725668174d613fe5cc91ae4b05defb0dc6a999 [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32370&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kY2JvZS5vcmcvRXZlbnRzL05vbi1DaXRpemVuLVZvdGluZy1FZHVjYXRpb24tVmlydHVhbC1UcmFpbmluZz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c1db1628586a07610139e7002a09c303e990e4c2c2624571068c9ec27b32e663] titled ”Non-Citizen Voting Education Virtual Training” in which DC announced noncitizen voting would begin in 2024. A PowerPoint presentation explains: > Non-US citizen residents of the District of Columbia can vote in > local elections under the Local Resident Voting Rights Amendment Act > of 2022. Non-US citizen residents can vote in District elections for > the offices of Mayor, Attorney General, Chairman or member(s) of the > DC Council, member(s) of the State [sic] Board of Education, or > Advisory Neighborhood Commissioner(s) Non-US citizen residents > cannot vote for Federal Offices > > To register to vote in the District of Columbia as a non-citizen, > you must: Be at least 17 years old and 18 years old by the next > General Election; Maintain residency in the District of Columbia for > at least 30 days prior to the election in which you intend to vote; > Not claim voting residence or the right to vote in any state, > territory, or country; Not been found by a court to be legally > incompetent to vote. *** > You must provide proof of your address in the District of Columbia > at an Early Vote Center prior to Election Day or at the polling > place assigned to your address on Election Day. In 2023 the DC Council [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32404&F=T&&hash=ad2e1105006536fd82051ea08cd05f38a5d5787cc418704dd83bf1007809100b [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32371&F=T&&hash=86374e81d81120abddd33126d48eb2060a0d88883e042ce59946664f4063eb59.] the District of Columbia Election Code of 1955 to expand the definition of the term qualified elector to include otherwise eligible noncitizen residents, including illegal aliens. According to [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32405&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzE4LzYxMV1mZWRlcmFsP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=fea83983d166d7eeeabc74583dc7ad8d14ae1ee9d2dbba9d6a1d8dd2b1094618 law [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32373&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF3LmNvcm5lbGwuZWR1L3VzY29kZS90ZXh0LzE4LzYxMT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=31eec0bb5e9b8055a6ce0a93408e3354c6495d922a2870c1c219df1c0f75727a], only U.S. citizens can vote in federal elections, but a growing number of state and local elections [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32406&F=T&&hash=5de9a3a6ec51bd03236f95504525684f79681ee6071e1eb73d3bf53ecc9f8623 [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32374&F=T&&hash=a39ef267a172d101389b87bb8a86ef9db68b4b8fc553726257690de433fcff5e] noncitizens to vote, among them San Francisco and Oakland, California, along with some cities in Maryland and Vermont. In February, a state appeals court ruled a similar New York City law violates the state constitution. DC’s law [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kY2lzdC5jb20vc3RvcnkvMjMvMDEvMTIvY29uZ3Jlc3Npb25hbC1nb3Atd2FudC1vdmVydHVybi1kYy1iaWxsLWFsbG93aW5nLW5vbi1jaXRpemVucy12b3RlL113ZW50P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=44542b4e824477d8dd10b280b8c821046448ebde2a05c07a1ed249b3f0ad6166 [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68347&L=32372&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kY2lzdC5jb20vc3RvcnkvMjMvMDEvMTIvY29uZ3Jlc3Npb25hbC1nb3Atd2FudC1vdmVydHVybi1kYy1iaWxsLWFsbG93aW5nLW5vbi1jaXRpemVucy12b3RlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a458f94242dfc91b24711beed1074a8f1587d1e48fffd2e853193f0adc81a386] a step further than those jurisdictions, though, by extending the franchise to undocumented immigrants. clean_body: Biden Spending More Tax Dollars on Illegal Aliens [INSIDE JW] New Documents Reveal DC Training for Noncitizen Voting [] If you think concerns about illegal aliens becoming voters are overblown, look no further than your nation’s capital. We received [ [] of records from the District of Columbia explaining to illegal aliens and other noncitizens how they can register to vote in local elections. The records came in response to an April 12, 2024, FOIA request for: Materials presented and/or provided at the training; Communications advertising/promoting the training; and Materials provided to participants/attendees after the training. On April 10, 2024, DC held a training [ [] titled ”Non-Citizen Voting Education Virtual Training” in which DC announced noncitizen voting would begin in 2024. A PowerPoint presentation explains: Non-US citizen residents of the District of Columbia can vote in local elections under the Local Resident Voting Rights Amendment Act of 2022. Non-US citizen residents can vote in District elections for the offices of Mayor, Attorney General, Chairman or member(s) of the DC Council, member(s) of the State [sic] Board of Education, or Advisory Neighborhood Commissioner(s) Non-US citizen residents cannot vote for Federal Offices To register to vote in the District of Columbia as a non-citizen, you must: Be at least 17 years old and 18 years old by the next General Election; Maintain residency in the District of Columbia for at least 30 days prior to the election in which you intend to vote; Not claim voting residence or the right to vote in any state, territory, or country; Not been found by a court to be legally incompetent to vote. * You must provide proof of your address in the District of Columbia at an Early Vote Center prior to Election Day or at the polling place assigned to your address on Election Day. In 2023 the DC Council [ [.] the District of Columbia Election Code of 1955 to expand the definition of the term qualified elector to include otherwise eligible noncitizen residents, including illegal aliens. According to [ law [], only U.S. citizens can vote in federal elections, but a growing number of state and local elections [ [] noncitizens to vote, among them San Francisco and Oakland, California, along with some cities in Maryland and Vermont. In February, a state appeals court ruled a similar New York City law violates the state constitution. DC’s law [ [] a step further than those jurisdictions, though, by extending the franchise to undocumented immigrants. The District’s action was [ [] by congressional Republicans. but they failed to overturn the measure. Illegal aliens and noncitizens should not vote in any elections. That Congress allows the votes of citizens to be legally stolen by illegal aliens in our nation’s capital is inexcusable. HHS RULES CERTAIN ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS ELIGIBLE FOR OBAMACARE Our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [] on the Biden administration latest back-door amnesty for yet another category of illegal aliens: Illegal immigrants protected by a controversial Obama amnesty program for adults who came to the U.S. as children are eligible to receive government-subsidized health insurance under a new Biden administration rule that will cost American taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars annually. The Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) recently amended its regulations to extend the publicly funded perk to migrants who have benefited from Obama’s Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals [] (DACA), a measure enacted by the former president by executive order after Congress repeatedly rejected legislation offering illegal aliens similar protections. The failed bill was called Development Relief and Education for Alien Minors (DREAM Act) and those shielded by Obama’s order are often referred to as Dreamers. So-called Dreamers specifically do not qualify for government-subsidized insurance under Obama’s disastrous healthcare overhaul, officially called the Affordable Care Act (ACA) but better known as Obamacare. The 2010 measure requires individuals to be citizens or lawfully present in the United States to enroll in a qualified health plan through the Obamacare exchange. ACA also requires enrollees to be lawfully present in the U.S. to be eligible for insurance affordability programs such as cost sharing reductions and advance payments of the premium tax credit. A few years after Obamacare passed, HHS issued regulations that explicitly exclude recipients of the former president’s DACA from being categorized as lawfully present in the country for the purpose of subsidized health insurance under ACA. The agency explained that allowing Dreamers to participate in the government’s insurance affordability programs was not consistent with the relief that the special amnesty initiative afforded, a reference to temporary protection from deportation. Now HHS has done an about face, issuing a rule [] [ makes DACA recipients eligible to enroll in a qualified health plan through an Obamacare exchange or a state basic health program. “Specifically, Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) recipients and certain other noncitizens will be included in the definitions of “lawfully present” that are used to determine eligibility to enroll in a QHP through an Exchange, for Advance Payments of the Premium Tax Credit (APTC) and Cost-Sharing Reductions (CSRs), or for a BHP,” the new rule states. It will take effect on November 1 and HHS estimates that it will cost American taxpayers about $305 million annually. The agency explains in the new 145-page rule that after “further review and consideration, it is clear that the DACA policy is intended to provide recipients with a degree of stability and assurance that would allow them to obtain education and lawful employment, including because recipients remain lower priorities for removal.” Therefore, the document says, “extending eligibility to these individuals is consistent with those goals.” More than half a million illegal immigrants are currently protected under DACA, according to government figures [], and over 800,000 under the age of 31 have been shielded from deportation and allowed to obtain work permits and drivers licenses since the measure was enacted. A big chunk of DACA applicants have arrest records [], according to U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS), the Homeland Security agency that administers the nation’s lawful immigration system. Nearly 110,000 illegal aliens who requested the special Obama-era amnesty for adults who came to the U.S. as children have criminal histories for offenses that include assault, battery, rape, murder and driving under the influence. Tens of thousands of DACA recipients have multiple arrests and hundreds have more than 10 arrests, according to USCIS. A few years ago, migrants protected under DACA were among rioters and looters arrested [] and criminally charged with crimes during a Black Lives Matter “Justice for George Floyd” protest in downtown Phoenix, Arizona. Among them was 30-year-old Mexican national Maxima Guerrero, a community organizer with a Phoenix-based grassroots migrant justice organization called Puente Movement. During the riots, Guerrero and her fellow DACA friends occupied a vehicle “loaded with incendiary devices,” according to a high-level Phoenix Police source. Now, thanks to the Biden administration, lawbreakers like Guerrero and her friends can get their health insurance subsidized by Uncle Sam. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2024, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

body:

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Why I’m going to war against Scholastic books. Shocking photos.
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.

|
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0brj6hl0qgd4mt03q2rc8a5srjgocj6h7o7iijg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children’s schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here’s what we’re up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from “Welcome to St. Hell,” a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We’ve censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ekthnmc8j34frk6lhqq06sh7dm8dkftdrjed4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkndd7btnfv2d99nos3q3p6vpis6rimc68fsepmg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)
Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here’s how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9nkaso3qjfp4hcts7qi8coosq5f2gebtekc0t2o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs) [Donate](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsrrqo0ijet29o2otilq3niu8gvqj9h7roql5om8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)
SkyTree was inspired by my first children’s book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here’s the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it’s working!

**SkyTree Book Fairs already has 800+ requests from schools! They are swamped with requests for book fairs that only provide age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. **

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs for the next semester. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. [Donate $10 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk6g34dl2pimua353gmtj2t7ofnd4c3j3pq9lig0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

[Donate $35 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z70aoj71f83uohvf7ni2m5u0162t3cn5itmajqhg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

[Donate $50 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsq41sklpttvl9t9du28k1o1h5o9dh4llgml6rp8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

[Donate $100 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjcf5af118khlenhds8da78ls18u5l4fvd5p4qr8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

[Donate $250 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvn26lq1hs4m0ag2efvqvpnkrrkqbn2a177ma2no_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

[Donate $500 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3kvd1cju8dg62jrb1g4qgnkslkg38nk54khia88_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbpdcd6lg89qitkh9dlaof55gjmv0g7oabt6rtig_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4p9nhmbso8kh59ban5eb2ddm9m2daoqo2ooav5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)
Let’s bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It’s not complicated! It’s what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic’s monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I’ve partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrabvdtqdgo76dcc1q9erdvn0v67df93d8l50t9o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

A reminder of what we’re up against:
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi6ru3l633d5jtnc1r9k2hhd0p5hghra47lb43m0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)
It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfacl0oq6fb83ikv9203m7dk1ve70qsr7ot0aoio_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h62or1cph2bs)

name: Kash Patel
subject: URGENT: J6 committee hid the truth
body:
The false Jan. 6 “insurrection” narrative is the greatest con job ever

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm036s032nsddd94j4gvklgho0au1uuq58urjs5g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1h66ob5clh2bs)
Friend,

The false Jan. 6 “insurrection” narrative is the greatest con job ever to happen in American politics, it's right up there with Russia Collusion.

Now, we’re finding out that former Congresswoman Liz Cheney, the main architect of this disinformation campaign, and her band of miscreants suppressed evidence that completely exonerates the Jan. 6 defendants from their ginned-up charge of insurrection.

**The Federalist’s Mollie Hemmingway has exposed the J6 committee for excluding Secret Service Agent Tony Ornato’s testimony from the evidentiary record.**

Ornato testified two years ago about the events before Jan. 6. He was assigned to the White House to coordinate presidential protection as deputy chief of staff. As a Secret Service officer with a distinguished decades-long apolitical career, it was impossible for the J6 committee to undermine his testimony, so they worm-holed it.

_**So, instead, they hid it.**_

Now that we’ve uncovered the truth, we must do everything possible to expose this message and make sure the Deep State does not rig the 2024 elections.

body:
Are you sitting down?

Friend,

I don't mean to alarm you, but I recently read this very troubling headline:

name: Morton
subject: Leftists hold pornographic books and propaganda sacred
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | Friend, When you get sworn in to office, you typically place your hand on a Bible. But nowadays, leftist school board members don't put much faith in the Bible. What do they hold sacred? **_Pornography_****.** I'm serious. Recently in Fairfax County, Virginia, close to my own backyard, one school board member sworn into office chose to place his hand on a stack of pornographic material. This isn't some extreme, isolated incident. A school board president in Central Bucks County, Pennsylvania, took her oath on a book called "Flamer." It features naked teenage boys engaged in all manner of lewd acts. _How sickening._ It's a sorry situation. But I'm glad to tell you -- there's much hope for the future. That hope comes from conservatives like you -- and the impact you can make through the **Leadership Institute.** Pornographic books and propaganda that leftists hold so sacred are exactly what parents want removed from public school libraries. Can you imagine -- smut as a grade-schooler's required reading? When parents try to read aloud from these books at school board meetings, they're blocked. The passages are too obscene. Yet, those same school board members have no problem exposing young children to such filth! Leftists say conservatives want to "ban books." That's a deceptive lie. In fact, we don't want schools to distribute such material to children. Yet, I can think of a few books leftists would "ban" from schools. _Starting with the Bible they refuse to place a hand on. _ And how about books by Donald Trump? Or Ben Shapiro? Or books critical of the left's transgender agenda? I'm sure those are hard to come by in public school libraries! **The leftists who dominate America 's public schools have lost all touch with reality, decency, and common sense. ** They indoctrinate students to hate America, hate each other, even hate their own bodies. They fill kids' heads with Critical Race Theory, transgender insanity, and obscenities. _All in the name of "diversity" and "tolerance."_ And because they have massive sums of teachers union money and wealthy campaign backers, these radical leftists enjoy an iron grip on our schools. **But right now, the Leadership Institute teaches a growing army of conservatives how to combat the unhinged left and take back America 's schools.** Parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens see what's happening at their local schools. And they don't like it. So they push back. They run for school board. _And they win._ Your support helps these brave patriots every step of the way. Now is the time to stand tall, build momentum, and get more fired-up Americans to join this effort. Let's save more kids from the left's indoctrination machine! [**Your gift today will help shape the future generation****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTM5LTRkZjYwMDNlMjAzYjQzYjI5MmNhZWE0MGRkOWNmMGFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvM2hncGNjcmdscj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1GRk80OTQxNSJ9/zNIwze5u5bkxyhkUITCZPA) Will they learn why the flag has 50 stars and 13 stripes? Or will they learn 50 different pronouns? With your gift, you'll help train more conservative activists, candidates, campaigners, and school board members and teach them what it takes to restore sanity to classrooms. And you'll do it just in time to make the maximum difference on all the school board elections held this year. [**So please, respond right away and build on this momentum to save our kids and grandkids****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTM5LTRkZjYwMDNlMjAzYjQzYjI5MmNhZWE0MGRkOWNmMGFmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvM2hncGNjcmdscj9zb3VyY2VfY29kZT1GRk80OTQxNSJ9/ppcd4zRbtlafMLLnUsumzw)** ** Thank you so much, Friend. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_zRD8NAVIvWkR4-WRaGIeg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_zRD8NAVIvWkR4-WRaGIeg~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_zRD8NAVIvWkR4-WRaGIeg~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: SmartAsset
subject: Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
body:
Ready to kickstart your retirement?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmp3hmb2jrs61kiot3lj465hri0054p2loro8j5o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs)
---
|
## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zea5uslabrof2t43aetdgad952ca61brmlfdppng_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr61e7mu2q6sqvboil5bjhqbdiea4cingk1iiag0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zemf9q50apdjlbh87khdiqhege51h0hqdm80qgu8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8h0b8mdjs4dbkfn3gn7s8579ks4a8e7kbll9t88_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjmurgjmikkks4kieg0lms3h5dc584au2dkofkdo_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area, each
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrubg5nqc63jk1vn81438vsgbn277jijugajh1e8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
|
---
| | | Unless otherwise indicated, information is as of 5/4/2023. SmartAsset has no obligation to update any content in this article. This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqn1ee43iatlgu2vm1bmadf3irlc47kjvscu7i8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdbfcucm3ghgjvm73gs8chtuib0uq4tqd2nn0888_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1j64pr1c9h2bs).

Ornato testified two years ago about the events before Jan. 6. He was assigned to the White House to coordinate presidential protection as deputy chief of staff. As a Secret Service officer with a distinguished decades-long apolitical career, it was impossible for the J6 committee to undermine his testimony, so they worm-holed it. So, instead, they hid it. Now that we’ve uncovered the truth, we must do everything possible to expose this message and make sure the Deep State does not rig the 2024 elections. For the crime of repeatedly speaking against Cheney’s narrative, I have been labeled as “not credible” by corporate media and the J6 committee. I say bring it on. I’m just warming up. I’m stepping up my efforts to challenge the two-tiered justice system in this country by offering legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots, like some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the J6 committee. Because of your support, we’ve distributed over $500,000 in grants to whistleblowers, veterans, and others. ~~ You can show your support for our mission by clicking any button below. ~ ~ ~ ~ ~~ Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. To the corporate media that was forced off the search for the TRUTH, and to those who were intimidated into silence, you failed us. America is now very aware of the vast public disinformation campaigns that are carried out by Deep State operatives, along with the marauding application of a two-tier system of justice, in and out of the courtroom. I am personally calling on all patriots to help me expose the J6 committee and hold the Deep State accountable in 2024. The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

body:
Masters champion Scottie Scheffler was arrested Friday morning on his way to the second round of the PGA Championship, booked on four charges, including second-degree assault of a police officer after his vehicle dragged an officer to the ground.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
