# SATURDAY, MAY 18, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1980, [Mount St. Helens](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u8yAUQJ8Gtlhc_kwGhkifvOVbq07WNVzHVDikNjHK21fp3PUc6Ujn4zpeMeV0v_3HlXydy4ihpoNGcwJ3knrUPPqZSJLi5KEHK5TR1vDFI8iz6QHjbAnUFMM0xYBoUDmpBRievBRSCwNOOOOk7RyEswgwBxsAnY1MC4qplq37KuleF5rzqxy0daGsPPul1sfO1IXJgcmhtda9yrM-J3r7N8EaFqaGg6l_l8-M9lul3Ta--fhoKee0255pcVsx5d9k_XPwJwAA__-chFGM), a volcanic peak in southwestern Washington, became the largest and most destructive volcanic eruption in U.S. history. The massive eruption killed 57 people and devastated some 210 square miles of wilderness. Today's poll asks: Have you ever tried a food you didn't like just to say you've tried it? It was discovered that the strangest food eaten at _The Flyover_ office was the [durian fruit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS0WnDEmA0MXb-na0bpw5_gqjC1CY_Xtq3bu_uuXvo_bfEPJUh7vuHFsyz5javLiebjYcAE3O01xYQbuNUc7Wm_6wflBr5GCHZPtF4JA5o4YfIDkRkt0BU5w1xLBgDODDSYMAXwXbLqaZJfkk8XgSTnDJG2v3ecupa285O_9xbVL-6ZzXFs7nqp_UzApmM7z7O5VGpYiCX8TBdORsTQFE31VwaJrpOOUnOXpR-XMY0PJf7P2L-0nAAD__8nGUC4). The unlucky staff member couldn't tell us how the fruit tasted because he only remembered the smell. Take the poll below and tell us what food you tried just to say you did it. Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu8yAQAOCngS0WHHDGA8MvRZ5-d-1oIXzY12ITOTRV376qOjb7N32v0zxFLnysL3Gn0HKdY2r8oNldtL-Ana1cQiYCMpKC7jUq4yw6uYWMmQbCrKIn1zvletR9BAOOhmwGlBxAgVVOe-WdB-y8ToNKOidMOnpchFW0cKtn91b5aBvl8lUfdHap7rKErbXbXZh_AkYB418iYJziyuk_H-8_xowkzHW5fXIpfMdeWLXukcuvxY-2C3O1Sp7huZHtacB3AAAA___cT1r8). We're sponsored this weekend by [Gutoptim.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u8jAUxvGrsTei4-PPDB7Q-yoTVOrUMXLsY3BrMAouEXdf0bnz85Me_T-O8zGUWq6nt3Ah33ObQ-zlQbPeCbdDNSuefCZCkpy8sMKA1MpofvZglzhmUloDYh7VoqyzYrEAsAQtDC8eARVo4cBph2ZwIo4QRY4miuBMYgoold7W4bOVaz9Trs_2oHWI7cKrP_d-uzO5ZzgxnLZtG8JSEfr69QIMJzy8_5Ov7eDcpMaXk9O9fa-R5pKY_J_r80pboiTcMTxR7fnq020rtZa7sUzB6RJK_b3rf8b_BAAA__94mFfn) Check out their products below.
|
---
## Scheffler Arrested at PGA Championship
Masters champion Scottie Scheffler was arrested Friday morning on his way to the second round of the PGA Championship, booked on four charges, including second-degree assault of a police officer after his vehicle dragged an officer to the ground. [See arrest video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAURL8Gd6wAA7YLitfQ7WtTWgQu6xthsMzNrvbvI6dON6ORRkfn477eAxasj_9hB0e5rSESPmE1XM5c6VUPyWUABeMATk7SitFoa4bN6RGShbTkZYxiSnZJizKTDjKYTxGDGdApobQwchazmZW9zTIuIsocbZRhtolpAQmpnbevhpU2yOXdnnDeYtuH4jaio7PxH1OeKV_fR-t0TUz565gpLwxTXk5M-X60k_oVYiNC4D1ukHOBk3eAyrHyLdQUv3PuV6nw4k9M0HjLPAEFrDtUYsoPp0vHC0vBbiemxWMPWH6J6E8_PwEAAP__2r5mxw). Scheffler's arrest was the result of the golfer trying to navigate traffic caused by an early morning[ fatal accident](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQBb_GdEbYZ3ymoEhDd2lTosWsYRODkb0Hyt9Hd3Xq96QZzddjfABF2pdP2LDnkEbwTCeOrVROajOaau4DosZbhb26K9vcWmPbau1xgi7YyQB0ONkJULUBjFKhM8ah0xX1utGmaZVrXOu0rZ3yXeNV8NYrcHYWpsGZOOX6O9HOK4b4m07MtU9bFfuV-Sji9iH0IPRwXVftp1KOlLm8HkIPS4pB6GHHqwg9vGjyWED6FbaD0l5WOiSnZ95hw53llfIPZkkz7kyBcJZQZACGKD1kCd6_J3mSZ9pkenKhGeUJcYUYQeihyv18XBQjFXsXplk2oPjW5X_j_QUAAP__b2t0kA) involving a shuttle bus and a tournament worker just outside the Valhalla golf course. The world's [No. 1 golfer allegedly](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6jAQAL8m6YLWztpxChevoeO1V0bLek32ZHCUWCD-_sTVV46mGGm-LsuFtOjj9p_uEluuC3HTpyxuMGGwuGCfYhaxMvYSzWQ8jA6969fo0jRPkIMxApgYczLO28kJjDCZEXqNFiyCMwGCC9afguEZ2GT2bCj41CFI0lb303fVR1sll3d9yn7ieu9LXFvbjm7819lzZ8-0PeR1fNQH9qZcpLPng1fJucg-bDcatlqUZcjUqGh7D4TWXHO6jugzQBKeHc-OgK6Agmnu95i2l5aih586hNudtPzm258zfgIAAP__9dhe6A) drove past a police officer at the scene and ignored instructions. The officer screamed at him to stop and then grabbed onto the car until Scheffler stopped about 10 yards later. Scheffler would later[ issue an apology](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUgOGnwRsWYCBkYLgLW-7a0aJwsE-EDQIUK29fpXPnb_n1fz3Wh8eM5_bfH2BHKqsPA1-wKsoNFXKVU7QJQMAygeU3rtmipFbTbtW38IxLdZcpRslTAJPuCwRQfjGLhwmtYEIyxQ0zygg9Gx7uLPAUdODe6Egkg4ijtPlZ8Bw7pPwuL2hzKMeU7T5G7WT5R4Qjwl3XNUOv5weJcFvJiQjXR2lvItxKhMNIhJOM6xtj6mOhjIFAe9ghpQyNBt9ip1rTunkadn9ULGffsdKnx0xHwzo1G-uFOWPXNyLZdnjMv0Hjzz0_AQAA__-3o2Z4), saying he thought he was following police instructions and his actions weren't intentional.
## Severe Weather Hammers Houston
Powerful storms tore through the Houston area Thursday, producing high winds, tornadoes, power outages, and killing at least four people. [See footage of the storm here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8GNiIggMnA0MVbuna0LnCOr8ImwhdH_fuq7drtSW940vu4TlegStv9HVZMPLcJMtOBk1cmKusmJ0uaES2eJSYzmKDP3gUvl-QuJdyiN4Dzzfk86BhMAXQmDiHYGCQlq63T3kQdfbThFE2-6GzmHLKBGIpwGgtx66fPRhsvONevdmA_5bbKmhbmxy7Ob8KOwo4vBF7-nLDjzq2v-w_ggR2FHQ8q2IQdufUNSlMZnveFVdvU_uwHUq2wZVQZVuwgeyqPF9VKexiE0_cVqP5m-d8J3wEAAP__8gNfHw). Hurricane-force winds and hail toppled trees and smashed windows, leaving streets littered with glass, electrical lines, and other debris. Rain, nearly seven inches in some areas, triggered flooding. [See the damage here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUxfGnwZstuHwYDwxdvKVrR4vAJabCEAGN27ev3LnbkX7Dkf4ft-1mY4r58W4PND2UzboeX7jJkekRxCYGbwIiIB_QsJkpyqVQctiN5XO4y9mrwCUsEoQWfL6rEDSfFwViiAYoCCqZplpqUJNmbqGOBaccs1p5Iij62EudPkvMfceQfsoL6-TKMSSz9_5shL8RWAms53lO-e4ynu1yAus1L0Dbd6wE1r18tV7y2PHbtrH1Uo82envYB47VZcskqEUN1fjnGVOKTc1E0MdhY_q77P8G-A0AAP__DipcfQ). By Friday, the storms had left [nearly 800,000 residents](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu6yAUgOGnMRsWHDCGgeEu2XLXjhaGQ0xLTGSfhubtq3bu_ku_vrfrcg2llv32P9zRU25LiFSeuExcWg560Sz5jAioGHo5SyPUpM3ENj8jrGmFrGR2aFCl1UbnAJTLap2zY8WDAC0maYWdLJjRyuhElDmaKIM1adACU6F2jO-t7LRhrq_2xGOM7c6q34ge56D-DXAZ4NJ7H3fsZ0f8-AkGuGzt86S2c8KvcHJqxx5S4x0DbXhwaim8uHRCzlazw6dHL7WW08yDFrd7KPX3Q3-qvwMAAP__GoxZ5A) and businesses without power, forcing school closures and flight cancellations at Houston's two major airports.
## Best Markets for Homebuyers
A new report by Zillow, an online real-estate marketplace, indicated Florida and Texas home markets are the best for buyers, while Buffalo, the Bay Area, and the Northeast rank among the best areas for sellers. Zillow examined the 50 largest U.S. metro areas and analyzed where homes were selling the fastest, where price cuts are happening the most, where housing inventory is growing the most, and where home values are climbing. clean_body: Masters champion Scottie Scheffler was arrested Friday morning on his way to the second round of the PGA Championship, booked on four charges, including second-degree assault of a police officer after his vehicle dragged an officer to the ground. | | | | | | SATURDAY, MAY 18, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this date in 1980, , a volcanic peak in southwestern Washington, became the largest and most destructive volcanic eruption in U.S. history. The massive eruption killed 57 people and devastated some 210 square miles of wilderness. Today's poll asks: Have you ever tried a food you didn't like just to say you've tried it? It was discovered that the strangest food eaten at The Flyover office was the . The unlucky staff member couldn't tell us how the fruit tasted because he only remembered the smell. Take the poll below and tell us what food you tried just to say you did it. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . We're sponsored this weekend by Check out their products below. | Scheffler Arrested at PGA Championship Masters champion Scottie Scheffler was arrested Friday morning on his way to the second round of the PGA Championship, booked on four charges, including second-degree assault of a police officer after his vehicle dragged an officer to the ground. . Scheffler's arrest was the result of the golfer trying to navigate traffic caused by an early morning involving a shuttle bus and a tournament worker just outside the Valhalla golf course. The world's drove past a police officer at the scene and ignored instructions. The officer screamed at him to stop and then grabbed onto the car until Scheffler stopped about 10 yards later. Scheffler would later, saying he thought he was following police instructions and his actions weren't intentional. Severe Weather Hammers Houston Powerful storms tore through the Houston area Thursday, producing high winds, tornadoes, power outages, and killing at least four people. . Hurricane-force winds and hail toppled trees and smashed windows, leaving streets littered with glass, electrical lines, and other debris. Rain, nearly seven inches in some areas, triggered flooding. . By Friday, the storms had left and businesses without power, forcing school closures and flight cancellations at Houston's two major airports. Best Markets for Homebuyers A new report by Zillow, an online real-estate marketplace, indicated Florida and Texas home markets are the best for buyers, while Buffalo, the Bay Area, and the Northeast rank among the best areas for sellers. . Zillow examined the 50 largest U.S. metro areas and analyzed where homes were selling the fastest, where price cuts are happening the most, where housing inventory is growing the most, and where home values are climbing. The Texas market has been boosted by in cities like Austin and San Antonio, while in Florida more homes are hitting the market in metros like Tampa, Orlando, and Jacksonville. Homeowners in Buffalo, the Bay Area, and the Northeast are in areas with limited inventory, meaning homes sell quickly, have fewer price cuts, and less options for homebuyers. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Why I’m going to war against Scholastic books. Shocking photos.
body:
Here's what we're up against.

|
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eff5997056ca42b296307a119347dc4d&_e=k_z7K08qdTrq9yHyAa7KUjqVdUGe_yIBER_wFYqPexos3vEOAs2r4wjEiHYSDCQgLdO_vIJ0jHqoLFJKLf_DnVXCYd3bqw233GA58M8Pu8nqmarSgE8SGF3XEteVwMpSf3PbAjWC1-JzvPHXOEI7nV6z33eFEP2WxrktK9c1mR51-WCGJU2BognpwvEKpkEE96FtZtN8GU7HUGqH_5PtWSc44R1ojR9n3I85ToMugZYGoqD6AmphgmSbwZ0-8wSs3KixB8lnUWQg-doGahEGlO3_s7w08e9i9nEUHfqtNvXuQOJSXyjTZIyt2QeUDYeH30DgVE_e5c2DHuZ4Ze0JwIXfBWuDGDs7Orz_BMnUg3Q%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=987445bc608c40d69ddb4e9f564b38c0&_e=yVWQZN3H2XTkbMndkQMkTDuHTjc22KyW8Oddx4xdwfpyVnj4PswmsyWtYg_-p_faHlmvufnUke0DzKRLIvEwTYCZ215QWiryfKOKejmbtGVCLpWmYWMZYx1G2UkFHii0KwIHPVyLJXnntfSpZsfPwagQrhC69_mDFgsejfarRvBPKDOctxngl1KJxm8Ym28zBdz77g6qk4uMrKhDpd981j97dqL3ROQCcrL1qAs2GjQqjHoiZnAcnQD6V83PtAYNBLa9b50L7t8Da0sJmtoU7RDJC8apNC09Y3XQfML_eqr5oRj57SuJsCoVAWoHNQlaDMEILc9on9OOqDy9I8irF4NGHzMUHYUZpvKedRnVRv9J5VRVJUhaeFj5wKxnBkk1_ZtNE18ngs8kTjIOQ6ciqA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=987445bc608c40d69ddb4e9f564b38c0&_e=yVWQZN3H2XTkbMndkQMkTDuHTjc22KyW8Oddx4xdwfpyVnj4PswmsyWtYg_-p_faHlmvufnUke0DzKRLIvEwTYCZ215QWiryfKOKejmbtGVCLpWmYWMZYx1G2UkFHii0KwIHPVyLJXnntfSpZsfPwagQrhC69_mDFgsejfarRvBPKDOctxngl1KJxm8Ym28zBdz77g6qk4uMrKhDpd981j97dqL3ROQCcrL1qAs2GjQqjHoiZnAcnQD6V83PtAYNOK1vFBMb0ODJerOtCn_etOtDp_ARVRWwHRDok4q0fuIsETn02HUOPkIa-NenHaxOahH_Kfi59O9Cb-9WBfZk9oR6dMWow1y1x0erqIMwd-JNyLu6E2xod1fbMmok5QTHN7JEkGn7pF_ZsvXzYjWi8w%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

body:

## Fidelity vs. Vanguard vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqf4suomkqt319sgg49m6jaa70sq97n4dkpp4dn0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm0o71c5h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")

| _Get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7o0ueqoumesbbasec40p4g8sj4sgk3oqrdeft0g_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm0o71c5h2bs)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj2qs3maiuqh0ksfkplghrooc6nmqp2bmg6lem0o_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm0o71c5h2bs)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlsl7uftiss76aim8tknulbghfjutoi3tkibjpp0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm0o71c5h2bs) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvcf4nnoa09gbamqcc2qrr1j77otrpk9vlp03bb8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm0o71c5h2bs)

This article may potentially include a firm or firms that have a business relationship with SmartAsset, in which SmartAsset is compensated for lead referrals or cost per engagement. SmartAsset is not a client of the aforementioned firms. SmartAsset did not receive compensation for including any of the firms in the aforementioned article. body:
The Virginia Budget Passed. What you need to know.
| | | |
VIRGINIA GENERAL ASSEMBLY SPECIAL SESSION
BUDGET DEAL PASSED MONDAY
WHAT YOU SHOULD KNOW

---
|
---
| | [MY INTERVIEW ON 1140 WRVA](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rvv1nAOx63SvLvmffIoY-dugNkpCNi8-i3XukaM7vcrijMuA6_yrjFu43rqNWFDRUvLdQhRVSyCKdFn0t8mNjNZoDL_Nz2oLxwkk2tPR7_9CIZZqrmRzXSVfVymLM1tBSfAH6OsNY_6iZJQ2jCnX_EZ07z7lPiC_ZJktLM6W3p1y8WoIKXMRug==&c=4WOwDGkSx1lrZo2xxKxNXADRMSvGJ7ECJ6MsoUJemGAjWnSy7HN0NA==&ch=_3hmXrlR49Yz93Jy_NnxGzSZLThhUF5-yPYF5oMgQtRZOaM3TiJ9oQ==)
---
---
|
# RADIO INTERVIEW ON
# THURSDAY, MAY 16 at 7:05AM
---
| Friends, Here's my interview from Thursday with 1140 WRVA's award winning radio host John Reid. We discuss the biennial budget that was just passed by the Virginia General Assembly on Monday, along with a brief comment on being vindicated in 2 court cases on Monday.
If I had a vote on Virginia's budget on Monday, I would have voted "no." Why?
Way too much spending.
Why isn't anyone talking about how much spending the General Assembly has voted to increase the budget year after year to the tune of a whopping $20 billion over the past 4 years? That's a 20% increase. It's a 234% increase since FY2010. Wow.
While I understand the challenges of inflation, especially under Biden, it's time to ask legislators why they keep voting for budgets with out of control spending.
Just take a look at Virginia's operating expenses alone which for perspective were almost $38 billion in FY2010. They increased to $67 billion in FY2021 and now the budget that was approved on Monday at $87.5 billion in FY2025 and $89 billion in FY2026.
Virginia's exploding budget: FY 2010 $38 billion FY 2021 $67 billion FY 2025 $87.5 billion FY 2026 $89 billion
Are you kidding me?
It's time to re-evaluate and re-prioritize all of the spending of our taxpayer dollars and look at ways to trim programs that aren't constitutionally mandated and are a waste of taxpayer dollars.
The Virginia General Assembly passed a $188 billion two year FY2025-2026 budget, which will go into effect July 1, 2024. That's $87 billion in FY2025 and $89 billion in FY2026, almost a $20 billion or 20% increase in 4 years.
The House vote was 94-6 with "no" votes from conservatives Freitas, Garrett, Griffin, Oates, Scott, P.A., and Zehr. The Senate vote was 39-1, with McGuire casting the only true conservative "no" vote in the Senate.
A huge kudos and thank you to the unsung heroes who voted "no" on this bloated budget full of increased spending.
That said, we had to have a budget so our state wouldn't face a shutdown, which would have taken place on July 1, 2024. Yes, I hear you. There are agencies in the state government that I would like to see shut down as well, but there are also core functions of government that we must fund or it will effect public safety.
The reality is that the legislature is controlled by Democrats who like to spend and love governmental subsidized programs and subsidies. So Governor Youngkin and Republicans had to compromise. The governor didn't get the tax cuts he so strongly advocated for but thankfully there were also no new tax increases.
So here's the good news. The proposal to increase the state's sales tax to cover digital purchases like streaming subscriptions, music downloads and software was struck from the budget.
Democrats didn't get priorities like legalizing retail sales of marijuana for recreational use and raising the state's minimum wage to $15 per hour by 2026.
The best news is that the budget won't be linked to RGGI. This program requires electricity producers to purchase allowances for the carbon they emit, and some money raised from those purchases is returned to Virginia and used for flood resiliency and energy efficiency efforts. RGGI is a backdoor tax on Virginians because it allows companies to recoup the costs through customers' energy bills.
There's much controversy over the operation of skill games in Virginia. While many small businesses and convenience stores say they desperately need these profits to stay afloat, many like myself are concerned about families and the addiction that entraps so many low income at risk families who are desperate to escape poverty, only to find they lose more money than they gain, further leaving the most vulnerable even more destitute. For reasons that I don't understand, this issue alone is a very heated debate and hot topic that has reached new heights in the General Assembly. Go figure. I don't get it.
The budget scrapped nearly $94 million in skill game revenue anticipated for fiscal year 2025 and ticked off many convienience store owners. The legislature will probably meet again before the year is out to address how to handle skill games in Virginia.
Of all of the issues facing Virginians I can't figure out for the life of me why this single issue seems to have become one of the hottest issues that is before the General Assembly.
The House and Senate both went into recess after acting on the budget, rather than adjourn. So they are not still not finished for the year, despite passing a budget. Why? So they can further debate and discuss how to handle skill games in Virginia. I can personally think of many higher priority issues, but it does appear the General Assembly will return to rehash skill games.
I personally don't believe it's worth bringing legislators back to Richmond for the sole purpose of addressing skill games in Virginia. In my humble opinion, it can wait until the 2025 legislative session in January.
By going into recess instead of adjourning for the year, the legislature can call itself back into session to discuss potentially giving all localities the option of raising the sales tax on themselves to pay for school construction. Another reason, the General Assembly should not meet again until January. More taxes on Virginians could be passed.
It concerns me that even some Republicans are interested in raising taxes locally to cover school construction. If a locality is struggling, then taxing the people in that area will only make matters worse. Instead cut some of these well intended commemorative programs and celebrations and let's find money in the budget to help these struggling schools.
---
|
---
The budget compromise includes raises of 3% each year for teachers, state employees and state-supported local employees.
We're facing a major teacher shortage in Virginia, so I support doing anything to attract and retain good teachers. That said, where is the money in education going? Is it in fact going to teachers?
It increases state funding of K-12 schools by more than $2 billion and provides more than $200 million to make higher education more affordable by curbing tuition increases.
The approved budget boosts spending for Medicaid and rates paid to personal care attendants and expands services for Virginians with behavioral health disabilities.
The deal provides almost $145 million for the Washington transit system, $100 million in toll relief for drivers in Hampton Roads and, contingent on additional revenue, $175 million for improvements to Interstate 81 in western Virginia.
Why not get rid of the tolls in Hampton Roads? No wonder the people of Hampton need relief. You can't travel 10 miles before you have to pay a toll in Hampton. Does it surprise you that the city of Hampton is controlled by Democrats who voted in favor of the tolls? Sounds like a mismanagement issue to me. Maybe a call to Senators Louis Lucas and Maime Locke would be a good start. To support toll roads and then ask for relief is backwards to say the least.
Finally, the legislature elected eight judges, including three from [Hanover County, David Caddell Jr. ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rvv1nAOx63SvLvmffIoY-dugNkpCNi8-i3XukaM7vcrijMuA6_yrjOfwizbq7m-1M8vsm-VcZFwRO732VPptxmOviYx7WnbilUHrfWh4ba81WXv-cQ7GfahR0kDYlD1nlo-9qShAQB-n0qjVfCaieYQO11IDOvwXlL5VUUbYlp5bIl4aWg8IOQ==&c=4WOwDGkSx1lrZo2xxKxNXADRMSvGJ7ECJ6MsoUJemGAjWnSy7HN0NA==&ch=_3hmXrlR49Yz93Jy_NnxGzSZLThhUF5-yPYF5oMgQtRZOaM3TiJ9oQ==)and [Robert Reibach](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rvv1nAOx63SvLvmffIoY-dugNkpCNi8-i3XukaM7vcrijMuA6_yrjOfwizbq7m-1rDct2TxwXxtj2J8_ZvHZF4Cc-wf2VvFS7kpSblA1VRdxz_5dy79CnqzkN1agCogwPhTX56x3CSjqhMkijCs1rpO82BP7uxCdJvu-mz5KTCVYtio21q1zHw==&c=4WOwDGkSx1lrZo2xxKxNXADRMSvGJ7ECJ6MsoUJemGAjWnSy7HN0NA==&ch=_3hmXrlR49Yz93Jy_NnxGzSZLThhUF5-yPYF5oMgQtRZOaM3TiJ9oQ==), for eight year terms on the circuit court for the 15th Judicial District; and Lisa Sewell, for a six-year term on the juvenile and domestic relations court for the 15th District.
While I appreciate a budget passed before a shutdown, we need to continually ask the question, how much did spending increase from last year and why?
###
Please consider following me on [Facebook at Amanda Chase Virginia Senator](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rvv1nAOx63SvLvmffIoY-dugNkpCNi8-i3XukaM7vcrijMuA6_yrjEJsVmnMeHrjaYRTapTpFwYkp65tVHUT6Jz-O6HF1ooSeW1tjgKzDy78AceYv8KRe8TYfoswqS8UM4JSdYB5aVr3HWtWnp7hgL_7PoUXYf4znzi-lNXHzFPATjFxzlr52Bl9Vx22_bcl7DQFW-CBz8s=&c=4WOwDGkSx1lrZo2xxKxNXADRMSvGJ7ECJ6MsoUJemGAjWnSy7HN0NA==&ch=_3hmXrlR49Yz93Jy_NnxGzSZLThhUF5-yPYF5oMgQtRZOaM3TiJ9oQ==) for my real time daily posts.
Hope you find my daily and weekly newsletter along with my Facebook posts helpful in following the General Assembly and Virginia politics in general.
Included in this weekly newsletter is a list of important dates for upcoming primaries and elections. Please mark your calendar.

| Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. Thank you.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. Thank you for your faithful and continued donations, which have allowed me to continue to communicate with you through session. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in Virginia?
After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

clean_body: The Virginia Budget Passed. What you need to know. | | | | VIRGINIA GENERAL ASSEMBLY SPECIAL SESSION BUDGET DEAL PASSED MONDAY WHAT YOU SHOULD KNOW | | | == | RADIO INTERVIEW ON THURSDAY, MAY 16 at 7:05AM | Friends, Here's my interview from Thursday with 1140 WRVA's award winning radio host John Reid. We discuss the biennial budget that was just passed by the Virginia General Assembly on Monday, along with a brief comment on being vindicated in 2 court cases on Monday. If I had a vote on Virginia's budget on Monday, I would have voted "no." Why? Way too much spending. Why isn't anyone talking about how much spending the General Assembly has voted to increase the budget year after year to the tune of a whopping $20 billion over the past 4 years? That's a 20% increase. It's a 234% increase since FY2010. Wow. While I understand the challenges of inflation, especially under Biden, it's time to ask legislators why they keep voting for budgets with out of control spending. Just take a look at Virginia's operating expenses alone which for perspective were almost $38 billion in FY2010. They increased to $67 billion in FY2021 and now the budget that was approved on Monday at $87.5 billion in FY2025 and $89 billion in FY2026. Virginia's exploding budget: FY 2010 $38 billion FY 2021 $67 billion FY 2025 $87.5 billion FY 2026 $89 billion Are you kidding me? It's time to re-evaluate and re-prioritize all of the spending of our taxpayer dollars and look at ways to trim programs that aren't constitutionally mandated and are a waste of taxpayer dollars. The Virginia General Assembly passed a $188 billion two year FY2025-2026 budget, which will go into effect July 1, 2024. That's $87 billion in FY2025 and $89 billion in FY2026, almost a $20 billion or 20% increase in 4 years. The House vote was 94-6 with "no" votes from conservatives Freitas, Garrett, Griffin, Oates, Scott, P.A., and Zehr. The Senate vote was 39-1, with McGuire casting the only true conservative "no" vote in the Senate. A huge kudos and thank you to the unsung heroes who voted "no" on this bloated budget full of increased spending. That said, we had to have a budget so our state wouldn't face a shutdown, which would have taken place on July 1, 2024. Yes, I hear you. There are agencies in the state government that I would like to see shut down as well, but there are also core functions of government that we must fund or it will effect public safety. The reality is that the legislature is controlled by Democrats who like to spend and love governmental subsidized programs and subsidies. So Governor Youngkin and Republicans had to compromise. The governor didn't get the tax cuts he so strongly advocated for but thankfully there were also no new tax increases. So here's the good news. The proposal to increase the state's sales tax to cover digital purchases like streaming subscriptions, music downloads and software was struck from the budget. Democrats didn't get priorities like legalizing retail sales of marijuana for recreational use and raising the state's minimum wage to $15 per hour by 2026. The best news is that the budget won't be linked to RGGI. This program requires electricity producers to purchase allowances for the carbon they emit, and some money raised from those purchases is returned to Virginia and used for flood resiliency and energy efficiency efforts. RGGI is a backdoor tax on Virginians because it allows companies to recoup the costs through customers' energy bills. There's much controversy over the operation of skill games in Virginia. While many small businesses and convenience stores say they desperately need these profits to stay afloat, many like myself are concerned about families and the addiction that entraps so many low income at risk families who are desperate to escape poverty, only to find they lose more money than they gain, further leaving the most vulnerable even more destitute. For reasons that I don't understand, this issue alone is a very heated debate and hot topic that has reached new heights in the General Assembly. Go figure. I don't get it. The budget scrapped nearly $94 million in skill game revenue anticipated for fiscal year 2025 and ticked off many convienience store owners. The legislature will probably meet again before the year is out to address how to handle skill games in Virginia. Of all of the issues facing Virginians I can't figure out for the life of me why this single issue seems to have become one of the hottest issues that is before the General Assembly. The House and Senate both went into recess after acting on the budget, rather than adjourn. So they are not still not finished for the year, despite passing a budget. Why? So they can further debate and discuss how to handle skill games in Virginia. I can personally think of many higher priority issues, but it does appear the General Assembly will return to rehash skill games. I personally don't believe it's worth bringing legislators back to Richmond for the sole purpose of addressing skill games in Virginia. In my humble opinion, it can wait until the 2025 legislative session in January. By going into recess instead of adjourning for the year, the legislature can call itself back into session to discuss potentially giving all localities the option of raising the sales tax on themselves to pay for school construction. Another reason, the General Assembly should not meet again until January. More taxes on Virginians could be passed. It concerns me that even some Republicans are interested in raising taxes locally to cover school construction. If a locality is struggling, then taxing the people in that area will only make matters worse. Instead cut some of these well intended commemorative programs and celebrations and let's find money in the budget to help these struggling schools. | The budget compromise includes raises of 3% each year for teachers, state employees and state-supported local employees. We're facing a major teacher shortage in Virginia, so I support doing anything to attract and retain good teachers. That said, where is the money in education going? Is it in fact going to teachers? It increases state funding of K-12 schools by more than $2 billion and provides more than $200 million to make higher education more affordable by curbing tuition increases. The approved budget boosts spending for Medicaid and rates paid to personal care attendants and expands services for Virginians with behavioral health disabilities. The deal provides almost $145 million for the Washington transit system, $100 million in toll relief for drivers in Hampton Roads and, contingent on additional revenue, $175 million for improvements to Interstate 81 in western Virginia. Why not get rid of the tolls in Hampton Roads? No wonder the people of Hampton need relief. You can't travel 10 miles before you have to pay a toll in Hampton. Does it surprise you that the city of Hampton is controlled by Democrats who voted in favor of the tolls? Sounds like a mismanagement issue to me. Maybe a call to Senators Louis Lucas and Maime Locke would be a good start. To support toll roads and then ask for relief is backwards to say the least. Finally, the legislature elected eight judges, including three from ==, for eight year terms on the circuit court for the 15th Judicial District; and Lisa Sewell, for a six-year term on the juvenile and domestic relations court for the 15th District. While I appreciate a budget passed before a shutdown, we need to continually ask the question, how much did spending increase from last year and why? Please consider following me on == for my real time daily posts. Hope you find my daily and weekly newsletter along with my Facebook posts helpful in following the General Assembly and Virginia politics in general. Included in this weekly newsletter is a list of important dates for upcoming primaries and elections. Please mark your calendar. | | == | | == | | == | | == | GET REGULAR UPDATES | Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. Thank you. Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly. Thank you for your faithful and continued donations, which have allowed me to continue to communicate with you through session. Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in Virginia? After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed. Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency. | | == | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | | JUNE 1 SATURDAY REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA CONVENTION HAMPTON, VA JUNE 18 TUESDAY REPUBLICAN PRIMARY FOR U.S. SENATE JULY 15-18 REPUBLICAN NATIONAL CONVENTION MILWAUKEE, WISCONSIN | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | Sent by mailto:amanda@senatoramandachase.ccsend.com powered by

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10b2630426214f6bb447fb05276ebd0e&_e=TTyXoBHNMYwvR7cR8hXZf1Y6H3SbwqZoLKB4stPD6_VY_fYAQ29WYCamqfpmRcTbjHjvbTMu37Km_TElus6jimrb6ow75Jr23HpcmycpNiYrM-7MehlwypcMXpdbs1EdgG_CY10p1xMiTNcmbhUOj4KPqgRD_xZvhOoSJyI43rtiEos6kwIMnTfCbL5fIAjETCGP2YGBYY1hO-YUyyx20duXTYZ3awE981RGBwLbFRvHXdMN0gushSYvRuLlCwCXfCDnqm1jrJNI574Lroimo27zskqHOqHrA9gsh2vx607jiZNSfpx8W3iShxmJnKL9u-OHdYKdMDPlnPstjpLBdXCYzeLc6dMDVe5Kst6GSQ7Ao_6BQXSrfhy9KsKAgabBSvTbqb5cY8QRBbF-H8peoA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10b2630426214f6bb447fb05276ebd0e&_e=TTyXoBHNMYwvR7cR8hXZf1Y6H3SbwqZoLKB4stPD6_VY_fYAQ29WYCamqfpmRcTbjHjvbTMu37Km_TElus6jimrb6ow75Jr23HpcmycpNiYrM-7MehlwypcMXpdbs1EdgG_CY10p1xMiTNcmbhUOj4KPqgRD_xZvhOoSJyI43rtiEos6kwIMnTfCbL5fIAjETCGP2YGBYY1hO-YUyyx20duXTYZ3awE981RGBwLbFRvHXdMN0gushSYvRuLlCwCXw4qujg_MQaju85BKFph1rvakCb550BmZIIASY9PYuFSEErtl4FT7wlUujto7rriesB-_WO7nW2PN3rNjdzbLIVl-ewSOrXaZzvhPAF7FwriOwWcXweVXt8B2Qe0QgznUgVntmOuVRITNkUcRpZy9jg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10b2630426214f6bb447fb05276ebd0e&_e=TTyXoBHNMYwvR7cR8hXZf1Y6H3SbwqZoLKB4stPD6_VY_fYAQ29WYCamqfpmRcTbjHjvbTMu37Km_TElus6jimrb6ow75Jr23HpcmycpNiYrM-7MehlwypcMXpdbs1EdgG_CY10p1xMiTNcmbhUOj4KPqgRD_xZvhOoSJyI43rtiEos6kwIMnTfCbL5fIAjETCGP2YGBYY1hO-YUyyx20duXTYZ3awE981RGBwLbFRvHXdMN0gushSYvRuLlCwCX3HC84OyjJ2EN4owHMMC80wIjLy1gkCom6Jq7BGi-YTXXgnblWn9FMd7wRPHb5k2oC4kBmujLXPBRQl8f8S4Ptm90R_RNPlLjND9vfjP0zHQ2oOC4wTNAxZPB940RxV7b__dcMHQXcUBBbiWA2sc_6g%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9061d895dd4193b4fe5307179afd00&_e=acuu-OjaadqgdG0OTPIpqTiWSMUwHBjfvMNbk6hsmTzBISJ6ZmcxDqvdArlH7qFkEh-vbtOodrvOH3W5oVmaVY_ZhPkNz0u3H3I65MnXTLm87dVZ2FKUWXasj4tOmcbIOdt2qTGGG8NFnEPlVN1fZDXCgiX_bTrqi6XqR_HQRs95s1JP8f4xpbbqO_VP-2kSXe672r1nnztfdFqiM1_ez7FVuz3fO2oOzRIgKH6rEju7mmjBqWgOYhN_azlOoaCiI4zJp-63eLuqR33p13aKgiMNdAIE1UqYGHBfqIQGo0jI3PIrNIfrs6-ksb9p_602Cy4dQqP6Sj8f1NwdJkWpJh2PqupG8KueRzk_BV6qcGcsFAItmXVNAsTqX0VaZVM7p7ZTsi8rzhhwtQro6vrOmQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9061d895dd4193b4fe5307179afd00&_e=acuu-OjaadqgdG0OTPIpqTiWSMUwHBjfvMNbk6hsmTzBISJ6ZmcxDqvdArlH7qFkEh-vbtOodrvOH3W5oVmaVY_ZhPkNz0u3H3I65MnXTLm87dVZ2FKUWXasj4tOmcbIOdt2qTGGG8NFnEPlVN1fZDXCgiX_bTrqi6XqR_HQRs95s1JP8f4xpbbqO_VP-2kSXe672r1nnztfdFqiM1_ez7FVuz3fO2oOzRIgKH6rEju7mmjBqWgOYhN_azlOoaCifZExLVRPObKmyAfzuKty6oFTIWK_QSw71kXMQH9ip4J7ktBULb1hWxYz4DcrK78Pr8iq1f1z-pWzZwd3hDHzha4WKHAaogKq-4c9WIV05U3n9SSh6cWU8ER7-yzZiun7cuSYBNjGxRV6_D6x6vP6xg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b9061d895dd4193b4fe5307179afd00&_e=acuu-OjaadqgdG0OTPIpqTiWSMUwHBjfvMNbk6hsmTzBISJ6ZmcxDqvdArlH7qFkEh-vbtOodrvOH3W5oVmaVY_ZhPkNz0u3H3I65MnXTLm87dVZ2FKUWXasj4tOmcbIOdt2qTGGG8NFnEPlVN1fZDXCgiX_bTrqi6XqR_HQRs95s1JP8f4xpbbqO_VP-2kSXe672r1nnztfdFqiM1_ez7FVuz3fO2oOzRIgKH6rEju7mmjBqWgOYhN_azlOoaCidxXns5fV0kbdzwJOzo1b6-VGmF1RsUiHWsU7fVLY2Zai5Yynw-xbeYP9CdMg4ChjNW3SGiWk1FPflodNfdmE5-SbbH9CJ12lOMPV9_EZ0H5Uz9LBjJ9B2h0D3Ic8x-JzgweNDbIRUChkAY2P086ZOw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
Here's what we're up against.

|
---

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9aa97ce7214c486296d1a86dcda48787&_e=R2QROqCzWQDnmNk7kVNs2hNHshX2TDh4OoA3GO7OM6n2aXwh49L2x2J5Y0lZfv58GZZWHIrnd-j6ng3huxLPwpyn_5ACU9AygFGPMU0tP2Ylj0_0QaQS9TY1jITHu5lHkql03IWZ8muAXoLl8etSgZLhyeWVHc_P1GZa32qwRGbkkfFILRSCX1qSdD96koPS0cXy-txS6mSDEoEgTZw1R9PjoFszYmz7HpGr-zFPKPUjTxPZh5-Bx2z85PBec0iMJ1CWDMo1canPYqgrDwOO1MAkDHo5dCcltvCu2khdy0ApuWdR7AiUNlzPZcRwC8vsPOniXTjqDdxB3FpOk7i6gAQ4PKs4uJCcjh6uf0ohT0g%3D)[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9aa97ce7214c486296d1a86dcda48787&_e=R2QROqCzWQDnmNk7kVNs2hNHshX2TDh4OoA3GO7OM6n2aXwh49L2x2J5Y0lZfv58GZZWHIrnd-j6ng3huxLPwpyn_5ACU9AygFGPMU0tP2Ylj0_0QaQS9TY1jITHu5lHkql03IWZ8muAXoLl8etSgZLhyeWVHc_P1GZa32qwRGbkkfFILRSCX1qSdD96koPSqpkZ-9lqkC5C8lcPUYhuuUumLHiBh1TEL0SYI6AnJFImYje4vjvwYFo7JMDpa63vzpt7a9g51_efFZdsQaDl5CAGWW-pjV_9z9u_Ksq5fZHeBQPb8B1fpGMfgTVA1F7oIN1XT82Mb9x285Zh2fLYaeMCIqVMvF37USmv0OrvgvY%3D)
Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9aa97ce7214c486296d1a86dcda48787&_e=R2QROqCzWQDnmNk7kVNs2hNHshX2TDh4OoA3GO7OM6n2aXwh49L2x2J5Y0lZfv58GZZWHIrnd-j6ng3huxLPwpyn_5ACU9AygFGPMU0tP2Ylj0_0QaQS9TY1jITHu5lHkql03IWZ8muAXoLl8etSgZLhyeWVHc_P1GZa32qwRGbkkfFILRSCX1qSdD96koPShnv9Qeem1ic2BULtv-UlvgNGcaP9XZj8j5W1sWzi4A5oRNCmHtk7E3c5--KsYgmGa4m4wf3paTFomPm7Dh-l8ZAAUCxQJB_pd1yuz-CLv4hmOiolhr-5T23gxDnbr-0mrwqXjQsyXPwa45xx5VasFJ6Z3fnJVN6kENdid6ZVTUk%3D) [Donate](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9aa97ce7214c486296d1a86dcda48787&_e=R2QROqCzWQDnmNk7kVNs2hNHshX2TDh4OoA3GO7OM6n2aXwh49L2x2J5Y0lZfv58GZZWHIrnd-j6ng3huxLPwpyn_5ACU9AygFGPMU0tP2Ylj0_0QaQS9TY1jITHu5lHkql03IWZ8muAXoLl8etSgZLhyeWVHc_P1GZa32qwRGbkkfFILRSCX1qSdD96koPS8PZiYBzjmQ98N1aDL5cSDpdN0IMdGLHOwTKULH-73p-5rPfxxpleVbfBa4AfIW-m2EwpMsSy9OPJ6LAPUSwxXJyDSKX8e-0RpPbtDFbhidwKoCsuALGuRELoZ97HlHjIna2Q-CUGPDZ1Ks_Z_9VsODkW5zz8MxciSPinsFd8gQvJTPRBQUIdXHJVpuQBxtxX)
SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

**SkyTree Book Fairs already has 800+ requests from schools! They are swamped with requests for book fairs that only provide age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. **

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs for the next semester. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. clean_body: Here's what we're up against. | | | "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries. Here's what we're up against. These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children. Here is the solution: SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic. And it's working! SkyTree Book Fairs already has 800+ requests from schools! They are swamped with requests for book fairs that only provide age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!! We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs for the next semester. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with. Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic! God bless, Kirk Cameron P.S. | _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=296ed4727c8b47d18ede3669c7eb38b0&_e=dqmlQjgB6PR3PEzNLSHjMBL8nX5Vn9gTW0duhVdjXPuPniy18XiLx54ZmIXS7rjlbbbjj8UGYyhP8D8kL_jVTmXTj67X4s-QrwAbe7H9kGe0WWqSB83iu7VV9g-7wUrHUdDlzJRA_gYNFoahzqb5X2I6QKV4HhCzzVMDkjV50vB1ZqAkxr8gsnJTXvKOLQEEFk_pridinNxsHwV_vx0HlAkra60vSvmVOFj-8Qgr0UCZXioMWxIKW-QVpjkPyIy-x_H9QyR1l76KSpoWXdCCazRuCCnpNpVsp6evviMQ1tqgWmiKyGvXxa2BXKVN28dyaUM3PsaHGPZ0-1EUJgQyYZH6WHNDFU5g9uCDI2enuhkaJB0w7-zBqxbC0EbVTOp_W90VUqcFt7tb0Zj6mzvb4dlRfKnHxwhyB5xA-Fxfgq9GfROrAejrg11nkxAYDNXh)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That's why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=296ed4727c8b47d18ede3669c7eb38b0&_e=dqmlQjgB6PR3PEzNLSHjMCzqpwe3Fjnm3aoWGHHiDqfcdcWXn4O2x1O1N-IKoYbS-FwAkNIEND63FwzuIzniDtbcAXUtqCiZNRGNgpzIK-taUDSf4Sxm4SVyf976sJm6jmCyMyv2ubbHou4pITxqVxb32fviAF69IdcFRqBak3lMZ5Ptr9lU9TdTJyhW_1ehmADq5gf1N3qemkch9jwo0zL1MdcqH-UJR018UpBShnYkqFNjfDR_yvAz--1i2QNp5Ys3cXcp-kSzAkOh003HQ5AuqttwAAibVUkWFFFYglxNd4qSyxDNchW3OTMLFOOLGs-NiNqA7vZ_kX2LnmZWTov6rwfozA4yMQd18nuR0YDSXkz91rwBqyN_DJeseQ481VRDtEaEwJdpuuA_H5fA5w%3D%3D) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW2RYmQWqN
ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW2RYmQWqN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63186172:W2RYmQWqN:m:3:2532013465:FF0CA9AEB469CE99B0D2EEBAC052FAA4:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW2RYmQWqN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW2RYmQWqN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: When I stood next to President Trump…
body:
It could be at Mar-a-Lago (like this time) or at a rally with 30,000 screaming fans, it doesn’t matter.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrjh15hla6n78mqp2up08b318skqisacmnond9g8_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm2ob2chh2bs "Marsha and Trump")
---

Hi.

**This is Marsha Blackburn. I am honored and humbled whenever I share the stage with my friend, President Trump.** It could be at Mar-a-Lago (like this time) or at a rally with 30,000 screaming fans, it doesn't matter.

The energy is always, always, always electric!

We may not have Big Tech, the media, Hollywood, or the liberal donor class on our side... but we have the numbers. As I told President Trump, it's mission-critical that we all work together to finish the job and save our country.

_**[So, if you're reading this message, we need your help. I set a goal of raising $10,000 to help get out the vote in the swing counties that will determine the next election.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ir0jjpgddo8udc66k6j0dcs9v3tbprkg2vhfqg_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm2ob2chh2bs "So, if you’re reading this message, we need your help. I set a goal of raising $10,000 to help get out the vote in the swing counties that will determine the next election.")**_

President Trump knows how to build excitement. You and I both know that.

So the BEST thing we can do to win big in the next election is to put that excitement into action.

We can make a big difference in the next election but only if everyone agrees to help. Can you spare $20 to help us persuade on-the-fence voters to vote for the GOP?

_Please join us:_
---
| | | [ADD $10 NOW >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurrneo6qv2ih1uephrd3drdugdcca1ocmeukom0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm2ob2chh2bs "ADD $10 NOW")
---
| | | [ADD $25 NOW >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr92h2ehl9nst1f9fdo4hj3afgs3si4e5ptisps0_rp22sh2s8i6ep33c1gm2ob2chh2bs "ADD $25 NOW")
---

---
Thanks for reading this email. It means a lot.

God bless you,
Marsha Blackburn

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77ebd1e86c97429d8a0a675460232cce&_e=lSmMi8fUC7cQmbeMsTJ3XLCTtM9lo-YGdgibiIT2SpUS1NylZCA4ftAzAQvvmhcA4Ezm6Der25EcDoDSN0QIYjQ7cWNkWE8Gvtq2eoI2brnM59SDuVSfeUGsp0aXexWUVIFGIYhqu6RL3wHHZRLPkakYUbfSTxXjvBmpq4UH1b4OqajE3pQ_bdtOn-i9vjwy67OOWSVwPchPUhaxlXgEtbAKQM8-vHnXwl6rehBSsfk2fXp4jS73EYvD_CTojzRgtZXCSUfM6VEQvH7EG7vAVTnkMYY3KsM4SjkU6dc1h7SCGseZljd2CExG-q0lcNtZeXc31u3BDWhdp0FEj9UmNmerPdKbszvj-bDEdH4CkNtYAyghG0QyhYSyKgXXbYp9UqxA-Ue7jm8HXLN9N50br8ueX4P4tFxqpcc-0DhJFa-x24asXfVfuv3-VMGlf0ky)

| |

CLICK TO WATCH SPEAKER WHITE
| Dear Friend,

**Politicians sometimes talk in soundbites.** Rather than delve into detail, they sometimes skate over issues with slogans.

**Not so with Speaker Jason White. **This week our House Speaker gave a detailed presentation about his policy priorities at an event hosted by MCPP.

**Speaker White talked about the next steps for school choice, reform of taxes, changes to Certificate of Need laws, and much more.**

Speaker White was warmly received by a large audience, and the event has been widely covered by the Clarion Ledger and others.
---
|
---
| Have a wonderful weekend!

Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=738c09db2f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

subject: Freedom, Hard Work & America First
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Support my Friend, Ryan Zinke! Support my Friend, Ryan Zinke!

|
---

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Friend

I'm asking for your support of my friend and fellow patriot, Ryan Zinke. Ryan is a staunch conservative, former U.S. Navy SEAL, businessman, family man, and importantly: an America First Patriot.

| [ **JOIN ME IN SUPPORTING RYAN ZINKE** ](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=29c773ed29ea4b59be930d3f333349f5&_e=NqjgluRDo507YGZUPQLcy2-GQpp9iXZl-QaSrvXzgnNGNbVczkox-uwXpISSsIyHX3rBDHkUkjQnjFEIcXssSBr-I9wXO6UdxwlwKDAnfNonDQwnwN_BHIr9qax_tH0F4N0-We2TzaWGvA8Lk9-PnXuLRZ-Qrqj1_p6AVzj_ba6oCJTocjzZ0X_Rk1moxpSF7YrmncwOvoyrFZ87J2k0tNq3Ae6fiooa8TDrU4nL541fsX8Y1Oz3YOoJwIkSyR3zT5ObOXQkfCXQ01rwuQffW0fm9FvoKAmvRD_KodvVCd21KLPHjW9bXviYQuxzzz2Z6ManSi6gLdnPxrhn8_smVWTQpfBHrQZxzGDTVbNbXYVRRGbiJxjOUjIg14yX6-kz)
---

**Ryan represents Montana's 1st congressional district. He works tirelessly every day to fight for America First and crush Biden's Build Back BROKE agenda.** While the left thinks that we're all racists, sexists, and bigots, we know that we're actually the party of freedom, hard work, and AMERICA FIRST. They can protest all they want, but we won't cave to the woke mafia.

**President Trump endorsed Ryan Zinke, saying:_"Ryan will fight against the Radical Left Democrats who continually block the America First policies we put in place. He will be a strong leader for the great Patriots of Montana. Ryan has my Complete and Total Endorsement for Congress."_**

If we don't keep the House, the Democrats will ramp up their pro-abortion, extremist, pro-terrorist, disastrous, open-border policies and out-of-control spending. Make no mistake: their woke agenda invites drug and human traffickers across our border and encourages dangerous, violent criminals wreaking havoc in our communities.

clean_body: Support my Friend, Ryan Zinke! Support my Friend, Ryan Zinke! | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Friend I'm asking for your support of my friend and fellow patriot, Ryan Zinke. Ryan is a staunch conservative, former U.S. Navy SEAL, businessman, family man, and importantly: an America First Patriot. | Ryan represents Montana's 1st congressional district. He works tirelessly every day to fight for America First and crush Biden's Build Back BROKE agenda. While the left thinks that we're all racists, sexists, and bigots, we know that we're actually the party of freedom, hard work, and AMERICA FIRST. They can protest all they want, but we won't cave to the woke mafia. President Trump endorsed Ryan Zinke, saying:"Ryan will fight against the Radical Left Democrats who continually block the America First policies we put in place. He will be a strong leader for the great Patriots of Montana. Ryan has my Complete and Total Endorsement for Congress." If we don't keep the House, the Democrats will ramp up their pro-abortion, extremist, pro-terrorist, disastrous, open-border policies and out-of-control spending. Make no mistake: their woke agenda invites drug and human traffickers across our border and encourages dangerous, violent criminals wreaking havoc in our communities. I need you to join me in supporting Ryan Zinke TODAY. Thank you, Ted Budd U.S. Senate (R-NC) | Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader from North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Sign our letter to President Trump as he fights for us in NYC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now more than ever, he needs to know you have his back.

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I went to New York to support President Trump in Court.

He's facing down a corrupt "GET TRUMP" judge and the full weight of a Radical Left, Soros DA.

_**And he 's going through all of this because he cares about YOU and the future of America. **_

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f67cf1329d54382a21bc872b797e36c&_e=JUvsRdIcAj1lEoRFlT8_PaxCRK21R0hFiyOYIAUBSVeMhqT07TQK6Zg_p5DgOQzloEx15e5KsOujzykFOjmQKxNO2Ch7tNKMuYzZxrACHDPnt0XjiL4RGvEkXZDogiT2_d-40KYVtCXW7Okwa9w0LVFOMypgx6dRkqAzIORevvdlh-Ypvbwcf1NgCFRaD6ODHnpHCvPaydEkOIUgNCULMmpuGk2lQDf9kd1rYRzKwtUZGrkjDH8psoxIJD7jCql8FKJVFT5Ejm7pZv5SQxC-tRpCi69pKdly0BvI3yLFWEUpWCWN5KMLctx3jfljsl8TPCRstpVEvq00bgCkpRnI-8BvPyHKAEbrz-vDedXS18Zh0uSV2lhi7N3ofdA93ARGI7cytfJdYKp-SdMu61QGpf9oyUat24V49YZmTth8Aqs_gRSjpvlFFrEtEr1id50K)
---
| | | [SIGN THE LETTER TO PRES. TRUMP](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f67cf1329d54382a21bc872b797e36c&_e=JUvsRdIcAj1lEoRFlT8_PaxCRK21R0hFiyOYIAUBSVeMhqT07TQK6Zg_p5DgOQzloEx15e5KsOujzykFOjmQKxNO2Ch7tNKMuYzZxrACHDPnt0XjiL4RGvEkXZDogiT2_d-40KYVtCXW7Okwa9w0LVFOMypgx6dRkqAzIORevvdlh-Ypvbwcf1NgCFRaD6ODHnpHCvPaydEkOIUgNCULMmpuGk2lQDf9kd1rYRzKwtUZGrkjDH8psoxIJD7jCql8FKJVFT5Ejm7pZv5SQxC-tRpCi69pKdly0BvI3yLFWEWyyIB36OCcdw5iqS_CqymG0N17gS_FsGylAxHZ9wi_zF_PuI6h3C2iaYl59PTqAQhTBEFSprjeLm54cFlMMHgtmBI2B6Ebx_QQEma3K2FxfA5mDKb2q2f9fSvzXIlMCO2xMoi3p-fQ26J6Gi5kpN4x "Generic Button")
---

They're keeping him couped up in a freezing, run-down courtroom because they're terrified of letting him campaign with the American people.

I know if we all could be there in New York to show our support we would, but I understand that just isn't possible.

**_So we 're putting a letter together to show President Trump that millions of Americans are there with him in spirit. _

We the American People know that the crooked LAWFARE against you is nothing but a CORRUPT WITCH HUNT for the sole purpose of ELECTION INTERFERENCE!

I, undersigned, add my name to this open letter to you, President Trump, as you head to the courtroom to hear yet ANOTHER phony "GET TRUMP" case against you.

And further, with God on your side, I have complete and total confidence that upon beating these phony charges, you will return to the White House and restore freedom and prosperity to this land once again. **

clean_body: As we gear up for the 2024 elections, Republicans are laying the foundation to maintain, and gain, their power through voter suppression | | | | 📢Governor Brian Kemp has done it again:📢 Earlier this month, he signed another blatant voter suppression bill into law, further intensifying his attacks on voting rights. SB 189, the bill in question, will attempt to disenfranchise thousands of voters during a critical election year. We’re preparing for mass voter purges from the rolls and a ramp-up in intimidation tactics to keep Black, Brown, and unhoused voters from casting a ballot. A wave of voter challenges is expected before November — and we need the resources to keep voters educated and informed. That’s why we’re writing: = But we can estimate that 83% of people who receive this email won’t open it in time, and even fewer will be able to chip in. | = The donations we receive from this email will help stop anti-voting attacks by ensuring voters can still make their voices heard — meaning your support is crucial. We see right through Governor Kemp’s actions to silence voters, and we’re fighting back. = = We’re so grateful for your support. Thank you for being a part of this pro-voter movement. ---
Dear Peter,
As expected, the campaign to elect RFK Jr. has become a battleground, with fierce opposition coming from both Republicans and Democrats.
While Republicans have countered us with outright lies, it's the Democrats who are investing heavily to limit competition for President Biden.
As Bobby highlighted in his recent interview on _World Over_ with Raymond Arroyo, the tactics employed resemble those more fitting of an old, _authoritarian playbook from Russia than an American democratic institution_.
While the DNC might prefer to engage in personal attacks and divert attention from pressing issues like rising grocery prices, escalating foreign aid, and the need for initiatives to boost homeownership among the young, we remain focused on the real challenges facing Americans today.
These ongoing efforts to undermine our campaign only underscore their recognition of RFK Jr.'s growing popularity among voters across the nation.
It's time to reject nasty attacks and have a real debate. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will gladly debate President Biden on the issues that matter anytime and anywhere.
[Please take a stand with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Nicole Shanahan today! ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dnc_machine_5_18_24_rs_nd1&n=3)

**As you're aware, the upcoming Senate races in Nevada, Montana, Ohio, and Pennsylvania are not merely local events – they're pivotal battles that will shape the control of the Senate this year.** The stakes couldn't be higher, and our current majority hangs in a delicate balance. The fact is, even a single seat slipping from our grasp could drastically alter our collective future.
Donald Trump, along with his far-right MAGA allies, has his sights set on snatching just one more seat to seize control of the Senate. **We cannot underestimate their determination, and we must match it with our own resolute commitment to thwart their efforts.**
Imagine the repercussions of **_losing even one_** Senate seat. Such a setback could severely hamper President Biden's agenda and all that we've fought to accomplish. This is why we've set a crucial goal: to rally an additional 24 donors in PA. This isn't an arbitrary target, but a strategic necessity to amass the resources needed to bolster Senate Democrats in these essential races.
Your support has been the cornerstone of our movement. At this critical juncture, Senate Democrats are relying on us to fight for them more than ever. Your contribution today could be the deciding factor in a race that ultimately determines the Senate Majority. Kicking what you can, when you can, is a declaration of your commitment to our cause and our future.
That's why we're respectfully asking you: [_**will you send in a $3 donation right now to become the 22nd of 24 donors we need from PA before midnight? We're truly counting on your personal support in this moment.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85170950/473910444/-126978672?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240518_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNjI5NTU4LTEyMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wWEsTNp0o40kbbM6P10BIhTTrPL-IRcI0jEzAlZ02q4=)

subject: a particularly bad moment to miss our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Peter, It’s Sherrod Brown and I need to personally ask for your help: **We just fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal, and we need to get back on track ASAP.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85172027/473911034/1368611189?refcode=EM_F_240517split_N_SB_90DO_5_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTMyM2Q2ZC0xNDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=guIjn9OsyFx0-Z0hCdzj0utJIav0LRrdBruo2r9Vxuk=)
It's never good to miss a goal, but this is a particularly bad time. The GOP is spending recording-breaking amounts to flood the airwaves with attack ads against me because they know this race will decide Senate control – and I just heard from my team that we could be outspent and drowned out.

**It might be hard to believe, but the resources we raise now – not in November – will have the biggest impact on our ability to win this race. That's why hitting our fundraising goal is so important, and why falling short would be so costly.**

I'm personally asking: **Will you rush $10, or anything at all, to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**

name: Angela Alsobrooks for Senate
subject: stopping a GOP Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland’s open Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state.

A lot of Hogan’s momentum comes from the perception that he’s a moderate voice in an otherwise extremist, out-of-touch GOP.

**_But Hogan’s veto record tells a very different story._**

In fact, we’re about to give you 5 clear examples proving that Larry Hogan would be just one more rubber stamp for the GOP’s agenda in the Senate, but before we do that: [**Will you please chip in a split donation of $25 — _just $5 for each reason listed below_ — to help us and the Voter Protection Project take on Larry Hogan and win this critical battleground race?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68333?t=6&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4) | [DONATE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68333?t=7&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
---
Here are 5 examples proving that Marylanders deserve better than Larry Hogan:

_He vetoed a $15 minimum wage.

He undercut workers by vetoing legislation that would have allowed them to deduct union dues from state income taxes.

He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders.

He vetoed common sense gun legislation mandating background checks.

He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland._

**Larry Hogan isn’t fooling anyone, and we can’t afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate.** [**Will you please pitch in $25 split between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project so we can boost our Maryland-first message, win this critical election, and defend our narrow Senate majority?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68333?t=8&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Angela Alsobrooks and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68334?t=9&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68335?t=10&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68336?t=11&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68337?t=12&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/68338?t=13&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
Thanks!

—Alsobrooks HQ
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14617%2E878179%2EVS9kA4)
---

Did you see our latest endorsement, Peter?

Janelle Stelson is running to unseat Rep. Scott Perry, who was recently described in the _New York Times_ as an **“unswerving loyalist of former President Donald J. Trump,”** and we are excited to share the latest dynamics of this race with you.

Here’s what the article has to say about the race:

_“Now, Mr. Perry, a historically lackluster fund-raiser who has had to divert substantial donations to paying for legal fees relating to his role in trying to overturn the 2020 election,**finds himself increasingly at risk** in a central Pennsylvania seat that the **nonpartisan Cook Political Report recently shifted from “likely Republican” to “lean Republican.”**_
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85174589/473917950/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240518Stelson_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTQxZjllLTE4MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=omBdY2Ba9twsbxp4KlruOhnVkjOCWHqDTgk_hKltgNI=)
---
Janelle, a news anchor and reporter on local news stations, has been described as **Perry’s “strongest opponent yet.”** With our help, Janelle can defeat her MAGA extremist opponent.

Although Perry is known to be a weak fundraiser, we need to ensure that we get Janelle everything she needs to win. Here’s what our funds can help her do:

✅ Campaign media creation (videos, commercials, ads, mailers, yard signs, billboards)
✅ Blasting that media ^ throughout her district
✅ Field organizers and voter outreach

[**This race is going to be close, and Janelle needs our support. _“Rep. Perry has stood up against the ever-growing pro-abortion agenda of the Biden-Harris administration and the radical bureaucrats who are actively working to expand abortion access, resources, and funding.”_

**Today, we are proud to announce our endorsement of Janelle Stelson, who is running to _unseat him in Congress._**

For nearly 40 years, Janelle has been listening to and advocating for central PA communities as a news anchor and reporter on local news stations. Viewers across her district have trusted her to shine a light on issues big and small. Now, as basic rights and democracy are under attack, she’s ready to serve her community as a Representative in D.C.

Here’s a bit more from her campaign about her opponent, Scott Perry, who serves as head of the ultra-conservative Freedom Caucus:

❌ Congressman Perry has promoted claims of election fraud and played a leading role in Donald Trump’s attempt to overthrow the 2020 election.

❌ Every member of Congress in PA voted to give a gold medal to the police officers who defended the Capitol on January 6... except for Congressman Perry.

❌ Every member of Congress in PA voted to protect Asian Americans from hate crimes... except for Congressman Perry.

❌ Every member of Congress in PA voted to strengthen protections for children who are victims of sexual abuse... except for Congressman Perry.

The non-partisan Cook Political Report has declared Janelle as **Perry’s “strongest opponent yet.”** This race is going to be competitive, and Janelle needs our support to win.

[**Now more than ever, we need pro-choice women in office. Will you help us rush support to Janelle’s campaign by donating $20.24 or more immediately?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85174605/473917982/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_240518Stelson_N_CD_90DO_10_G_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhMTQxZjllLTE4MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=omBdY2Ba9twsbxp4KlruOhnVkjOCWHqDTgk_hKltgNI=)

Let’s do this,

Colleen Davis
