clean_body: It might not seem like it can make a difference, but believe me, it can and it will. | One dollar. 4 quarters. 20 nickels. It might not seem like it could make an impact, but I’m here to tell you differently: = Here’s why: it’s not just a dollar. Every contribution — thousands of them from every corner of the country — adds up to ensure we have the resources to be successful. If every person reading this email donated just $1, we would be well on our way to fully funding our 2024 electoral priorities. Heck, if even HALF of the folks reading this email made a donation, it would make a huge difference! Our online records indicate that you haven’t made a donation to the NDRC just yet, and I just wanted to make sure you knew that a little can go a long way to help strengthen this team. I’m hoping you’ll believe me that every donation — even just $1 — is powerful. It’s powerful because it represents another person who believes enough in this movement to invest in it. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I’m so honored to have you a part of this team — truly. — Marina This is according to our records associated with this email address. If you’ve recently made a donation with a different email or in a different method, thank you so much! Please disregard the note. = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
Rep. Bergman is upset that Dr. Jill Biden is championing funding for the Soo Locks. He's suggesting that only he and Trump should get credit and for reinvesting in this vital piece of American infrastructure.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Rep. Jack Bergman voted against half a billion dollars for the Soo Locks from the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, a majority of its funding. Help me replace him. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friends,
Facts matter; honesty matters. Despite what Bergman says, our Democratic Senators were mainly responsible for the initial reinvestment, not Bergman.
We cannot overlook the most important reason for voting for our leaders — their character.
*
Integrity
and
Empathy
*
Courage
and
Humility
*
Authenticity
and
Resilience
*
Kindness
and
Compassion
*
Accountability
and
Honesty
*
Curiosity
and
Open-mindedness
I strive to embody these values because the constituency deserves them, and they've been absent for far too long.
Whether we're holding Bergman accountable for his lies or defending the Democratic process against frivolous attacks by my primary opponent [http://drbob.me/response] , our positive campaign for Congress focuses solely on the issues and how they affect our families, freedoms, and futures.
Significant momentum is with us, and we will replace Jack Bergman, together. Friends, thank you for joining me in this fight.
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I’m not going to beat around the bush
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I’m asking for your help.
| | |
---
Folks, you’ve likely seen the news by now that Virginia’s Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin has endorsed Donald Trump — and plans to work with him to flip the state red in November.

I’m not going to beat around the bush: The stakes are too high for us to get complacent and just assume Virginia will vote blue.
With Youngkin’s recent statewide victory here in VA, the truth is that we’re still a battleground. Republicans win some elections, and Democrats win some elections. Some years, it’s a toss-up.
**_This year, it cannot be a toss-up._**
**My team set an emergency fundraising goal of raising $50,000 by tomorrow to fight back against the Youngkin-Trump plan to flip VA, so I’m asking for your help. Will you split a donation of any amount that’s meaningful to you between my reelection campaign and Jacky Rosen’s right now?**
You can contribute quickly and securely online via this link or the button below: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_kaine**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85175339/473920079/-1452846037?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3820-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2RhOTQ1My0xOTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27A7Tg30LDcfaEY9EgHu6VzAwm_QF2xxmUumoSAXz6Q=)

\- Tim Kaine

name: James Carville
subject: Not the update you want to hear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-1?refcode=em20240518-1&refcode2=2987_552475_F3EK12&akid=2987%2E552475%2EF3EK12)
Peter:
With the election heating up, here’s the update on Pennsylvania’s Senate race that you **_need_** to hear, not the one you **_want_** to hear:
**FIRST:** David McCormick, a hedge fund executive from Connecticut, launched his campaign to defeat Bob.
**THEN:** Right-wing super PACs and Wall Street billionaires quickly rallied behind him, spending millions to flood the airwaves in an attempt to buy this critical Senate seat.
**NOW:** David McCormick is officially the Republican nominee, and the full force of the Republican party, including Donald Trump, is all in to flip PA red.
**If Bob loses, Democrats don’t have a shot in hell to protect the Senate and the White House.** That means kissing any chance of protecting women’s rights, workers’ rights, and voting rights goodbye.
[**I’ll be damned if we screw this up, so here’s what I need from you, Peter. Will you pitch in $5 right now to help Bob hit the ground running in the general election?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-1?refcode=em20240518-1&refcode2=2987_552475_F3EK12&akid=2987%2E552475%2EF3EK12)
Your support (yes yours, Peter!) will make a huge difference in this battleground race, so thank you.
— James Carville

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2987%2E552475%2EF3EK12)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2987%2E552475%2EF3EK12)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Before Trump takes the stage today...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC?
#

In just a few short hours, Donald Trump will be delivering the keynote speech at the NRA convention in Dallas.
[**Before Trump takes the stage, will you rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240518-1-bl&t=1&akid=8122%2E3935704%2EP4Bq6I)
**[CHIP IN NOW >>](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240518-1-bl&t=2&akid=8122%2E3935704%2EP4Bq6I)**
There’s no doubt that Donald Trump will use his speech to attack the work our movement for gun safety has done to make our country safer. We also know he will use this platform to degrade President Biden, the strongest gun safety president in modern history.
After all, when Trump spoke to a group of NRA members back in February, he proudly boasted that during his administration he “did nothing” on guns.
His direct quote?
**“During my four years, nothing happened! And there was great pressure on me having to do with guns. We did nothing. We didn’t yield.”**
It’s true: Donald Trump did NOTHING on guns, and it cost tens of thousands of people their lives. Even after promising to enact universal background checks, Trump never followed through, spending his presidency in the pocket of the gun lobby.
[**Lives are on the line, and we can’t afford four more years of Donald Trump. So will you please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your contribution will help fuel our work to fight back against the NRA and make sure we keep Donald Trump out of the White House this November.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240518-1-bl&t=3&akid=8122%2E3935704%2EP4Bq6I)

name: Debbie (personal email)
subject: My opponent just dropped MILLIONS on attack ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
here's what Rick Scott did after Florida banned abortion:
| | |
---
Listen, nothing like this has happened so far in our battleground race: **My opponent, Rick Scott, just dropped MILLIONS on attack ads after the Florida Supreme Court green-lit a six-week abortion ban.**
We know Rick Scott — who spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy this seat last time around — can fund attack ads at the drop of a hat.

But his _rushing_ to go up on the air after Florida's abortion ban isn't a sign of strength. In fact, it's the opposite.

**Rick Scott is scared. He is weak. And he will once again do anything and spend _everything_ to keep Florida red.**
But, friend, ours is the grassroots movement that will defeat him: **Polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at _The New York Times_ just named Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

So when Rick Scott goes on the air with ads _lying_ about his record on abortion and _lying_ about me in a desperate effort to save his campaign — just as the momentum is on OUR side — what must we do? **Fight back. Because to Rick Scott we say:_Y_** _**a no**_ _**más.** _**Enough is enough**

**[That's why I'm asking, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85179252/473931894/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1239-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ1YWZiMzMtMWUxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=toXgZ_moqt8cwZuKZ73jvgf-e1vNrhZdHbxoCRDS2EY=)**

Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain that pled guilty to what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever. He made off with millions and faced zero consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions nationwide, raise taxes on working families, and end vital programs like Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American Dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life****fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible****and giving back to the communities that gave me so much. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:** **[So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85179257/473931899/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1239-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ1YWZiMzMtMWUxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=toXgZ_moqt8cwZuKZ73jvgf-e1vNrhZdHbxoCRDS2EY=)**

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Fellow
conservative,

Over the
last three years, Joe Biden's open border policies have resulted
in tens of millions of illegal aliens flocking to our country. At
the same time, Biden has insisted there was NOTHING he could do
to stop the invasion.

Don't be
fooled by this, fellow conservative. This is all part of the
Left's Master Plan.

Why
WOULDN'T they want to come to the United States?

Joe Biden
is giving them:

"Free" healthcare

"Free" welfare

"Free" housing

STOP THE
MASTER PLAN: SIGN

Illegal
immigrants are allowed to crash our hospitals… our
schools… our welfare system…

All of
this while YOU foot the bill, not just monetarily, but also with
an increase in crime.

Fellow
conservative, you and I both know this was all done by design.
Why else would Joe Biden oppose H.R. 2, the most robust border
security package ever assembled that already passed the House?

It's time
for Congress to get serious, secure our border, build the wall,
and end catch-and-release.

But it
all starts with hardworking Americans like you and me standing up
and fighting back against this dangerous agenda.

Sign the
petition to help Heritage Action stop President Joe Biden's
Master Plan and fight for TRUE border security >>>

ADD YOUR
NAME NOW

you,

Hello Peter,
Let's make our voices heard together! The Republican party is united in encouraging early voting. Make sure your vote counts!
Early voting for the Republican Primary begins on Saturday, May 25, 2024.
You can vote in person at any polling location or fill out your mail-in ballot and mail it or drop it off at any polling location.
We, a united group of conservative Nevadans, are committed to reclaiming our Country and our State. We operate independently, without any influence from parties, lobbyists, unions, political consultants, or corporations. Our Voter Guide is a product of thorough research on the issues and the candidates, aiming to help you select conservative candidates with integrity, experience, and a genuine desire to serve you.
Please share this Voter's Guide with others. Together, we will prevail!
The Patriots Group

name: Ted Cruz
subject: “I think we’re gonna win in Texas.” — Chuck Schumer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Without your support, we don’t stand a chance. Read more >>>| | | Peter, It’s official — national Democrats are going ALL IN to flip Texas blue.

**[Chuck Schumer just told the media, “ _I think we’re gonna win in Texas._ ”](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=64f55647c651483b88797baf343b4917&_e=pyQSLQjt9f0K4CSjzcK7e26rxaOvQeo9dgcgoYkO3xZ1fYCFtn2DfjjHuY9hla1oHkJQvMqEOpsSRxySTuVeqsB_AjJ6T6LZQvfu-pMpu957kKxrv13oVFD4rzZ2wQZ-c66aQRhpgqbUp-gfuJEG300QGRvjcqCsriZYxPm_7XNMxfbqbfYDiUGJPxyy4CyXMnT3MkXeff0XyqgGRbx2MduwRpmVR0apBoNUMrKzVhBqPkhCVxQP2U2CzQF1ES-TfGuTOeo-udVqOWjWFnDAD38Wzj4u482-TmtpBpCe1N4Zqvhff5ylyLt2eQGSyDveqayAM_lhNrq2oKx2AtBIOWd6rZ7nCgt3Hw7Bea7_IzKYG0JdSYb2bvllxLhHo520qOD4JRQuv_LtV3mcAh7FUMVOm6pto2fuhHjEFEw4fq0yg8CNLwpZ0rBNKSiwXi1ZAqhyz02TTyTE3tWcbg3nuA%3D%3D)**

**[And he’s backing up this bold claim with tens of millions of dollars.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=64f55647c651483b88797baf343b4917&_e=pyQSLQjt9f0K4CSjzcK7e26rxaOvQeo9dgcgoYkO3xZ1fYCFtn2DfjjHuY9hla1oHkJQvMqEOpsSRxySTuVeqsB_AjJ6T6LZQvfu-pMpu957kKxrv13oVFD4rzZ2wQZ-c66aQRhpgqbUp-gfuJEG300QGRvjcqCsriZYxPm_7XNMxfbqbfYDiUGJPxyy4CyXMnT3MkXeff0XyqgGRbx2MduwRpmVR0apBoNUMrKzVhBqPkhCVxQP2U2CzQF1ES-TfGuTOeo-udVqOWjWFnDAD38Wzj4u482-TmtpBpCe1N7L8fLc5uhKH3VYc5BaKx_tl3rgBEbp8SKwJKKR1a9mRLarQntwvbBcXUpbuzISKIUWqSpnTTLBYLHAlDgC_OT1Dmrt-DNbyZtq4rG0z2FPLAqDmQ93-K5GaGSWlRib9BUIMJ5tRXb555t68mkGfkktUafMHjABZLhuSfZ492ELFQ%3D%3D)**

Colin Allred could spend up to 100 MILLION DOLLARS to defeat me, far outpacing my past far-left opponent Beto O’Rourke from 2018.

Peter, we need to make sure that Democrat Senate leader Chuck Schumer fails.

_Texas voters must teach Schumer and his far-left pals a lesson — don’t mess with Texas!_

I’m serious: We can’t let him beat us. We can’t let the Democrats take Texas — because if they win Texas our entire American way of life is at risk.
**[I urgently need YOUR support to save Texas from Schumer and the Democrats.Please fuel our fight with a donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or more right now.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=64f55647c651483b88797baf343b4917&_e=pyQSLQjt9f0K4CSjzcK7e26rxaOvQeo9dgcgoYkO3xZ1fYCFtn2DfjjHuY9hla1oHkJQvMqEOpsSRxySTuVeqsB_AjJ6T6LZQvfu-pMpu957kKxrv13oVFD4rzZ2wQZ-c66aQRhpgqbUp-gfuJEG300QGRvjcqCsriZYxPm_7XNMxfbqbfYDiUGJPxyy4CyXMnT3MkXeff0XyqgGRbx2MduwRpmVR0apBoNUMrKzVhBqPkhCVxQP2U2CzQF1ES-TfGuTOeo-udVqOWjWFnDAD38Wzj4u482-TmtpBpCe1N7wdP6BJGXCh0k77-FjxFD6E9IL0kI7Ri97D1zCFEnOIcInsV38KcgEz-sDlyFGCIuc3a6BKgO2O7uyGt1ywvQ7JDVeRTTnw6lARoo7p7dBiDAnmN2T_tuSvrhs7O7JYv3D-6EJAqrARF_tRleHBsv6XwzZDTd9QqLB08hVYr8IAA%3D%3D)**

Peter, we need to make sure that Democrat Senate leader Chuck Schumer fails. Texas voters must teach Schumer and his far-left pals a lesson — don’t mess with Texas! I’m serious: We can’t let him beat us. We can’t let the Democrats take Texas — because if they win Texas our entire American way of life is at risk. name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: A small request this Saturday morning
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
$5 might not seem like a donation that can stand up to million dollar fundraisers at Mar-a-Lago, or $10 million attack ad campaigns funded by National Republicans.
#

We need you to make a $5 donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate, Peter.
Yes, just $5.
$5 might not seem like a donation that can stand up to million dollar fundraisers at Mar-a-Lago, or $10 million attack ad campaigns funded by National Republicans.
But it isn’t just you chipping in $5.
Because by the time you’ve read this far, a ton of people have added their own $5.
People who have Ruben’s back and understand that victory in Arizona is the only way to ensure we hold the Senate and keep extremists like Kari Lake from gaining any more power and influence.
When you join them, these $5 donations can add up fast. And together, we can win in Arizona and stop Trump and Kari Lake.
So, what do you say?
[**If you’ve got $5 to spare, make a donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240518-1-160&t=1&akid=2347%2E734936%2Eo1z43W)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240518-1-160&t=2&akid=2347%2E734936%2Eo1z43W)
Thank you!
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

| Patriot-

---
| Have you heard about Joe Biden's latest move to appease leftist "environmentalists"?

He's ready to trample ALL of our freedom with his out-of-touch nonsense - pushing for _aggressive new EPA rules_ that have very accurately been described as an "electric vehicle mandate in disguise."

**At the end of the day, these rules would limit our ability to buy gas-powered vehicles.**

This is a DIRECT ASSAULT against consumer choice and individual freedom... and it makes ZERO SENSE. _We don 't even have close to the infrastructure to support this pipe dream!_

Today, we want to hear from you: ****What do YOU think about Joe Biden 's electric vehicle mandate?****
---
| | [ LET US KNOW ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97948c2e60b2/1edb97948b57f00e)
---
| The market is rejecting electric vehicles. Joe Biden doesn't care. **These leftists ALWAYS think they know better than the American people.**
We're on the forefront to protect individual freedom and we're grateful for your support.
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin ********

A lot has changed since our first election in 2018, but what has not changed has been my commitment to serving our community.
Whether that has meant standing up to Donald Trump to protect our values or working with President Biden and his administration to deliver progress, I have always led with service for our community at heart.
We have also seen the consequences of the House majority changing from Democratic to Republican, and how that has slowed down progress.
As we learned in 2022, seats like ours in CT-05 are not guaranteed. We will have to outwork our opponent and work to uplift the voices of everyone in our community.
**[That’s why your response to our 2024 election survey is so important. Will you please take a moment to add your response?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85182495/473941916/1440362046?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjcyN2YxYi0yMzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gb9Y0RFGrURDoXvrnIV4BnuutoWwcv1_bI3SWiqEvTs=&emci=6c9b1c0f-2d12-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=6f727f1b-2315-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15529135)**

clean_body: | | Friend — The November election is less than six months away. | A lot has changed since our first election in 2018, but what has not changed has been my commitment to serving our community. Whether that has meant standing up to Donald Trump to protect our values or working with President Biden and his administration to deliver progress, I have always led with service for our community at heart. We have also seen the consequences of the House majority changing from Democratic to Republican, and how that has slowed down progress. As we learned in 2022, seats like ours in CT-05 are not guaranteed. We will have to outwork our opponent and work to uplift the voices of everyone in our community. I am grateful for your support, now and always. Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. | | Would you support a candidate for president who is pursuing an extreme agenda of banning abortion nationwide, taking away healthcare from our families, and destroying our democracy – all while racking up countless indictments for a myriad of reasons? _We know two people running for Senate who would support this (very real) candidate._ **Despite knowing all of this about him, both of our leading GOP opponents in this race have endorsed Donald Trump – and one has even garnered the support of the former indicted president.**[**We have a plan to stop MAGA extremism from creeping into New Jersey, and it starts with you. Will you join us today by making a contribution to help us keep New Jersey blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85182557/473941983/-1197072038?refcode=2024-05-18-opponents&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=70727f1b-2315-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDcyN2YxYi0yMzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BjkDeFk9tldsROTR34ByKMpxy4D8jTTIvxVvL9OWXk=) Donald Trump is the standard bearer for the Republican Party, and by now, we know that most of the GOP candidates across the country running for Senate have sworn a vow of loyalty to him. **Our two leading opponents in New Jersey are no different.** We're in a fight against MAGA extremism in our backyards, and it's a fight we must win. clean_body: Both of our leading GOP opponents endorsed Trump, even after all he’s done. | | | | Would you support a candidate for president who is pursuing an extreme agenda of banning abortion nationwide, taking away healthcare from our families, and destroying our democracy – all while racking up countless indictments for a myriad of reasons? We know two people running for Senate who would support this (very real) candidate. Despite knowing all of this about him, both of our leading GOP opponents in this race have endorsed Donald Trump – and one has even garnered the support of the former indicted president.= Donald Trump is the standard bearer for the Republican Party, and by now, we know that most of the GOP candidates across the country running for Senate have sworn a vow of loyalty to him. Our two leading opponents in New Jersey are no different. We're in a fight against MAGA extremism in our backyards, and it's a fight we must win. With Bob Menendez preparing to run as an Independent, we need the strongest Democrat possible to help mobilize voters this November because Republicans are making a serious play for this seat in what may be a three-way race. Andy has proven he can beat Republicans in New Jersey, and he will help Democrats hold the Senate and win races down the ballot for the general election. = = Team Andy Kim | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Mark Warner
subject: Let’s talk about VA’s history-making Congresswoman, Jennifer McClellan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
today, I’m personally asking if you can split a donation to support her re-election campaign

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85183763/473945416/510429488?refcode=mw_em_240518_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTlkMjkzMC0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlPPxsODjXTrRu5wU98nrav_FF2rupt-6Rfvhcaqnw8=) Derek, In 2022, Jennifer McClellan, a dedicated public servant and good friend of many years, defeated her Republican opponent in the special election in Virginia’s Fourth District. Her victory was not just a personal achievement –**it was a historic moment for the Commonwealth, as she became Virginia’s first Black Congresswoman.** **_[**This year, Jennifer is on the ballot again. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Jennifer’s today to support her re-election campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85183764/473945417/510429488?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=mw_em_240518_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTlkMjkzMC0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlPPxsODjXTrRu5wU98nrav_FF2rupt-6Rfvhcaqnw8=)_** Having worked closely with Jennifer, I can attest to her integrity and her commitment to public service. She has a distinguished record – spanning over 18 years – leading on voting rights, reproductive health care, climate change, and more. When she joined me in Congress in 2022, I knew we were one step closer to building a better future for the Commonwealth. And I was right. I’ve been honored to work with her on a handful of legislation that matters to Virginians, including creating good-paying manufacturing jobs, addressing election mail delivery, and improving health care access, to name a few. **But now, with Republicans holding a razor-thin majority in the House, they’re doing everything they can to take back her seat.** I’m counting on this team to help me send Jennifer, a strong progressive ally that is laser focused on getting to work for her community, back to Congress. She has more history to make. **_[**Your donation, no matter the size, will help give her the resources she needs to win this year and continue her work on behalf of all Virginians. Can I count on you? Split a contribution today >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85183765/473945418/510429488?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=mw_em_240518_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTlkMjkzMC0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlPPxsODjXTrRu5wU98nrav_FF2rupt-6Rfvhcaqnw8=)_** Thank you, Mark Warner ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85183766/473945419/510429488?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=mw_em_240518_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTlkMjkzMC0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SlPPxsODjXTrRu5wU98nrav_FF2rupt-6Rfvhcaqnw8=)****

**The U.S. Supreme Court is about to rule on access to mifepristone — and we need your voice now more than ever.**
Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade, we've seen how far-right extremists are attacking reproductive freedoms across the nation. **They have passed a near-total abortion ban in Florida, which is now in full effect, and are attacking in vitro fertilization, and now the fate of this commonly used abortion pill is in the hands of the ultraconservative Supreme Court.**
There are a lot of lives at stake here, friend. Kirsten is fighting day in and day out in the Senate, calling on the Supreme Court to rule against the challenge and uphold access to mifepristone. **And that's why she urgently needs you to add your voice with hers.**
**We're looking for 25,000 members to sign her new petition before midnight tonight to defend reproductive freedom.****_[Will you sign the petition now to show Kirsten you stand with her and support abortion rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85184132/473946196/222607647?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5043-su-nd&refcode=jtk5043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjdkY2VlMy0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SV2disAWw5IUZm_zT_kBwN4b4tLED5ZZXVKvyKXwwBw=&emci=bae3846b-4d14-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=567dcee3-2515-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=7659029)_**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85184136/473946199/1575385346?code=jtk5043-su-nd&refcode=jtk5043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjdkY2VlMy0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SV2disAWw5IUZm_zT_kBwN4b4tLED5ZZXVKvyKXwwBw=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85184138/473946200/1575385346?code=jtk5043-su-nd&refcode=jtk5043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjdkY2VlMy0yNTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SV2disAWw5IUZm_zT_kBwN4b4tLED5ZZXVKvyKXwwBw=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Ohio Dems
subject: Sign our petition: Protect abortion telehealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
by committing to electing Ohio Supreme Court justices who will fight for our constitutional rights
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85184536/473947003/-702652441?refcode=odp_em_240518_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDdkOWQ0ZC0yNjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tIAdnm5Fm0arJcvSdtCFzLsqE5pjmyJAN230s6Rj6i4=) Team, After Ohio voters passed Issue 1 last year to protect abortion rights in our state constitution, Ohio’s Republican leadership has _**still**_ not removed certain abortion restrictions, including a ban that prevents clinicians from providing abortion medication – including mifepristone, one of the most commonly used abortion drugs – via telehealth. name: Mackenzie For Congress
subject: ICYMI: Fox News Calls out Susan Wild

body:
Susan Wild is finally getting called out for her flip flop on immigration

I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see this: Susan Wild is finally getting called out for her immigration flip-flop.
https://www.foxnews.com/politics/vulnerable-house-dem-flip-flops-immigration-after-dismissing-border-wall-silly

(click graphic to read article)

Susan Wild has made a career out of flip-flopping on the big issues, but her 180-degree turn on the southern border is among the most egregious. It’s a slap in the face to the residents of our district for Susan Wild to pretend that she is tough on the border, as if the last five years hadn’t happened.

Susan Wild is one of the most cynical politicians in Washington. She thinks that she can make you forget about five years of VOTING AGAINST THE WALL and FOR OPEN BORDERS.

That’s why I need your help.

It’s up to us to remind voters of the kind of politician that Susan Wild is — someone who talks about being a moderate but actually votes FOR radical policies that are against the best interests of the American people. We need to remind voters about her disastrous record and call out her flip-flops. I’m going to need your help to do it.

Can you chip in $25 today to help us get this message out?

It’s time that voters meet the REAL Susan Wild.

Over the last few years, the number of Americans registered as political party members has steadily declined.

At the same time, the number of Americans who identify as independents has surged.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

[** _SEND A COP TO THE SENATE_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/WNRaFPZ9e_J7/czBrTzJWbk9FZjdRTlNUSVdtTU9sUy9xcDZQSzUvVmRFNytkL0R2UkxzRDJ4U1Q0UVFHVXV5QkZkSmwxSFdzUFQwYnV1M3ovdjlFSExmeFJiWkhJTU8vVGNNL3VLQlBtNVJMazlOTE1mZlBjYWNkNFVFN2FWZz09S0/) , This National Police Week, we’ve heard a bunch of lip service from the soft-on-crime politicians who won’t lift a finger to really support our law enforcement families. You know how we could really honor the men and women serving within our police departments? _**By helping them do their jobs! By locking up criminals! By paying them what they deserve!**_ That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate against do-nothing socialist Kirsten Gillibrand. Because I’m tired of “all talk, no action” politicians who are hurting New Yorkers’ quality of life. [**_ADD SOME PRO-POLICE BACKBONE TO WASHINGTON_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/KvVycYaZ8qJ8/czBrTzJWbk9FZjdRTlNUSVdtTU9sUy9xcDZQSzUvVmRFNytkL0R2UkxzRDJ4U1Q0UVFHVXV5QkZkSmwxSFdzUFQwYnV1M3ovdjlFSExmeFJiWkhJTU8vVGNNL3VLQlBtNVJMazlOTE1mZlBjYWNkNFVFN2FWZz09S0/)
[** _SUPPORT MIKE SAPRAICONE_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/3m6ZCgz6qLCG/czBrTzJWbk9FZjdRTlNUSVdtTU9sUy9xcDZQSzUvVmRFNytkL0R2UkxzRDJ4U1Q0UVFHVXV5QkZkSmwxSFdzUFQwYnV1M3ovdjlFSExmeFJiWkhJTU8vVGNNL3VLQlBtNVJMazlOTE1mZlBjYWNkNFVFN2FWZz09S0/) I had the honor of serving in the NYPD for 20 years, beginning as a transit officer protecting millions of subway riders. When I was on the job, if we arrested a violent predator, we could be assured he’d stay locked up. But today, thanks to our “revolving door justice system” and Biden’s “catch and release” immigration agenda, police are overwhelmed by repeat offenders preying on innocent people. They know they won’t pay a heavy price for their crimes. It’s a disgrace. And so is the Democrats’ endless Witch Hunt into President Trump. I worked my way up to detective by going after REAL criminals like violent predators and drug traffickers. _**No one ever had me wasting my time hassling political candidates over some paperwork! We focused on ACTUAL police work!**_ [**_BACK THE BLUE_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/0qe4FrDA7yCN/czBrTzJWbk9FZjdRTlNUSVdtTU9sUy9xcDZQSzUvVmRFNytkL0R2UkxzRDJ4U1Q0UVFHVXV5QkZkSmwxSFdzUFQwYnV1M3ovdjlFSExmeFJiWkhJTU8vVGNNL3VLQlBtNVJMazlOTE1mZlBjYWNkNFVFN2FWZz09S0/)

This was by far our best week of _Let 's Address This_, and the momentum continues to grow with literally hundreds of thousands of readers. Every time you open an email, like a post, share a post, or upgrade your subscription--you're advancing this human rights project. Thank you for your trust and support. Here's your quick recap of last week for _Let 's Address This_ with Qasim Rashid:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..j34NpNWURsY7DkfkWjpSMi872PytlxgOq_6UQflFtOk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=144742209)
**Monday**
* [Honest Question: Does Israel Recognize Palestine's Right to Exist?](https://substack.com/redirect/45e858b1-2bcb-42fb-9bae-f31b5f9e5b62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* With the invasion of Rafah, an honest look at history concludes the answer is no--and the horrifying receipts of Israel's opposition are plentiful

**Tuesday**
* [The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 120 - SCOTUS, ICC Prosecution, and Palestine](https://substack.com/redirect/b2133043-db2e-46ac-bc8f-6d537b58b4e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* I make the case to expand SCOTUS, respond to the GOP's ridiculous attacks in the ICC, and share the latest updates on Palestine

**Wednesday**
* [America Has a Child Marriage Epidemic--and it's even worse than you think](https://substack.com/redirect/97f7b571-8077-481c-aaa3-3ea4bf7ef2bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* With more than 300,000 documented child marraiges since 2000, Republicans are fighting to keep it that way

**Thursday**
* [Debunking Hateful Propaganda about Jews & Muslims](https://substack.com/redirect/2a9f2e2a-7cc6-4a37-b96a-251b3b4a66c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* A viral meme claims Jews and Muslims have warred for thousands of years, but the facts prove this myth dangerously false--& the exact opposite as true

**Friday**
* [How Many People Realize Police Have No Legal Duty to Protect Us?](https://substack.com/redirect/9543f6cd-31f4-418e-beed-9235b7b4b523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* This isn't clickbait, it's established Supreme Court precedent, and we need to talk about if we're serious about public safety

**Dad Joke of the Week:** I convinced my wife to let us get a dog, a rare breed that gets sad when you feed it cantaloupe--commonly known as a melon collie.😅
**Finally! Here 's what new subscribers to **_**Let 's Address This **_**are saying about why they 've invested in this human rights project!**

Here's your quick recap of last week for Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid: Monday With the invasion of Rafah, an honest look at history concludes the answer is no--and the horrifying receipts of Israel's opposition are plentiful Tuesday I make the case to expand SCOTUS, respond to the GOP's ridiculous attacks in the ICC, and share the latest updates on Palestine Wednesday With more than 300,000 documented child marraiges since 2000, Republicans are fighting to keep it that way Thursday A viral meme claims Jews and Muslims have warred for thousands of years, but the facts prove this myth dangerously false--& the exact opposite as true Friday This isn't clickbait, it's established Supreme Court precedent, and we need to talk about if we're serious about public safety Dad Joke of the Week: I convinced my wife to let us get a dog, a rare breed that gets sad when you feed it cantaloupe--commonly known as a melon collie.😅 Finally! Here 's what new subscribers to Let 's Address This are saying about why they 've invested in this human rights project! | | ---|---|--- Thank you for your ongoing trust and partnership. Whether you are a new or complimentary reader or a paying subscriber--please know I'm grateful for your support. Have a wonderful weekend and look for our next post Monday morning! name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: The Battle for Wisconsin's Senate Seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Eric Hovde has entered the race in Wisconsin, spending massive amounts to try to flip this crucial seat
---
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-win-wisconsin?refcode=history)
---
| | | |
---
| |
# The Battle for Wisconsin

Tammy Baldwin's GOP opponent is spending millions in the upcoming senate race...
---
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/defendthe5?refcode=img)
---
Wisconsin is a crucial swing state, one of the six big rural states that No Dem Left Behind is focusing on in 2024. Though Tammy Baldwin secured her seat with a double-digit lead last election, this time it's going to be a tougher fight. That's because of massive GOP funding for Eric Hovde. Hovde is expected to use $20 million of his massive personal wealth to challenge Baldwin's seat, and claim seats for MAGA in the Senate. Last election, Republican's spent $77 million in the Wisconsin race for Senate. Eric Hovde doesn't represent Wisconsin. He's been named **one of Orange County's most influential people three years in a row**. He has a $7 million ocean-view villa in California. He has a history of standing against the values which are central to America. Hovde once said that "females, they spend too much time with what's going on in Hollywood." But he doesn't stop at sexism: **Hovde told a crowded room that he was sick of hearing "sob stories" about working class Americans**. He's even refused to pay property tax in Wisconsin. We must do better, and we can secure Tammy's seat this November. But we need your help. [**No Dem Left Behind is organising in crucial rural states to make sure that folks hear our message and understand that the Democratic party stands with Americans all across the country and hears their concerns. Pitch in to help us secure blue seats in the Senate, and keep our representatives safe from big-money MAGA challengers trying to uproot them from their constituents.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlb-win-wisconsin?refcode=hovde)
---

Governor Mark Robinson. [**Chip in now to help Wiley Nickel and me fight back against the far-right in North Carolina.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85186499/473953561/-705119606?refcode=240518-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTdlNzAyYy0yODE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GW5Tib3IHxyXuBmX07H8kcCQWggNUTNtFgjYlqqRnto=) This comes as no surprise. Mark Robinson is one of the most extreme statewide elected Republicans in the country. He’s pushing for a total ban on abortion – with **_no exceptions_** for rape, incest, or for the life of the mother. He’s called educators “wicked people” and “liars.” And he’s touted dangerous conspiracies, claiming the moon landing might be fake and calling a victim of the Parkland shooting a “paid actor.” **North Carolinians deserve a very different future for our state than the one my opponent sees, Peter.** As North Carolina’s next governor, I will fight to protect and restore reproductive freedoms and secure our democracy from those who seek to undermine it. I will work to bring down the cost of living for North Carolina’s families. I will push for more school funding so that today’s students are prepared to succeed. Chip in now to help Wiley Nickel and me fight back against the far-right in North Carolina. | | | = Peter — this weekend, Donald Trump officially endorsed my extremist Republican opponent, Lt. Governor Mark Robinson. = This comes as no surprise. Mark Robinson is one of the most extreme statewide elected Republicans in the country. He’s pushing for a total ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or for the life of the mother. He’s called educators “wicked people” and “liars.” And he’s touted dangerous conspiracies, claiming the moon landing might be fake and calling a victim of the Parkland shooting a “paid actor.” North Carolinians deserve a very different future for our state than the one my opponent sees, Peter. As North Carolina’s next governor, I will fight to protect and restore reproductive freedoms and secure our democracy from those who seek to undermine it. I will work to bring down the cost of living for North Carolina’s families. I will push for more school funding so that today’s students are prepared to succeed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for all you do, Josh Stein = Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

### A View from the Front Line
---
As we approach the 2024 election, it’s easy to feel, as many politicos are saying, that “the fix is in” for November’s election. Inaccurate voter rolls, imprecise election processes, unlawful systems management, and now, the gut-twisting possibility of votes being cast by undocumented migrants who’ve found their way onto voter rolls through one of many social service programs.
It’s a mess. One could even make the argument that, in certain circles, “the fix is in”, because there are those who do intend to exploit the vulnerabilities of our election process.
But they are few. Their circles are dark and misguided. We are many, we are vibrant, and the groundswell is building. There are millions of Americans who are more awake to reality than ever before. Organizations are collaborating to help shore up gaps and build toward more stable processes. It’s working! Good things are happening!
I believe America is on the verge of a renaissance in election integrity - because American voters are demanding it. **We must keep demanding it.**
If you haven’t already, it’s time to roll up your sleeves and engage[ (literally, click on the word ‘engage’ on our website)](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6V7ysAqQAXgttWnfvEts3SZl_TBQsZl6bVwJ6x4wITMICvZ8X0ZG5XbD0C4FqJMIEQACbhxB8KKpUmGppZFn6eeerbW0XYn_kce9sbF1fjtT7ycqODQXj0WiZMZM91vXaCSZfXfp0mbfywYsu4oYGxVlcPzhhmAyDMDChTCR3MfA9QVCbpj7PPk5LN4BlLeX9AKUheuoUi1YBKsXjH3x3BFnSkm4mOtnHPjrfKVHuQ69/46g/910_QneMQpKGoMtkGb3N9w/h2/h001.lLUGHjIeaZCxQp5_bTxeC4L6kOWNAEs6YJpVfFmSfEY). The months between here and November are going to be rough. But liberty is in the rise. Be part of all of it - ever single person reading this message can help. If we stick together and do the work – day in and day out — I like our odds.
Never quit.
Ever onward - Catherine
|
---
### Non-Citizen Voting In November: TTV’s 611 Project Has Answers**** by Wendi Strauch Mahoney

### Just Facts: 10% to 27% of Non-Citizens are Illegally Registered to Vote by Kathleen Murphy
A recent [JustFacts.com](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.7nug4KCxt_xSVJ9GLqPNAm2FwkhXFPVHeLWxFQr1R5WZeEiX5bi-l0K8Ca0qPM3B7lodLJoYqzB2r13o7p0EUuCwXcmgg1argJg6aORa6BCYzyevBsij0-6-icB7-05hz2X85UppYhqlkiGGLVfx5jEjrlkLP9U554QVinFT_zXz445DQ7fj3aWzVwPfH00fLpt8GVsVR4B9dnJ4VkqssgFAwFehC0RzzgD69Qrd1Pc/46g/910_QneMQpKGoMtkGb3N9w/h6/h001.jIEOZ9QwwedW61sLqIgB7XZwpxgVkCWlZBacbF9nNK0) study found that between 10% to 27% of non-citizen adults in the U.S. are illegally registered to vote. The U.S. Census recorded more than 19 million adult non-citizens living in the U.S. during 2022. Given their voter registration rates, this means that about 2 million to 5 million are illegally registered to vote. These figures are potentially high enough to overturn the will of the American people in major elections, including congressional seats and the presidency.
Further, True the Vote's [exposé ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6bNMv11_KSXgepN7Wkk_z6QFTE5Bp2FA14RzZ96qHcwd66j61QX4tM5t7fs7nK3xTSyrDxy16ez8-1DodCqm_rw8V1IKQYx6zOx5kZ-ize7yQn9v7pzxN_m-Wd1XmxsisYmdwusFWtLq0hXp3Lof7LV5N11fwBLZj6CA1xZmgWzzNn3AM7y7Hlyzo28mKTdfdwDozUAMnNprb05F41fUecLAb_CnRQb0uUniWMWLFtjlzP5Gt1mP1pB83xpxb7iXzVc8gnmujX5a1oZxQ6vzw00/46g/910_QneMQpKGoMtkGb3N9w/h7/h001.y5-9N9H-NoRATMnmM8Wph41kpL0SB2whEVaICI5OGfM)on the Voting for Aliens clause [611c3](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4reQG6metMTPwZYb7HrQzwxxNfeZiGfG6EOSX4h6aywV274zgqWut6xBrRwuudBozV-y_mIh2LfQ8qTeEs2GbsNxM5rVclY_6a2YKh2946KdFdc9jJ0YWge8CS_nWXeZ5o4eG0Z5MaDYLFAW532BBVLoyC6-NsD7gqf__eq5pVyij8SGxWsTigxnyYdlFx80GPSzsCSzoE8Ue5XrJwZR7MPMNK1m8355_1APkPP076oU-BJeuG3_gpQy-TvOkDms8A/46g/910_QneMQpKGoMtkGb3N9w/h8/h001.6vT52__Cc-HZ-0_ejUTyqmNSrvQLOcYGXZ3FHhM41V0) reveals that under certain conditions, aliens are not penalized for voting if they merely believe they are citizens.
Critics might dismiss concerns about a “slippery slope,” but history shows that laws often do, in fact, expand beyond their original intent to fit political agendas.
[Read the full article here ...](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.V3w8YMCG4nRbND5mzNN4kDMB-DsSVFFhDy-o1OwWzinbBNQU0nJ1A-yD477xCLdeHeNq9NoHKD2PFVoIr3A2VA12IpzHtmDpgnNecCh9XgAV5nuJq0IBqMaB68Rav5tdzlMXldguRcD3yaGq0mT_X_ycZL6wPFWGr8YRO3uAKXL_65wslx7tEyqk_Uqbyzq1LM7MuGViD5fOcl1qnT22sNB7oZaAaGDd5PEMA0bA_HdEUexoKc8zRIWHByDlihBqeJKnsFby1iicPzYrmt3Sv7-U6YnlN2lZHRHFdUGR_4N9hwdmQnz59_Ti_Xi6LtUF2epdhC5wcaKASBfgkMNS145RoQHFTU86d4hfr7ouuYl_q_OWCQeHX50WD8I95npbLvxAY-ue74dQij-HXiID12qsbR0X5WSCmMbkOc6OdWaD5VhgO9w4v7dUjPVckUDD55NV7H6yMZkusWk-CtVV6_VYP_GpEO8eGLtHohXRtAARvWH-mSD_WaQwYra_xW7UX42KjVAc_eI7o9zrDq7FdJlz8GSSrFvtcJVQEAA-E2Cte94GsHJrZiIbVVeWW0cQZdUOQ0IJQTFQlKdpYNaJnbNx9WUTXKZMZnobtpZkouwGK2JebVGXaBzYVProJfpq2eizzgdUBh5yCGoW604qB-ZZ9Ud7zhVfvGIbsYFyl20pUNOKWGXjaR0xf-MKXxWKHx3in1U4FSL6c8DsR5ixlPbWo2tP_FulF-Pmb1lVDenAUa6VAoS7LsAl8mJbEMXg/46g/910_QneMQpKGoMtkGb3N9w/h9/h001.nvoZvbH78fL5MJAjjmhoiYvU8gGvUP0PMwzMJuBhWtk)

clean_body: We’re all in this together! Stay strong! | | | May 18, 2024 | | | A View from the Front Line As we approach the 2024 election, it’s easy to feel, as many politicos are saying, that “the fix is in” for November’s election. Inaccurate voter rolls, imprecise election processes, unlawful systems management, and now, the gut-twisting possibility of votes being cast by undocumented migrants who’ve found their way onto voter rolls through one of many social service programs. It’s a mess. One could even make the argument that, in certain circles, “the fix is in”, because there are those who do intend to exploit the vulnerabilities of our election process. But they are few. Their circles are dark and misguided. We are many, we are vibrant, and the groundswell is building. There are millions of Americans who are more awake to reality than ever before. Organizations are collaborating to help shore up gaps and build toward more stable processes. It’s working! Good things are happening! I believe America is on the verge of a renaissance in election integrity - because American voters are demanding it. We must keep demanding it. If you haven’t already, it’s time to roll up your sleeves and engage. The months between here and November are going to be rough. But liberty is in the rise. Be part of all of it - ever single person reading this message can help. If we stick together and do the work – day in and day out — I like our odds. Never quit. Ever onward - Catherine | Non-Citizen Voting In November: TTV’s 611 Project Has Answers** by Wendi Strauch Mahoney True the Vote believes non-citizen voting could be game-changing in the 2024 election. In response to the issue, Catherine Engelbrecht’s organization has produced an initiative called the to make Americans aware of non-citizen voting and help citizens** at the grassroots level. | Just Facts: 10% to 27% of Non-Citizens are Illegally Registered to Vote by Kathleen Murphy A recent study found that between 10% to 27% of non-citizen adults in the U.S. are illegally registered to vote. The U.S. Census recorded more than 19 million adult non-citizens living in the U.S. during 2022. Given their voter registration rates, this means that about 2 million to 5 million are illegally registered to vote. These figures are potentially high enough to overturn the will of the American people in major elections, including congressional seats and the presidency. Further, True the Vote's the Voting for Aliens clause reveals that under certain conditions, aliens are not penalized for voting if they merely believe they are citizens. Critics might dismiss concerns about a “slippery slope,” but history shows that laws often do, in fact, expand beyond their original intent to fit political agendas. | Get Plugged In!: Join Us for Lunch and Learns every M,W,F | | Wonder What Your Local Rolls Look Like? Find Out Here 👇 | | New Designs in Stock | | We’ll be back next week with more news and updates. Until then.... Ever onward- Your True the Vote Team P.S. If you can donate to support our work, please do. We are burning the candle from both ends. Thank you for your consideration. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

Your donation can make all the difference between victory or defeat. or keep reading John’s message below if you aren’t convinced. \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: John N. Kennedy Subject: Tighter than a knot in granny’s yarn Folks, this is Senator John Kennedy and I’m as nervous as a duck in the desert. He’s running against Joe Biden’s favorite puppet, a far left-wing gal named Elissa Slotkin. She’s one of the crazies, and even though you probably have never heard of her, she’s one of the worst that the swamp has to offer. Mike Rogers is a good man and he’ll come to Washington to help reel in the radicals. We need him here in the U.S Senate and there’s no doubt about it. Here’s the special sauce that goes into Michigan this year – If we Republicans win it, not only do we get control of the Senate back, but we get Joe Biden out of the White House. That makes Mike’s campaign that much more important to me and you. Look, Friend, I know that these emails are about as useful as a concrete parachute. Maybe it’s big tech hiding our messages or maybe you’re just tired of politics. On that last point, I get it. But I’m hoping I can convince you of just how crucial this is. Katie Britt texted.Mike Pompeo texted.Richard Grenell from the Trump admin texted.Tom Cotton texted.Steve Daines texted.Lindsey Graham texted. And I hate to be putting another message in your inbox that you have to get rid of, but we can’t sit on our hands anymore. Not if we want to take back the Senate and White House! He needs your support as much as America needs him to bring it home in Michigan. Sincerely, John N. Kennedy | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.commailto:mark@convert-digital.com. Don't want to receive these emails anymore? Click Rogers for Senate P.O. Box 132 St. Joseph, MI 49085

name: Marquis Govan, Field Director
subject: Summer in STL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field]
Peter,
It’s summer in St. Louis... and we need to make sure our field team has the resources to keep our volunteers hydrated, cool, and out talking to the voters of MO-01. Plus, the May Day Parade is this weekend and we want to make sure our field team has the tools they need to show out!
You may not realize everything it takes to fuel our team’s outreach efforts. Knocking on doors, registering voters, and spreading our messages takes resources. For example...
$5 buys a pack of pens to sign voter registration cards [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field&amount=5]
$10 buys ice-cold water & snacks for our volunteers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field&amount=10]
$25 helps buy clipboards for our organizers to carry door-to-door [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field&amount=25]
$50 helps train & supply our volunteers with flyers, t-shirts, etc [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field&amount=50]
Needless to say, it all adds up.
From coordinating volunteers, to making phone calls and engaging with the St. Louis community face-to-face, our field program is the driving force behind our movement. It's about building relationships, listening to concerns, and mobilizing supporters to turn out and vote for real change.
And it’s not just about supplies – it's about building momentum. Truly, we believe we’re on track to beat our opponent and his Republican donors – and we’re doing everything we can to get the word out about why we need to keep Cori in Congress.
We just need your support.
We need resources to fuel our grassroots efforts and reach as many voters as possible. We need to print literature, signs, and shirts. All of that requires money. We don’t accept a cent of corporate PAC money; we rely 100% on regular, everyday people like you to fund our grassroots campaign. And now that we're up against far-right billionaires who will spend whatever it takes to try to oust Cori from Congress, we need all of the help we can get.
So, Peter, will you pitch in $10, $15, or $25 right now to ensure we have the resources necessary to run a winning field program? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field]
FUEL OUR WINNING FIELD TEAM! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field]
Let's roll up our sleeves and get to work!
Thank you,
Marquis Govan, Field Director
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftcoribush?refcode=X_051824_field] As a frontline Ferguson activist, a formerly unhoused single mother of two, a nurse, a survivor, and a pastor, Congresswoman Cori Bush knows the struggles our communities face on a daily basis. In 2020, on a mission to save lives, she defeated a 52-year political dynasty; in 2022, St. Louis sent her back to Congress with a strong mandate to champion racial, economic, reproductive, gender, health, and environmental justice.
Now, Cori is running for re-election to continue doing the most for everyone, starting with those who have the greatest need. I wanted to take a moment to extend my deepest gratitude for your incredible support. **Thanks to supporters like you, we've successfully reached our target, bringing us one step closer to our shared goal of flipping IA-01 and taking back the House majority.**

I am profoundly grateful for the unwavering support of our grassroots team. Your commitment and passion are the driving force behind this people-powered campaign, and I couldn't do it without each and every one of you.

**Let's keep up the momentum and flip this seat!**

Thanks so much,

Christina Bohannan

body:
Without the freedom to access reproductive care — be it abortion, birth control, or even IVF treatments — none of our freedoms are safe.
| | |
---

Anti-choice extremists are carrying out a coordinated attack on abortion and contraception access across the nation – **and with the Alabama Supreme Court's ruling giving frozen embryos the same rights as women, even commonplace fertility treatments like IVF aren't safe from their cruel, unscientific crackdowns:**

_This is the same guy who raised Kellogg’s prices 12% last year for no other reason than wanting to line his own pockets._

clean_body: | Folks, we really hate corporate greed. Record-high profits just aren’t enough for companies like Starbucks, McDonald's, and Walmart (and Target, and Verizon, and Amazon, and...). They’re raising prices to astronomical amounts, all while underpaying employees, shrinking product sizes, and not paying their taxes. If you’ve gone to the grocery store, paid rent, or even been to a fast food drive-thru in the last few months then you know exactly what we’re talking about. | Just a few months ago, Kellogg’s CEO Gary Pilnick told hardworking Americans struggling to put food on the table to just eat cereal for dinner to make things better. This is the same guy who raised Kellogg’s prices 12% last year for no other reason than wanting to line his own pockets. We deserve better than cereal for dinner. We deserve better than out-of-control rent prices and insane price hikes. We deserve an economy that works for all of us, not one that caters to corporate greed. | LFG, NextGen America | | = |

name: Jon Tester
subject: My work here is non-negotiable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s planting season here in Big Sandy, Montana.
Hey Derek, hope you’re well.
It’s planting season here in Big Sandy, Montana.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240518?refcode=em20240518&amount=5&refcode2=9014_434096_Irnrlg&akid=9014%2E434096%2EIrnrlg)
Sharla and I have been planting on the same farm for 46 years. Three generations of our family called this land home, and my work here is non-negotiable. It keeps me grounded and I think it makes me a better senator for Montana.
You learn the value of hard work and accountability growing up on the farm. Nothing will get done if you wait around for someone else to do the job. **The key to a successful harvest is hard work during planting season, and Derek, we’re running this grassroots campaign the same way.**
That’s why my team set a [**planting season goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240518?refcode=em20240518&amount=5&refcode2=9014_434096_Irnrlg&akid=9014%2E434096%2EIrnrlg) to help us sow the seeds for a successful campaign. Fundraising this early helps us grow our grassroots strength on the ground.
And we’ll need it. Record-breaking amounts of outside spending are heading to Montana, and going up against their fundraising machine will be the toughest fight of my life. But I know we can win this thing if you step up and join us.
**This planting season, we’re aiming for 10,000 grassroots supporters to chip in before our midnight deadline on Tuesday.[I can’t win without grassroots support, so I’m counting on you, Derek. Will you split a donation between my campaign and John Fetterman to sow the seeds of our campaign and help protect our Montana way of life in Washington?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240518?refcode=em20240518&amount=5&refcode2=9014_434096_Irnrlg&akid=9014%2E434096%2EIrnrlg)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240518?amount=5&refcode=em20240518-9014&refcode2=9014_434096_Irnrlg&akid=9014%2E434096%2EIrnrlg)**
Just like in farming, _you reap what you sow_. If we put in the hard work now, I know we’ll be happy with the outcome on Election Day. Thank you.
—Jon Tester

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240518-9014-footer&t=1&refcode2=9014_434096_Irnrlg&akid=9014%2E434096%2EIrnrlg)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: BY TWO | Patriot, I'm officially losing in the polls, and to catch up, I'm asking Patriots like YOU to step up and help me reach my emergency midnight deadline. | Ruben Gallego (thanks to his Democrat dark money) is beating me in the polls by 2%. His propaganda campaign finally moved the needle. If we don't do something now, this will only get worse. 2% may seem like nothing, but we can't afford to trail behind Ruben. 2% can become 3%, which can become 5%, you get the picture. The further ahead in the polls he is, the more money the left will throw at him, and the more ads he will run depicting himself as a "moderate" despite his 100% radical record in Congress. This is why my midnight deadline is so important. I want to launch a HUGE ad campaign that will show the people of Arizona the TRUTH about radical Ruben Gallego. We can't afford to let Joe Biden keep the Senate and give him another radical ally in Ruben Gallego. They would destroy this country and sell YOU out to the Liberal Establishment in a heartbeat. The road to the Senate Majority and the Presidency runs right through Arizona. I'm counting on your support. Anything and EVERYTHING you could spare makes a HUGE difference in the fight to Take Back America and SAVE ARIZONA! Thank you, Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr’s Weekly Message & Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
"If I win the presidency, everything in this country will change."

|
---
| | | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=1)
---
|

Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Castle Rock, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/castlerock-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=2) \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM
Join us for an intimate reception with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the serene setting of Castle Rock, CO, where you'll enjoy an evening of engaging conversation, delightful hors d'oeuvres, and cocktails.
[Aurora, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-co-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=3) \- Sunday May 19th at 3:00 PM
Catch RFK Jr. in Denver on May 19th for a dynamic rally at The Hangar at Stanley Marketplace. This is a FREE event with an opportunity to join a pre-rally [private reception](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-rally-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=4).
[Austin, Texas](https://www.kennedy24.com/austinweb3?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=5) \- Friday, May 31st at 7:00 PM
Join Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for a private fireside chat discussing blockchain, bitcoin, and Web3 community. Secure your spot for this limited-capacity event and engage in meaningful discussions directly with RFK Jr.
[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=6) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM
Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=7) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
[Glendale, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/glendale-reception-june?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=8) \- Sunday, June 18th at 6:00 PM
Don’t miss this exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at a private venue in Glendale. This special fundraising event includes a fireside chat, Q&A session, and a photo opportunity with RFK Jr.
* * *
RFK Jr.: If I Win, Everything Will Change
If I win the presidency, everything in this country will change.
America has lost its way, drifting from the core values that define our greatness and the high ideals our nation stands for.
I have a clear vision for what America should be—a country that leads by example, not by force.
Inspired by my uncle's aspirations, we will regain our moral standing in the world. I am committed to shifting our focus from projecting military power abroad to prioritizing our economic power.
My administration will revitalize our industrial base, restore the middle class, and make homeownership achievable for this generation.
As president, I will ensure that owning a home is not an unattainable dream but a reality for more Americans, which is essential to foster entrepreneurial endeavors.
My opponents don't want change. They want the status quo. That's why they want to keep me off the debate stage.
**I can win this election to reclaim America. But I need your support to do it.** [Can I count on your continued generosity today?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=9)
[DONATE](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?=&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_5_18_24_all&n=10)

body:
We're making a fundraising push to show Mike Johnson and his allies that PA-08 won't be bought.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85188645/473959829/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mzk0ZmIxMS0yYjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xpeaHR5hXkePQGh3neiAYDjAGooV0ZfgJWoNDI7HrRI=&emci=9879a474-5114-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8394fb11-2b15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

We told you every national Republican has their eyes on this race, and we weren’t kidding: **extremist Speaker Mike Johnson is heading to northeastern Pennsylvania on Monday to throw his weight behind Matt's opponent.**

Johnson's visit isn't just a formality, it's a rallying cry to his base. **We’ve made so much progress under Matt’s leadership, but that could all be taken away if Mike Johnson’s lackey is able to buy this seat.** We refuse to stand idly by and let national Republicans dictate the future of PA-08.

With so much at stake, we need to make our voices heard louder than ever before. That's why we're making a fundraising push to show Mike Johnson and his allies that PA-08 won't be bought.

clean_body: We're making a fundraising push to show Mike Johnson and his allies that PA-08 won't be bought. | Peter, We told you every national Republican has their eyes on this race, and we weren’t kidding: extremist Speaker Mike Johnson is heading to northeastern Pennsylvania on Monday to throw his weight behind Matt's opponent. Johnson's visit isn't just a formality, it's a rallying cry to his base. We’ve made so much progress under Matt’s leadership, but that could all be taken away if Mike Johnson’s lackey is able to buy this seat. We refuse to stand idly by and let national Republicans dictate the future of PA-08. With so much at stake, we need to make our voices heard louder than ever before. That's why we're making a fundraising push to show Mike Johnson and his allies that PA-08 won't be bought. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Jill sweeping the primary!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
She has 204 delegates

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_primary_update_5_18&n=1)
---
Peter, In the last two weeks, Jill has won more Green Party state primaries. As of today, she has swept 21 out of the 21 primaries held so far, bringing her delegate count to 204. **_Jill only needs 211 to secure the nomination so you could say she has it “in the bag!”_**
---
---
We need the Green Party more than ever to challenge the corrupt duopoly. The Democrats and Republicans don't answer to the people but listen only to their donors like the Military Industrial Complex, Wall Street, and AIPAC. The continued support for Israel despite the clear and horrific ongoing genocide Israel commits in Gaza shows that lobbyists control both ruling parties. Jill has always dedicated herself to growing the Green Party to be ready for a time like this where voters would demand a pro-peace, pro-worker, climate action party and candidate. **_Peter, this is our moment, but we can’t keep up the fight without your support! Can you chip in $21 today in honor of her 21 wins and to show you’re still with Jill?_**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?amount=21&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_primary_update_5_18&n=2 "DONATE $21") [DONATE $21](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?amount=21&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gp_primary_update_5_18&n=2)
