name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The PACT Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley turned his back on veterans like me.
#
Peter — I’m a Marine veteran who was exposed to toxic burn pits in Iraq.
**Josh Hawley turned his back on veterans like me by voting to stall the PACT Act,** legislation that expanded healthcare coverage for those of us who were exposed to these toxic pits. Now I’m running to replace him in the U.S. Senate.
So before I ask you to **[add a donation of any amount to my grassroots campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50759?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) please let me share more about why this issue is personal to me and how it has impacted so many of my fellow veterans.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50759?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i)
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and poring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger by blocking efforts to expand health care for veterans exposed to these toxic burn pits.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50759?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i)
What they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country. That’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can get this message in front of Missouri voters and defeat Josh Hawley this November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50759?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50760?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50760?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50760?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50760?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50760?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50760?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/50759?refcode=em20240518-5547&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i)
---
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240518-5547-footer&t=12&refcode2=5547_614464_SEqO5i&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i)**
---

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=5547%2E614464%2ESEqO5i). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: The Nakba never ended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Please sign on today to support my resolution in Congress to commemorate the Nakba, support UNRWA, and support Palestinian refugees’ internationally-recognized right to return. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWtOU0USTXQPkKpAwbQhHW-miy1T3NfJu0mZ0X6x62-JrGRJX-mUfc_ZkwNi0bSf81M58WLAG327X7qf85xy8to__dJVQlZhJ2y8WHQ4nhjlLofq95b-qHj10NQrH3oCmHLlWopbSZC7eOCNmUGFm5Pg/46g/UblbJOdLSBaGDbYlIrL9nw/h0/h001.mdXnnB-YHTGiUx7lEoy5PTQnq7HjQOpLAU3TtmcxR_w)
---
Friend, I just re-introduced a resolution in the U.S. House of Representatives to recognize 76 years of the Nakba (“catastrophe” in Arabic), when close to 800,000 Palestinians were forced from their family homes and their communities as part of the creation of Israel in 1948. **I spoke up on the House floor this week about the Nakba and how it never ended. Israel’s government has continued to steal Palestinian land, ethnically cleanse Palestinians for illegal settlements and segregated communities in the West Bank, and carry out genocide against Palestinians in Gaza.** Most of Gaza’s residents are refugees from the Nakba, and they’ve been forcibly displaced multiple times over the past 7 months during the U.S.-backed Israeli campaign to erase Palestinians from existence. My just-reintroduced resolution promotes better understanding of the well-documented Nakba and supports Palestinian refugees’ internationally-recognized legal right to return to their homes. It also calls on Congress to reinstate support for UNRWA, the main provider and distributor of live-saving humanitarian assistance in Gaza. [**Please sign on today to support my resolution commemorating the Nakba and calling on Congress to reinstate support for UNRWA and support Palestinian refugees’ internationally-recognized legal right of return.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YIS_P_YcOYCCdM10KghjstneG3FaY7b1oheSNp7vGenGRnNhT8oPBux4CyerroXwInvoz-F4ZrGZO6brAN0QQBLTY4u4fsW0gCeWirwha10JK0kbvLCO5U8bh8_eOZY1uTj47fADN4PBmBURO4FfQyYpM_czWrJNeY2GUz6BNyPflGIE2uIQJnwJ1huwFMLyAyFcFDLbCEr7YjOolOmK_duF_733z5O29OiIQ4I5_Nd8xMT-bEeZEcVFlzIrUeOILCn3cegLhHUInB67U22WcGeWSIDj_h1HIZR_j4IGPK_Ka76dnxks_D5NjJD7LqkxnnBA3nw_SZ9JjF-Th6T1JWrgqoIF1PJvZgNPH5CpW-g/46g/UblbJOdLSBaGDbYlIrL9nw/h1/h001.3FPg814NKZxMntflnRrB4XBTTvmV-Q3Jqhxo4R1hf2I) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YIS_P_YcOYCCdM10KghjstneG3FaY7b1oheSNp7vGenGRnNhT8oPBux4CyerroXwInvoz-F4ZrGZO6brAN0QQBLTY4u4fsW0gCeWirwha10JK0kbvLCO5U8bh8_eOZY1uTj47fADN4PBmBURO4FfQCzUV0o0BNL_22rMg7cwZZM42XRI3kCxBJs3fAD0uBGdKKc4eJKLALxHgIzjS4ENYaJp2q-iItRf-c8k5Zny9gIDf5Rx0sq7kXoqrCz5Vny5ScMk9Elb_APcXY4C25cVZkZQLC6LgiMB0iDWj_CYttOCv150W37QkZ0gySX-XsIfNFoZ-HuJ8AqnvcwijNmwMf0-yZmZnSck0hl8-Yetfzg/46g/UblbJOdLSBaGDbYlIrL9nw/h2/h001.wFtLrTOVGAAT-phcj5m8M1AUsEj81yQm3cfjrq-1AtQ)
---
The Israeli government is still bombing Rafah, where it ordered Palestinian civilians to flee. This week, representatives from South Africa asked the International Court of Justice to order Israel to end the attacks on Rafah and to end its military campaign in Gaza.
Experts in international humanitarian law also sent a 100-page report to the UN this week, meticulously documenting the actions of the Israeli government and finding that Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza.
As these legal experts note, Israel has destroyed most civilian infrastructure in Gaza, including homes, hospitals, schools, universities, UN facilities, and cultural and religious heritage sites.
Israel’s government is also blocking much-needed humanitarian aid, bringing the entire population of Gaza to the brink of famine. Other atrocities include recently discovered mass graves with over 390 bodies at hospitals following Israeli forces’ occupations.
Despite these clear violations of international law, the U.S. government continues to arm, fund, and shield Israel from accountability. President Biden is moving ahead with a $1 billion weapons sale to Israel, and most of my colleagues in Congress recently voted to send the Israeli military billions more American taxpayer dollars.
As Israel’s biggest military supplier and funder, the U.S. government has leverage to end this genocide. But too many in our government fail to recognize Palestinians as human beings. That’s one of the reasons why I re-introduced this resolution in the House of Representatives.
[**Can you sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of my resolution to recognize Palestinians’ human rights and educate Congresspeople about the history of the Nakba that led to today’s genocide?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YIS_P_YcOYCCdM10KghjstneG3FaY7b1oheSNp7vGenGRnNhT8oPBux4CyerroXwInvoz-F4ZrGZO6brAN0QQBLTY4u4fsW0gCeWirwha10JK0kbvLCO5U8bh8_eOZY1uTj47fADN4PBmBURO4FfQ0I6kLu9jkiebm-dgHA9fkI_gIZWXo-k708QLNWvDJDr38YkWPu_bjl0NFe8sKJSTnYMGSrw0S0gN-b5O2qAm2TFF_KmGigAkh6Ady9LyInl1K0uUXDyw1lcKqDXYjDg3cysjn6Bsw3Q7AzHH_bca8J5pbEfA4UkTl30vDNx4KYfxadrHzskIskrOQMYAEYacwp81jv3OBElzxNTw9OEiXQ/46g/UblbJOdLSBaGDbYlIrL9nw/h3/h001.bgYhPPjvX6ntDFGuGEgcxmOtoBTd_-BbyzBXy1kEX6M)
Thank you. We honor all the lives lost since the ethnic cleansing of Palestinians began, and we acknowledge the intense trauma that Palestinians have experienced, including the loss of their loved ones and connections to the communities they grew up in. True peace must include the presence of justice.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Wed, May 15, 2024
Subject: The Nakba never ended
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Today is Nakba Day, marking 76 years since the Nakba (“catastrophe” in Arabic), when nearly 800,000 Palestinians were violently forced from their homes during Israel’s creation in 1948. During that period of intense ethnic cleansing, 15,000 Palestinians were massacred and more than 500 villages were destroyed.
**To this day, the Israeli government is still trying to erase an entire people.**
Most of Gaza’s residents are refugees from the Nakba, and they’ve been forcibly displaced multiple times over the past 7 months. In this time, Israeli forces have killed over 35,000 Palestinians in Gaza and have committed many well-documented violations of the Genocide Convention under international law.
Our country is actively participating in this genocide: Most of my colleagues in Congress are still voting to send Israel’s Prime Minister Netanyahu billions more in weapons without any conditions on upholding human rights. And across the country, many lawmakers are trying to criminalize criticism of Israel’s apartheid regime.
**As part of my efforts to humanize Palestinians in Congress, I just re-introduced a resolution to commemorate the Nakba.** The resolution also calls on the United States to continue to support the United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA) and to support the implementation of Palestinian refugees’ internationally-recognized legal right to return to their homes, as enshrined in United Nations General Assembly Resolution 194 and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights.
[**On this Nakba Day, will you sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of my resolution to recognize Palestinians’ human rights and the history of the Nakba?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YIS_P_YcOYCCdM10KghjstneG3FaY7b1oheSNp7vGenGRnNhT8oPBux4CyerroXwInvoz-F4ZrGZO6brAN0QQBLTY4u4fsW0gCeWirwha10JK0kbvLCO5U8bh8_eOZY2XS1Vj2r_eriTYH-uPYpFhQD6VQp4bL81E83dyezl6ZqdLBipHK4cNkpDqwVJaccUlfn39NOgW9hR6JrPFQc0GHyD9Gkq3bHCQOnALLV0lBpN8yT5Sv3U_I9vezqNAUIqs7Rgu_qA4Y2lEtgH-scdDapKNexcar10tqmPkS_87r2xEGpTHWCulnGNIVYEaXidttATh6Fp0ofJUcw7nRgQMWArYkC9Q4Pbso5aHpF4J8w/46g/UblbJOdLSBaGDbYlIrL9nw/h4/h001.4UuoyzStPy3CKYJnFPI88BsETMUPd8p97HAmB4MrhDU)
One refugee from 1948’s Nakba, Mustafa al-Gazzar, is now 81 years old. As a resident of Gaza, he’s been forced to flee multiple times in recent months. He said: “My hope in 1948 was to return, but my hope today is to survive. I live in such fear.”
Because of attempts to rewrite history and to silence Palestinians, Israel’s government is allowed to continue the ongoing Nakba with impunity. For example, the U.S. has skipped and even tried to block prior Nakba Day commemorations at the United Nations.
Last year, the Republican Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives tried and failed to cancel a Nakba event at the U.S. Capitol. But we were not silenced: Palestinian Americans who experienced the Nakba firsthand were able to tell their stories of trauma and survival to a packed, standing-room-only audience.
**We must continue to ensure that Palestinian voices are heard and acknowledged, not only for healing, but also to create an honest pathway for peace.**
The Nakba never ended, as Israel’s government has continued to steal Palestinian land, displace millions of Palestinians, and deny generations of Palestinians the right to live in and even freely visit their homeland. Our country is the largest weapons supplier and funder of Israel’s military, so U.S. residents in particular must speak out against U.S. support for Israel’s genocidal apartheid regime that treats Palestinians as less than human.
Supporting this newly re-introduced resolution is one way to keep educating lawmakers and keep the pressure on the U.S. government to stop enabling and unconditionally funding Israel’s human rights abuses.
[**Please sign on today to support my resolution in Congress to commemorate the Nakba, which also calls on the United States to continue to support the United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA) and to support Palestinian refugees’ internationally-recognized legal right to return to their homes.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38YIS_P_YcOYCCdM10KghjstneG3FaY7b1oheSNp7vGenGRnNhT8oPBux4CyerroXwInvoz-F4ZrGZO6brAN0QQBLTY4u4fsW0gCeWirwha10JK0kbvLCO5U8bh8_eOZY2XS1Vj2r_eriTYH-uPYpFhlAMFPVkWpYc3Ln1g35YvRi3Lv-CyC07HcZA9RZnnV4VEiYn7GcKInk-XR-mTMPq6kmWFfUzX6ZQCM9zviZ93IFqdGKXihbQdFkYfD2lm2V1MiH0iO1ucQbZsyxiHclNjRNbqj5C4NYIS_gObXhusHQtEZzw3DZEJEMtYkGfjxCrjTYQDiUjeUURyQ8cyxDlX6z8OW9dUxIgyf-ZXQb3f5g/46g/UblbJOdLSBaGDbYlIrL9nw/h5/h001.0azXClnbfMumhbAhRYiB2jGsz0XMkAhKWcKxiqCdzsI)
Thank you. Together, we will continue demanding an end to genocide, apartheid, and occupation, while building a world where Palestinians and all people can live freely, with human dignity and equal rights for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Solace Porter, Movement Labs
subject: And that’s how I got here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85190762/473965737/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWUyOWY5NS0yZDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wOZ9vTSvnujf_rSuj5OIcQYIi0Xh-iX-7m9zS9LYtmM=&emci=ccdae635-9e13-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=2ee29f95-2d15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=5534179)
---

| | **There have been so many trailblazers and pioneers before me, it made me wonder: is there anything left for me to do?** That thought came to a screeching halt in the summer of 2020 when demonstrations demanding justice for George Floyd took off, first in Minneapolis, and then across the entire country. Seeing the nonviolent power wielded by concerned communities against sometimes brutal riot police and law enforcement had a profound effect on me. When school got cancelled during the pandemic, I went back to my hometown in New Haven County, CT to get together with friends and peers and see what we could do about the ongoing political tension. In the course of creating a racial equality project together, I got hands-on experience that taught me invaluable skills in fundraising, community organizing, and navigating differing perspectives. When I returned to campus and declared pre-law and politics majors, my coursework cultivated and expanded these interests even more. Moving forward, I sought out every opportunity to complete political research, work on electoral campaigns, and intern for issue-driven nonprofit organizations – one of these internships being with Movement Labs! **Now, I'm here as a full-time employee, helping to grow, build, and sustain a movement making change from the ground floor on up.** [Donate Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85190763/473965738/-327605227?refcode=2024-05-18-solace&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=2ee29f95-2d15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWUyOWY5NS0yZDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wOZ9vTSvnujf_rSuj5OIcQYIi0Xh-iX-7m9zS9LYtmM=) It takes grace, empathy, and fervor to press forward with a progressive agenda, but that's exactly what my colleagues and I are doing and why I'm so proud to be part of this movement. clean_body: | | | | There have been so many trailblazers and pioneers before me, it made me wonder: is there anything left for me to do? That thought came to a screeching halt in the summer of 2020 when demonstrations demanding justice for George Floyd took off, first in Minneapolis, and then across the entire country. Seeing the nonviolent power wielded by concerned communities against sometimes brutal riot police and law enforcement had a profound effect on me. When school got cancelled during the pandemic, I went back to my hometown in New Haven County, CT to get together with friends and peers and see what we could do about the ongoing political tension. In the course of creating a racial equality project together, I got hands-on experience that taught me invaluable skills in fundraising, community organizing, and navigating differing perspectives. When I returned to campus and declared pre-law and politics majors, my coursework cultivated and expanded these interests even more. Moving forward, I sought out every opportunity to complete political research, work on electoral campaigns, and intern for issue-driven nonprofit organizations – one of these internships being with Movement Labs! Now, I'm here as a full-time employee, helping to grow, build, and sustain a movement making change from the ground floor on up. = It takes grace, empathy, and fervor to press forward with a progressive agenda, but that's exactly what my colleagues and I are doing and why I'm so proud to be part of this movement. = It's time to dismantle the barriers holding us back and keeping us down. That's what the progressive movement is all about! In solidarity, Solace Solace Porter Development Associate Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. body:
We’ve been emailing all week because we still need your help. | | |
---
Peter -- We’re running out of options. Since we’ve been emailing you all week about the importance of our mid-month deadline, we were _certain_ that we would reach our goal. Sadly, we were wrong. We fell short of our mid-month goal, and now _we need all hands on deck to get back on track._ At the end of every month, we publicly report how much money we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received. So if our fundraising numbers fall short, _**everyone will know.**_ We can’t risk a humiliating setback like this right as the general election heats up and as Trump receives millions and millions of dollars from his Wall Street buddies. **The majority of our fundraising comes from the small-dollar donations this team has given. So, if we’re going to take on Trump, our only option is asking folks like you to chip in to emails like this one.** [What do you say, Peter? Can you contribute $25 today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29Vzg_q5pjChEPZYR-jcNu0xz-uZZ9obFu-yBn5P87beT2uOobFEvwr4cHAg4qdx59SM7x8McxtvgFX79IDP-qHo3PBFHd7a1DsgI7lHwAhfvEweUV_-5_DKVeMi1t7EzwBpw4w7aXK62BZnihIu0Egp6hv9apOW2LtIDOsLQlQ9PM2OhZxPyctJL2ouOkJ9zI0YgiodyKcK5j4EulnBh8JWxnRHxmjDQ03W3hB9Z5x22-oLrgO--atPfIYO7xMMv7-FsbZcCubkvUoFSoyB-ngk2mFWO8_aii5C7wij-YVPzXCmUr1kDYfg7cWSIFiKr7mO4lxGBDKkHiMZ0n4bhLMcSaMczFR2JlITJiQSQ_Ox_IP7XZLFPMEryXGXldP34chD451LMJzBTixq1lIcE4MmgkmVHXE57xzwFJt462sRgB6whxDlXqWVru_jdoAOtE5DuB7c5WHUxz-mVSapjxpDy/46g/uTn8ag8CSbGma4X79pq2tQ/h0/h001.FrJdq3ymvwkGrYRsQvvAo6V0shXZDfNX_16vWntoCl4) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

The fundraising goals we set each month aren’t arbitrary -- they’re calculations of how much money we need to bring in during every phase of this campaign in order to fund the voter outreach, television advertisements, and more that we know we need to win this race.
Running a campaign of this size is expensive, and while we don’t expect you to donate to every single email we send, we’re hoping you’ll donate to _this_ one. **So, we have to ask:**
[Will you join the millions of grassroots supporters who have already backed Joe Biden and Kamala Harris for reelection by chipping in $25 -- or whatever you can -- today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29Vzg_q5pjChEPZYR-jcNu0xz-uZZ9obFu-yBn5P87beT2m_Twxc9meO6IC1PtNUEBZznecA-gvgdVJl7Pr-aLe6Dc8djTPGZzX90mql0qW7zv1A2BEnhnOgIYQJ1gNPi7RmM5znYHJjPgxMXc7m1l1gZ3pwB90IrL34djfNaJfF289z8vpzkYQKggJCdvzNyjyTKRAxXS02FraaSSNEzIaIt3gdiYbsfdFJ4H_CjFf8JwLObrUQKxTNg962j3r1XM_Dgx2f5B4oA90v2ZmpYOAY6ilffKm_xJPvsH9-eMy_uRXsg4j4R1XFwVolxSfrvwJPI-yYN_vF2UwofegA2C5UukK-C02VasLwtGnimEIfHOiHbgvIkRtkWxdb-QnDem9iR4wW6jF2f0xbU_b5_zd8Apyeywn38k7-GYfmbQ1C2UcdLL7ugidWPIwI9opfZDCMM_qddeU9_DzinOloj7U9i/46g/uTn8ag8CSbGma4X79pq2tQ/h7/h001.ahWRfiUvyrSsBU2X65q1dlbs5Bvghr2s3PbhpJhzSfw)
Thank you in advance for your support. We can’t do this without you.
Team Biden-Harris

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you so much for being a supporter of President Biden and Vice President Harris. But Peter, we don’t want to bother you. clean_body: We’ve been emailing all week because we still need your help. | | | Peter -- We’re running out of options. Since we’ve been emailing you all week about the importance of our mid-month deadline, we were certain that we would reach our goal. Sadly, we were wrong. We fell short of our mid-month goal, and now we need all hands on deck to get back on track. At the end of every month, we publicly report how much money we’ve raised and how many donations we’ve received. So if our fundraising numbers fall short, everyone will know. We can’t risk a humiliating setback like this right as the general election heats up and as Trump receives millions and millions of dollars from his Wall Street buddies. The majority of our fundraising comes from the small-dollar donations this team has given. So, if we’re going to take on Trump, our only option is asking folks like you to chip in to emails like this one. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | The fundraising goals we set each month aren’t arbitrary -- they’re calculations of how much money we need to bring in during every phase of this campaign in order to fund the voter outreach, television advertisements, and more that we know we need to win this race. Running a campaign of this size is expensive, and while we don’t expect you to donate to every single email we send, we’re hoping you’ll donate to this one. So, we have to ask: Thank you in advance for your support. We can’t do this without you. Team Biden-Harris

| Friend,
I want to share with you the Press Release I released yesterday. Bill Foster just voted against Law Enforcement. If you believe we should detain and deport illegal aliens who assault cops, please read this press release below and [help send me to Washington](https://4ghhthgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_-Rn4Unw1rPLg74wzsSkYHK66PwL1Fcr58olNRpeUqKO5Xa18OG02a3YXqaEul8IZhG7THQFoXfneDfOCt3ZGs4IQp7mvj3HPwpqN4s-iZmQfNbcCXEsk5uIQm8J3MusEwGzMRUvePKFaKSjCb5UFP0N5OPgTkDS04yDDB7BERbIXnYbTHL76F0twbz1Ffyiy4IT8wagM-w=&c=bU4sl482hNxlpJLTyiY3prH7n-ajihwV6C_JRPnFApMxdRD3BqpQjg==&ch=u21-_L9927gdidX_S7nPJdHRz9IcLlNlIiCzau_h06FmPisHaJVH-Q==).

---
| WARRENVILLE, IL - Wednesday afternoon, the US House voted on H.R. 7343 the Detain and Deport Illegal Aliens Who Assault Cops Act. Congressman Bill Foster [voted nay.](https://4ghhthgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_-Rn4Unw1rPLg74wzsSkYHK66PwL1Fcr58olNRpeUqKO5Xa18OG02YXbNH7T-VnQRKo6sUkiowDe6c6c3k1T2R7YptsuVFC2pgMktDtZQvMwXoyLR_Ovhn35PwPicV0VoEHrmJoVpq4aocS5qzjRmSPR8OaJjkoOhwQd5_kYadaQU9XoevpD6_NO8S05FllqB57nrqHphGB1vi5jSmru3-QveMj0SGHr&c=bU4sl482hNxlpJLTyiY3prH7n-ajihwV6C_JRPnFApMxdRD3BqpQjg==&ch=u21-_L9927gdidX_S7nPJdHRz9IcLlNlIiCzau_h06FmPisHaJVH-Q==)
"Bill Foster is showing that he is against safety and law enforcement. On Wednesday he voted against the Detain and Deport Illegal Aliens Who Assault Cops Act. In Congress, I will fight for safe communities and support our law enforcement and their safety. Once again, Bill Foster is siding with the Far-Left progressives and against the men and women who put their lives on the line every day to keep us safe. We need strong leaders who will support law enforcement, the rule of law, and make our communities safer," said Evans.

---

You know that running a campaign is a team effort and that no candidate can win on their own. Therefore, I ask you to share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors who wish to join the campaign. name: TammyBaldwin.com
subject: Louis DeJoy must go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2637%2E35263%2EzZPlIJ)
Peter — We wanted to make sure you saw Tammy’s message: Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is harming mail delivery across the country — USPS services that folks rely on for medication, paychecks, and even mail-in ballots. **[Louis DeJoy has done enough harm. It’s time for him to go. If you agree, add your name to Tammy’s petition calling on the USPS Board of Governors to remove him:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2405_USPS_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2637%2E35263%2EzZPlIJ)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2405_USPS_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2637%2E35263%2EzZPlIJ)
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Fri, May 10, 2024
Peter — Across Wisconsin, I hear people express their concerns about the USPS and the future of our postal service while Louis DeJoy remains Postmaster General.
Ever since Donald Trump appointed him in 2020, Louis DeJoy has done everything he can to make the USPS more expensive and less convenient to use. _It’s a shame._
DeJoy enacted massive cuts to postal services, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, and slowed down mail delivery in the months leading up to the 2020 election — when millions of Americans were counting on voting by mail. A federal judge even ruled that DeJoy’s harmful policies right before those elections harmed delivery.
The USPS is a vital service that millions of Americans count on for access to medicine, paychecks, ballots, and so much more — which is why I prioritized passing legislation to improve the USPS.
But it’s clear that only new leadership will be enough to overcome Louis DeJoy’s crusade against the critical services the USPS provides.
**Enough is enough — it’s time for Louis DeJoy to be removed as Postmaster General before he degrades the USPS any further.**
**[If you agree, add your name today to my petition calling on the USPS Board of Governors to remove DeJoy from office as soon as possible:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2405_USPS_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2637%2E35263%2EzZPlIJ)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2405_USPS_petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2637%2E35263%2EzZPlIJ)
---
Thank you for using your voice to bring awareness to this critical issue.
— Tammy

| Republicans poured more than $77 million into Wisconsin’s Senate race in 2022 and won by 1%. They plan to spend whatever it takes to defeat Tammy this year, and we need your help to fight back. **Donate to Tammy's reelection campaign to help her win this toss-up race and defend our Democratic Senate majority.** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=2637%2E35263%2EzZPlIJ)
---

Team — explosive reports from _The Washington Post_ and _Politico_ revealed a disturbing development: Former President Trump allegedly proposed a billion-dollar bribe to major oil company execs at a private dinner. The terms? They bankroll his campaign, and in return, he'd reverse dozens of President Biden’s vital environmental safeguards and enact new tax breaks for Big Oil the moment he steps foot into office. These horrid details have sparked outrage and calls for immediate investigation. Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-MD) and other House Democrats are pushing back — demanding transparency and accountability. Meanwhile, Senator Sheldon Whitehouse (D-RI) and other Senate Democrats are gearing up to bring these bribes into the glaring light of public Senate hearings. **With less than six months until what could be the most consequential election for climate action in history, the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is rallying to ensure these brazen acts of corruption do not go unchecked.** We are committed to supporting leaders who will uphold integrity and prioritize our planet over corporate profits. But we need your voice in this fight. **[Sign our petition today to urge Congress to take decisive action and investigate Trump's Big Oil bribes. This isn't just about one bribe or one election; it's about setting a precedent that we refuse to sell out our environment for corporate gains.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85192340/473968380/1809872562?refcode=ea.1c3eb3d6-2e15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.1c3eb3d6-2e15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjM2ViM2Q2LTJlMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=crfX8ap1qm8TRIAbujDnm_xmbkKzGvcLk4Ut01T48sU=&emci=fb72ee5c-cb13-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=1c3eb3d6-2e15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85192341/473968381/1809872562?refcode=ea.1c3eb3d6-2e15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.1c3eb3d6-2e15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjM2ViM2Q2LTJlMTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=crfX8ap1qm8TRIAbujDnm_xmbkKzGvcLk4Ut01T48sU=&emci=fb72ee5c-cb13-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=1c3eb3d6-2e15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)

Peter — David Schweikert wants to rip the safety net out from under older Americans. Earlier this year, Schweikert’s GOP study committee released its latest proposal to gut Social Security and Medicare. And it gets worse. Schweikert’s plan also includes removing the $35/month cap on insulin, stopping Medicare from negotiating lower drug prices, and repealing the $2,000 out-of-pocket cap. **All of this is because when it comes to priorities, Schweikert would rather protect Big Pharma’s profits than aging Arizonans’ health care.** He’s taken more than $260,000 from the prescription drug industry, and he’ll put them first at any expense. Andrei has worked for over 20 years to lower the cost of Medicare prescriptions, and in Congress, he’ll fight to keep the promise of Social Security and Medicare for every generation. [Can you pitch in $10 or more today to support Andrei’s fight to save Social Security and Medicare? Caring for our elders should be a priority, not Big Pharma profits.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85192976/473970503/695535462?amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUxNjhiZDQtMmYxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ug12Wu7Vi69TvWqzHGE0uFIgKIIMk8kGt6PvHoFOxIg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85192979/473970506/695535462?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUxNjhiZDQtMmYxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ug12Wu7Vi69TvWqzHGE0uFIgKIIMk8kGt6PvHoFOxIg=)

clean_body: Andrei has worked over 20 years to lower the cost of Medicare prescriptions, and in Congress, he’ll fight to keep the promise of Social Security and Medicare for every generation. | = Peter — David Schweikert wants to rip the safety net out from under older Americans. Earlier this year, Schweikert’s GOP study committee released its latest proposal to gut Social Security and Medicare. And it gets worse. Schweikert’s plan also includes removing the $35/month cap on insulin, stopping Medicare from negotiating lower drug prices, and repealing the $2,000 out-of-pocket cap. All of this is because when it comes to priorities, Schweikert would rather protect Big Pharma’s profits than aging Arizonans’ health care. He’s taken more than $260,000 from the prescription drug industry, and he’ll put them first at any expense. Andrei has worked for over 20 years to lower the cost of Medicare prescriptions, and in Congress, he’ll fight to keep the promise of Social Security and Medicare for every generation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States ** | mailto:info@andreiforarizona.com | Paid for by Andrei for Arizona | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U.S. Navy Reserves. name: Tina Smith
subject: National Women’s Health Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, Today is the last day of National Women’s Health Week — but in my book, every week is an opportunity to protect and expand women’s healthcare access. From defending reproductive healthcare and funding research on maternal mortality to improving access to healthcare in rural areas, I’m dedicated to making a tangible difference for women in Minnesota. Too often, women receive inadequate care. And as you and I both know, far-right politicians have been _far too_ invested in what women are doing with their bodies. I’m committed to protecting and expanding women’s healthcare access and quality of care. On the Senate Committee on Health, Education, Labor and Pensions, I’m working with my colleagues — both Democrats and Republicans — to make meaningful strides to improve women’s healthcare. **[If you support my work to improve healthcare for women in Minnesota and across the country, add your name today as a sign of support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85193175/473971023/-993396023?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjk3ZmRlNC0yZjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cxj7mi_7D6Ncmplnf-DSHa8qtm95Lgq0vDko--O_u1M=&emci=fa7ceadc-2f15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b297fde4-2f15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6227932)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85193179/473971055/-993396023?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240518_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjk3ZmRlNC0yZjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cxj7mi_7D6Ncmplnf-DSHa8qtm95Lgq0vDko--O_u1M=&emci=fa7ceadc-2f15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=b297fde4-2f15-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6227932)

Thank you for joining me in supporting women’s healthcare,
Tina

Larry Hogan benefits from the perception that he’s a moderate Republican, Peter, and he’s banking his entire campaign on the hope that voters believe that.

He hopes that you’re unaware that he’s backed by Mitch McConnell and shady super PACs dead set on the GOP taking back control of the Senate.

He wants you to believe that he wouldn’t support a national abortion ban, but can’t say it with a straight face and said that reproductive rights can be “emotional for women.”

He thinks you won’t realize that if elected to the Senate, he’d be a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda.

**But he’s wrong, Peter.**

This grassroots team is not only going to outmaneuver and out-work him at every turn, but we’re going to make sure every single voter in Maryland has a clear, accurate picture of just what kind of senator Larry Hogan would be.

**[I need your help getting Angela’s general election campaign underway with a massive groundswell of grassroots support, which is why I’m asking: Can Angela and I count on you to become one of her 10,000 Founding Donors by splitting a donation between her campaign and The Collective PAC today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqskv9NQB2VWDB7dxl6GOAMoQ8QSK-cusxzfDRo34i8XZPkZ5xQt6hV_J7RykjvkCqMg2lVmyV8ql3B8F-zX0-Vkr7aIdIdx5G-x-19yrDDQbiJcgavA1Cs7RbB_8F7Cf46Ug2QQxde7KRbzGMTPMh_R0Gu-gQi9Ga19E0d5c0Y9wONGkINca90XX9_J2AKJLTX60jIsDCCsAxOQRAdAAcSvCQbIKmysBIxROt5Zlsr8AhCCp8WoR4xiJT4uCJHtN7f5-jDNSFNk_m7_nOHqllL_l64JT_ve6RybPZaGqGnljn5lGPkT94N_f1E-A1ft9lSX-XjGeADZDyIqbi3gmPeXyuENcFvRsIISQszRuB8l2ncAVRaKC68zsi6wP89tCrS47iTIYEGg2TrUkvBRTpdzrl2iM7i18ouAwlOzmOj69A/46g/HzQf6JdiTLqQ4eK2g8g_zQ/h4/h001.cV15nv6XmdBVcOoW3BlHwrKWp_sbgtm62y3RYC5bpRM)**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Marylanders turned up in droves to make their voices heard in the Democratic Primary, and delivered a clear, decisive message: Angela Alsobrooks is the right choice to represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate. But if you think that defeating Republican Larry Hogan is a foregone conclusion solely because Maryland is a blue state, think again, Peter. It’s going to take you, me, and every other person who made up Angela’s winning coalition in the primary — and a whole lot more — to defeat Larry Hogan in November. | | Larry Hogan benefits from the perception that he’s a moderate Republican, Peter, and he’s banking his entire campaign on the hope that voters believe that. He hopes that you’re unaware that he’s backed by Mitch McConnell and shady super PACs dead set on the GOP taking back control of the Senate. He wants you to believe that he wouldn’t support a national abortion ban, but can’t say it with a straight face and said that reproductive rights can be “emotional for women.” He thinks you won’t realize that if elected to the Senate, he’d be a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. But he’s wrong, Peter. This grassroots team is not only going to outmaneuver and out-work him at every turn, but we’re going to make sure every single voter in Maryland has a clear, accurate picture of just what kind of senator Larry Hogan would be. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Let’s show Larry Hogan, Mitch McConnell, and their corporate backers that Marylanders are paying attention and we’re not going down without a fight. Thanks, Governor Wes Moore The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Speaker Johnson coming to our district.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
We just got word that Speaker Mike Johnson is coming to Peoria in a few weeks to support my extremist MAGA opponent, Joe McGraw.

[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/z5SbjGK4fqaUV_u7taGZZQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoK1ZmP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZkZ_0UhmT0MvxlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Hi Peter, I hope your weekend is off to a good start. **We just got word that Speaker Mike Johnson is coming to Peoria in a few weeks to support my extremist MAGA opponent, Joe McGraw.** I can’t say I’m surprised – after all, I had the narrowest victory of any Democrat in the Midwest in 2022 and IL-17 is dead-center on the road to Republicans keeping their majority. Speaker Johnson has named me to his top-ten target list, pledging to raise millions against me and already, my opponent has received the fifth-largest investment from Speaker Johnson’s fundraising operation. [**We beat outside spending from national Republicans last cycle, and together we can do it again. Contribute $5 today to secure our critical frontline seat.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wn52HZAil-GVDaRAoGxw3Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoK1ZmP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_) | ****[Donate](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wn52HZAil-GVDaRAoGxw3Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoK1ZmP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_)****
---
While having millions of dollars raised into negative TV ads is never good, I’m actually glad Speaker Johnson is coming to Illinois. It’s important for extreme politicians like him, who’ve led Congress into chaos over the past year, to be in communities like Peoria, that are impacted by Congress’ dysfunction and inaction.
In the last year, I’ve worked hard and despite the chaos, brought home millions in funding for Peoria to build more affordable housing, improve sidewalks, and replace aging water lines. **Still, there is so much more good we could do if we had a Congress that actually works.**
If Speaker Johnson wants to take some time away from fundraising against me and, instead, sit down and discuss how we can make life better for Peorians, I’ll be happy to grab a coffee or a beer. I know some good spots!
**But, Peter, I’m not holding my breath, so instead I’m going to work as hard as I can to make sure, come January, we have a Democratic Speaker who will help me make life better for my neighbors in Central and Northwestern Illinois. That means holding onto this seat and taking back the House.**
[**I hope I can count on you to join me, Peter. If you’re in, chip in $5 to restore a functioning House.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/wn52HZAil-GVDaRAoGxw3Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoK1ZmP0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_)
Thank you,
\- Eric

clean_body: We just got word that Speaker Mike Johnson is coming to Peoria in a few weeks to support my extremist MAGA opponent, Joe McGraw. ~ | | Hi Peter, I hope your weekend is off to a good start. We just got word that Speaker Mike Johnson is coming to Peoria in a few weeks to support my extremist MAGA opponent, Joe McGraw. I can’t say I’m surprised – after all, I had the narrowest victory of any Democrat in the Midwest in 2022 and IL-17 is dead-center on the road to Republicans keeping their majority. Speaker Johnson has named me to his top-ten target list, pledging to raise millions against me and already, my opponent has received the fifth-largest investment from Speaker Johnson’s fundraising operation. | ** While having millions of dollars raised into negative TV ads is never good, I’m actually glad Speaker Johnson is coming to Illinois. It’s important for extreme politicians like him, who’ve led Congress into chaos over the past year, to be in communities like Peoria, that are impacted by Congress’ dysfunction and inaction. In the last year, I’ve worked hard and despite the chaos, brought home millions in funding for Peoria to build more affordable housing, improve sidewalks, and replace aging water lines. Still, there is so much more good we could do if we had a Congress that actually works. If Speaker Johnson wants to take some time away from fundraising against me and, instead, sit down and discuss how we can make life better for Peorians, I’ll be happy to grab a coffee or a beer. I know some good spots! But, Peter, I’m not holding my breath, so instead I’m going to work as hard as I can to make sure, come January, we have a Democratic Speaker who will help me make life better for my neighbors in Central and Northwestern Illinois. That means holding onto this seat and taking back the House. Thank you, \- Eric If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:____ ~~ | ~~ ---|--- ~~ | ~ ~ | ** | Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois. Eric Sorensen for IllinoisPO Box 1172Moline, IL 61265United States ~ "Website"•~ "Privacy Policy"

subject: NEW SENATE POLL: Dead-heat in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1446%2E135344%2E_wTcTn)

Friend,
We just got new polling on the race for U.S. Senate here in Michigan, and I wanted to make sure you saw it. Bottom line: We are in a statistical dead-heat against one of the leading Republicans, Mike Rogers -- with a ton of Michigan swing voters still undecided.
Elissa Slotkin: 39.8%
Mike Rogers: 36.8%
Undecided: 23.3%
Polling is a notoriously fickle science, especially since it’s still early, but this data underscores a fundamental truth: Michigan is a swing state, and swing states have a tendency to...swing. Despite Democrats’ success in receny years, we know it can flip red under the right conditions.
So in light of this new poll, I want to ask if you’ll consider making a $3 contribution to my campaign.
$3, because we are in a statistical tie against a Trump-endorsed candidate.
$3, because Democrats only have a 51 seat majority in the U.S. Senate, and with Joe Manchin’s retirement and a likely flip in West Virginia, we need to hold onto this seat for Democrats to retain control of the body.
$3, because our race is the top of the ticket in Michigan -- which means what happens will likely have an impact on the presidential race here as well.
$3, because more than 1 in 5 voters are undecided in our race, and we need to be able to talk to those voters in all 11 of Michigan’s media markets.
I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, but there are less than 6 months left until Election Day and contributions from people like you in response to emails like this represent the bulk of the money we raise -- which means your support is critical to getting us over the finish line.
[**So will you consider chipping in $3 to my campaign today?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-may24.waY6cu&refcode=em240517-1-LA&t=2&akid=1446%2E135344%2E_wTcTn)

| | Have you filled out your ballot, Peter? **Ballots must be received at any County elections office in Oregon or Official Ballot Drop Site location by 8:00 p.m., Tuesday, May 21, 2024, or postmarked by Tuesday, May 21, 2024.** [Find a ballot box](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85195581/473976667/719410068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFhMDZlNC0zMjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGx2JEuJrYNTS38HFEjearbI0XA37oWznMzItaWaTlk=&emci=578cf424-b313-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=cf1a06e4-3215-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=29359352) **Be sure to read up on these ballot measures before you cast your vote:** [**Oregon Zoo Bond – Vote YES**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85195583/473976669/1909905460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFhMDZlNC0zMjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGx2JEuJrYNTS38HFEjearbI0XA37oWznMzItaWaTlk=&emci=578cf424-b313-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=cf1a06e4-3215-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=29359352)
This bond will pay for $380M in improvements that will protect animal well-being (penguins, giraffes and more), strengthen educational opportunities, improve conservation and sustainability work, and make the Zoo more easily accessible for all ages and abilities. **This bond measure does not raise taxes.** Our community needs to continue to invest in the Oregon Zoo – our state's number one attraction – not just for conservation, not just for education, but to bring tourism back to our region, and specifically downtown Portland. [**Multnomah County Measure 26-243 – Vote YES**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85195585/473976671/1384995284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFhMDZlNC0zMjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGx2JEuJrYNTS38HFEjearbI0XA37oWznMzItaWaTlk=&emci=578cf424-b313-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=cf1a06e4-3215-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=29359352)
This measure will protect North Portland businesses, the airport, and residential neighborhoods by upgrading levees, floodwalls, water pumps, and natural floodplain restoration. The levee was erected over 100 years ago; if it fails, the flood could release toxic chemicals, raw sewage, and other hazardous materials into rivers and streams, and damage homes and businesses. Without the levee improvements, flood insurance may not be available or affordable. Thanks to a federal matching funds program, an average homeowner in the district would pay just about $26.27 a year on property taxes – if we approve the measure quickly. Time is running out for accessing the funds. Now is the time. [**Portland Measure 26-245 – Fixing Our Streets gas tax renewal — Vote YES**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85195587/473976673/-1179932991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjFhMDZlNC0zMjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UGx2JEuJrYNTS38HFEjearbI0XA37oWznMzItaWaTlk=&emci=578cf424-b313-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=cf1a06e4-3215-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=29359352)
This measure would extend the City of Portland's gas tax for four years to pay for maintenance and safety projects throughout the city. Maintaining and improving current transportation infrastructure not only makes our communities more connected and livable, it also makes streets safer for pedestrians, drivers, and cyclists. **Looking for additional perspectives? Peter, did you see: The latest New York Times poll shows David McCormick surging to within the polling margin of error among likely voters.
**Bob Casey (D): 46%**
**David McCormick (R): 44%**
_Source: Likely Electorate Cross-Tabs: May 2024 Times/Siena Poll of the Presidential Battlegrounds_
**[With the Senate majority hinging on PA, rush a donation to help keep PA and the Senate blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-2?refcode=em20240518-2&refcode2=2988_552475_UctVhP&akid=2988%2E552475%2EUctVhP)**

This comes after a billionaire-funded GOP super PAC launched a $4 million ad buy in Pennsylvania, giving McCormick a major boost.
There’s no math that keeps Democrats in the majority without winning here in Pennsylvania. But McCormick is exactly where he needs to be to flip this seat (and the Senate) red in November.
**[If we’re going to re-elect Bob and defend our Senate majority, we need a surge of donations today. — Team Casey

Peter – It’s time to take back the Senate from Chuck Schumer’s grip, and we’re gonna do it with Bernie Moreno in Ohio. He’s a Republican firecracker with a heart of gold and a passion for this country like you wouldn’t believe.

_**Now, let me tell ya about his opponent, Sherrod Brown.**_ This fella has held elected office since bell-bottoms were cool. He’s been a rubber stamp for Biden’s disastrous agenda and is about as sharp as a marble.

_But here’s the real kicker_ – he’s been raking in **MILLIONS** of dollars courting Hollywood elites and billionaire bigwigs to stay in power, and it’s working.

But enough of me blabbering on – [**hit play on Bernie and me instead.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8244ad174671487fb3a166883676dce9&_e=erOZmL8LSIYWpuaYLuo-VvAriXwh-QScF5v59MmoSLhlDowUlpm0dsb9Lf6KKMf23sqHdc6kHWjofxpZDuX7-hjrMKirPQChbw7JWmUUREHbQLH8mRiI-f9SfGtXQe_nXUrywBJiv9PFMNQbML7KJjcTNGjcdlL8PPPkX4mlP5-unN453W46wT6b5BLnVKXNGI10PV3PTScZezVxiXQXhPXVphPuYZl0npNVl3wWosMOS0q3YU8EwQ8qR1Ig40gLOd-j6prNmCwHjc9Qe_EmAqUVgldnpqDcpmSrOQPFNdDRsnE7MwMQrKBaOjWNSw7vlDNJz-c5BIJA4BtJGoeMqvHXKjKEla9h-ASpP7ReQP-pMfCTHBY5PbX7K64q_mVeFVSK7BaqIlgWi7oYH3-_7MxCCif_ERQoiwUNgr29Jyw%3D)

Senator John Kennedy

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8244ad174671487fb3a166883676dce9&_e=erOZmL8LSIYWpuaYLuo-VvAriXwh-QScF5v59MmoSLhlDowUlpm0dsb9Lf6KKMf23sqHdc6kHWjofxpZDuX7-hjrMKirPQChbw7JWmUUREHbQLH8mRiI-f9SfGtXQe_nXUrywBJiv9PFMNQbML7KJjcTNGjcdlL8PPPkX4mlP5-unN453W46wT6b5BLnVKXNGI10PV3PTScZezVxiXQXhPXVphPuYZl0npNVl3wWosMOS0q3YU8EwQ8qR1Ig40gLOd-j6prNmCwHjc9Qe_EmAtCPSWIdc-GVtH9Z016CLjb_TtvHeeijIxSYWSmAekSNhBasnyZ-0SgnyRu_j0dcx6DxS2OyZOf1eZaUaYQ97VKVmv1tCG1ro1nvFcLaJqCo3OQA4DyukGrs1suAgxWFmP8MPnl2zWahup_OEGg_Umk%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

name: Team Swalwell
subject: another one bites the dust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Trump can’t even catch the support of those who worked closest with him in the White House |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85196693/473979948/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTEwYTZiMy0zNDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dHqbGoDl7p3FgPuM31290QF3k4qV1urfofhVqIm-4Uo=&emci=30c564bf-6214-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=2910a6b3-3415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=7878003)
Friend, We’ve seen many people turn on Trump (rightfully so) over the past couple of years. **It’s almost as if the ones who worked closest to the former failure-in-chief are the ones sounding the loudest alarm!** Another former White House aide under Mark Meadows, _**Cassidy Hutchinson, spoke about being open to voting for Biden this November.**_ Add her name to the list of people from the Trump camp who have turned their back on him!
| [STOP MAGA »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85196694/473979949/1496393311?&refcode=E8526-20240518-WHResend-SB-Trump&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTEwYTZiMy0zNDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dHqbGoDl7p3FgPuM31290QF3k4qV1urfofhVqIm-4Uo=)
---
Look, we have to wonder: Who’s even on this guy's side anymore? But former elected officials speaking out against Trump won’t do much to shake his base. In fact, we know it only adds to their rage over the “liberal witch hunt” that's after him. _**Our only way to beat Trump this November is at the ballot box, with grassroots supporters like you on our side.**_

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Please read this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, please read this.
1. Experts say our race could decide Senate control – and the latest polls show me neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent.
2. Republicans are ALL IN to flip this seat and the Senate red. They've spent more on fall ad reservations in Ohio than any other state, and we're officially being outspent.
3. Our grassroots campaign is falling short of the resources we need to close the spending gap, fight back, and win.
Being outraised and outspent could cost us this race and the Senate, so we're counting on a surge of grassroots support ASAP. Please, will you split $20 between my campaign and Serve America so we can pull ahead, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
Thank you,
Sherrod

name: Rick Scott
subject: Are you a part of the “silent majority”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

For years, they called us the silent majority. They said we’d never make a difference, and we would sit back and accept the socialist takeover.

And then, we decided we couldn’t stay silent anymore.

**We elected President Trump in 2016 and changed the way Washington worked.**

DC’s corruption was put to an end and politicians finally started working for you instead of themselves.

---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: I’m not spineless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=83a6a5c1770345b1a5f9e8c5a4a0311c&_e=y16Xb6t_xjYQd6JuCgcQE-TAJLiJJADBG98c9k6zX9ROqQWmo_XNlp5lU4BQKSkrpcoyl3-Clz0OsvKSFS-HpQfllCyMMyzVKww1LTO5SogA4P8i40CuaCoWZNHVWWp7rmbYdBFcER-xdYJIMWV_f7O5a_xQY8v3iSkdNh7Q0qkqKJC_-RXPAZDcxgm_Jt9dAwX6APDSS9g4_DGYOkp-Pch3g1W3kgbk0pyB-EHsfo-uavgmYypuVi--ZhxgJ18f88w5FKPIcwipga6wJ2UVP1qBWr_tTrKgBpjk5rdcnS0ExWnOAGGn5WDG62TeGfJ1FtGp22kexsBxkKCa2BgR2A7nODn7KfWB_UJRqrNpWHZNBTAGGY_aEnsSJZfL7FfV)

Peter, I’m not some spineless politician. I won’t cave to the radical Left.

You deserve someone who will fight for you and our shared values, and in DC, that’s hard to come by.

Too many politicians today spend more time bumping elbows with lobbyists at fancy dinners than they do serving the people who elected them.

_**Not me. I work for YOU. I work for the PEOPLE.**_

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: It’s official: I’ll be facing Republican Larry Hogan in Maryland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
| Peter, it’s official: I just won the Maryland U.S. Senate Democratic primary and will be taking on Republican Larry Hogan in November.

Make no mistake, Larry Hogan won’t be easy to beat. He was handpicked by Mitch McConnell and his MAGA allies have already started pouring in millions of dollars to defeat me.

**The GOP’s plan to take back the Senate majority hinges on Maryland.** That’s why I need your help stopping them starting right now.

[_**My team has a 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal that we must hit within the next week to have the resources to start the general on the right foot. Will you chip in a split grassroots donation right now between my campaign and Fight for Progress to become a General Election Founding Donor?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85197429/473981900/643920943?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNDcxOTMyLTM2MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O87sBf9VG7fai-0JBPSnYwITdhjjM1tcAOuDiEx4FGA=)
---
| [RUSH A DONATION ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85197430/473981901/643920943?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNDcxOTMyLTM2MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O87sBf9VG7fai-0JBPSnYwITdhjjM1tcAOuDiEx4FGA=)
---
As Prince George’s County Executive and a former state’s attorney, I’ve spent my career fighting on behalf of Maryland families. In the Senate, I’ll be a strong voice in support of abortion rights, equality, education, and economic opportunity.

But, my Republican opponent Larry Hogan? He’s working against our Maryland values.

As Governor, he vetoed a $15 minimum wage, common sense gun legislation, and access to increased reproductive and abortion care in Maryland.

On the campaign trail, he has continually flip-flopped on the issues because he’s afraid to stand up to his party. He’s even called access to reproductive care an “emotional issue for women”.

The simple truth is this: Mitch McConnell is banking on flipping this seat and using Hogan’s vote to pass a national abortion ban, destroy Social Security and Medicare, and give tax breaks to MAGA big money donors.

I look forward to making sure every Maryland voter knows just how dangerous Larry Hogan would be in the U.S. Senate. But, we need resources immediately to start putting his feet to the fire.

[**_We just have 6 months to win this race, so we need your help ASAP. Will you split a donation of $25 between Fight for Progress and my campaign to become a General Election Founding Donor and defeat Republican Larry Hogan in November?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85197431/473981902/643920943?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQyNDcxOTMyLTM2MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O87sBf9VG7fai-0JBPSnYwITdhjjM1tcAOuDiEx4FGA=)

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: A trojan horse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats incumbents Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman are both facing
primary challenges this summer, and their opponents have one key thing in
common: their campaigns are being bankrolled by Republican megadonors.

Conservative career politician George Latimer is trying to unseat Jamaal
in New York’s 16th district, while prosecutor Wesley Bell challenges Cori
in Missouri’s 1st district. They’ve both taken money from AIPAC and its
dark money network, mostly fueled by the same GOP millionaires and
billionaires supporting Donald Trump and other Republican candidates.

As Cori pointed out on Twitter, these so-called Democrats are being used
as a trojan horse to let far-right extremists influence our Democratic
primaries in hopes of removing two of the most progressive leaders in
Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240518.d-FJoe&refcode=em20240518-34859&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34859%2E1203867%2E1uQhU8 ]Tweet from Jamaal Bowman: There’s only candidate on this stage endorsed
by @PPact. #NY16 Tweet from Cori Bush: And make no mistake: the other is
being used as a Trojan horse for far-right billionaires and anti-abortion
extremists. But from the Bronx to St. Louis, we won’t let them Win.

Your donors reflect your values. While Latimer and Bell take money from
anti-abortion and pro-insurrectionist Republicans, Cori and Jamaal’s
campaigns are powered by regular, everyday people like you — and that’s
exactly who they fight for in Washington.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240518.d-FJoe&refcode=em20240518-34859&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34859%2E1203867%2E1uQhU8 ]Justice Democrats is doing everything in our power to ensure Cori and
Jamaal defeat these wolves in sheep’s clothing this summer. Fuel our work
with a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to
help us win!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240518.d-FJoe&refcode=em20240518-34859&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34859%2E1203867%2E1uQhU8 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240518-34859-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34859_1203867_1uQhU8&akid=34859%2E1203867%2E1uQhU8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34859%2E1203867%2E1uQhU8

name: Team Thompson
subject: It’s time to Rock the Ride!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | **Peter- Mark your calendar!**

**Saturday,** **June 22nd** is the seventh annual **Rock the Ride** , a benefit ride and walk for gun violence prevention.

Rock the Ride is a dedicated platform that aims to raise funds in support of local and national organizations committed to putting an end to gun violence in our country.
**_[Click here to register for this year’s ride and walk →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85197849/473983153/-12907531?source=EM_NBI_MT_20240518_OT_RocktheRide_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWEyYmFmMS0zNjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFO3vcCm6meMwQjXg7-AEnoFIO_xDQfV6vvfa7QMIo0=&emci=aa2a61ec-5711-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bea2baf1-3615-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2678920)_**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85197852/473983154/-12907531?source=EM_NBI_MT_20240518_OT_RocktheRide_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWEyYmFmMS0zNjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFO3vcCm6meMwQjXg7-AEnoFIO_xDQfV6vvfa7QMIo0=&emci=aa2a61ec-5711-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bea2baf1-3615-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2678920)
As an avid cycler and advocate for gun violence prevention, Mike is proud to lead the ride and is hoping for the biggest turnout yet.

Mike is a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, so he knows firsthand how important it is that firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings.

While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved!

**_[Join Mike on Saturday, June 22nd to raise awareness and foster a sense of community around this critical issue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85197853/473983155/-12907531?source=EM_NBI_MT_20240518_OT_RocktheRide_0_3MO_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRide2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWEyYmFmMS0zNjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GFO3vcCm6meMwQjXg7-AEnoFIO_xDQfV6vvfa7QMIo0=&emci=aa2a61ec-5711-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=bea2baf1-3615-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=2678920)_**

name: VoteVets
subject: Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
It’s a day where all of us at VoteVets take some time to remember the ones who never came home and honor their memory. We pull down our events, our fundraising, our advertisements. Memorial Day is about them, and everything else can wait.
#
Derek, Memorial Day comes in just a few days.
It’s a day where all of us at VoteVets take some time to remember the ones who never came home and honor their memory. We pull down our events, our fundraising, our advertisements. Memorial Day is about them, and everything else can wait.
Memorial Day also comes during what would be our end-of-month push towards our May deadline. In an election year where we’ve already committed millions of dollars and will spend millions more on critical advertising across the country, taking that time off has a cost.
So, before we get to Memorial Day, we’re hoping that you might get your donations in a bit early this month. We hope that, because we are working against a man who — at every opportunity — has attacked what the fallen fought for.
He would tear down the Constitution. He has insulted the men and women who gave the ultimate sacrifice. He is a walking, talking National Security threat. We have to make sure we do everything we can to prevent him from regaining the power he lost in 2020.
It’s why your donation to VoteVets is so important. And it’s why we’re asking you, respectfully:
[**Make a $5 contribution to VoteVets today. We’d be honored to have your support.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-may24.RUuZX0&refcode=em240518-1-30&t=1&akid=25125%2E3013755%2E9FzNxh)**

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Join Us Today to Activate & Organize for West-Abdullah 2024!
body:
Drs West & Abdullah live today! Watch virtually or find a local watch party near you.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=1)
---
---
Dear Peter, We are thrilled to invite you to a significant event in our campaign – the "Activate & Organize: Coast to Coast for West-Abdullah 2024" nationwide watch party, happening **today, Saturday, May 18th, at 12 PM PT / 3 PM ET.** This rally is a moment of national mobilization, bringing our campaign directly to you and empowering each of us to make a difference. **Event Details:**
* Date: Today, Saturday, May 18th
* Time: 12 PM PT / 3 PM ET
* Location: Click the link below to register for the event. You can join one of our many watch parties all over the nation or watch online!

---
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/westabdullah?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=2 "REGISTER FOR THE EVENT") [REGISTER FOR THE EVENT](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/westabdullah?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=2)
---
---
**West/Abdullah 2024 Key Policy Points & Justice Pillars:**
* Economic Justice: Ensuring a living wage and fair economic practices for all.
* Education Justice: Investing in public education to serve all children equitably.
* Environmental Justice: Addressing the urgent climate crisis with sustainable solutions.
* Health Justice: Implementing a healthcare system that guarantees access for everyone.
* Transformative Justice: Overhauling the system to eliminate systemic racism and promote fairness.
* For this and many more, [click here](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/platform?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=3) to review the full justice platform.

---
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/westabdullah?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=4)
---
**ABOUT THIS EVENT** If you've ever been curious or felt called to contribute to a greater cause, let this be your call to action. Come and watch our Brother and Sister, Dr. Cornel West and Dr. Melina Abdullah, as they paint a vision of what this campaign can accomplish—with YOUR help
---
**Your Impact:** Your presence and participation are crucial. Share this event with your friends, family, and network to maximize our impact. Every voice counts; together, we can build a movement that transforms our nation. **Spread the Word:** Use this [social media toolkit](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=V9GgiCHyRlcKopaFZlYpJ7yZdWakI41WOFq4RnBu99E32PMtrjXRxk137gbzSP5wxoE_2xGHVHClIOATeWcMyc7U7h4sHvtODMSETLv4i4reiokL9hfSDSTUwYk4TWbit2xMTbXw_PEDXa2-9tIRWQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=5) to share the event on Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok, and other platforms. Encourage your network to join and support our campaign. **Donate:** Every contribution supports our grassroots movement. [Visit our](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=6)[ donation page](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=7)[ to contribute before the meeting](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=activate_and_organize_1&n=8). Your support will help us reach more people and create lasting change. Thank you for standing with us. Let's activate and organize for a brighter future! With enduring love and solidarity, West-Abdullah 2024 Campaign Team
---
## **Join the Movement!**
---
