name: Mark
subject: In case you missed it — an update for dpwillis67@gmail.com
body:
Here's what happened on No Doubt About It This Week | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=531eeec20c&e=567664f14c)
|
In case you missed it, this week's episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast with Krysty & Mark Ronchetti dives into a critical and emotional topic.
---
| **New Mexico’s Dangerous Title: #1 Most Violent
** We uncovered news that New Mexico is now officially the most violent state in the country and discuss what solutions have to happen.
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a75b1a2493&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=9610a55fa1&e=567664f14c)
| **Fighting Through Grief:** We had the honor of sitting down with Nicole Chavez, who shared her heartbreaking yet inspiring story of losing her son to violent crime. Nicole opens up about her journey, the strength she’s found, and what she believes God is instilling in her during this challenging time. Her insights on what it will take to turn our state around are both profound and necessary for all of us to hear.
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=583128f88c&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=47242a0036&e=567664f14c)
| If you haven’t had a chance to listen to her story, it’s definitely worth tuning in. Nicole’s message is one of hope and action, offering valuable perspectives on tackling violence in our community.
[**Don't forget to catch an all-new episode of No Doubt About It on Monday!**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=919084b39c&e=567664f14c)

Best,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8211566f7&e=567664f14c)

name: COURIER
subject: Humbly asking you to read our message
body:
If our democracy is going to endure, news organizations must learn from the mistakes of 2016.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85198646/473985092/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVhZWVhMGYtMzgxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aG9bskhdp2eGgWAlEb-EyNem6QoMcwEPCH_bm0Al2BA=&emci=6cea051b-5b14-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=a5aeea0f-3815-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
Peter — it’s May, and we’re less than six months away from Election Day.
Last month, we had record-breaking fundraising numbers. **But this month, we’re way behind on our goal. We wanted to reach out and remind you what’s at stake right now.**
In 2016, Donald Trump masterfully used cable news outlets like CNN and Fox News to draw attention to his campaign and spread dangerous misinformation.
Trump won because they put ratings and profit first, and our country hasn’t been the same.
**We founded COURIER as a direct response to these failures.** We believe that restoring public trust in journalism can strengthen our democracy. Building that trust starts with calling out misinformation and bringing quality, local news to the communities that need it most.

Thank you, Democracy On The Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Weekly Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=d1c1b9864f&u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=0e327bc563)
---
| |
---
| | **WEEKLY UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| My Fellow Floridians,

I enjoyed a busy week out in the community! I had the opportunity to attend events, meet with constituents, and learn more about how I can better serve **House District 24** in the legislature. As your **State Representative** , I’m fighting hard to preserve the conservative values at the heart of our great nation. I’m proud of all the good work I’ve accomplished for our state and district, and I look forward to continuing my work in the next legislative session.

If there is something I can do for you, please do not hesitate to get in touch with my office. I want to work with you to build a brighter future for Florida. **You can contact my office by [clicking here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=fffaadae0f&e=d1c1b9864f).** I look forward to hearing from you soon!
---
| | **Thursday, May 9 - Rasmussen University Ocala Campus Open House**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| I had the opportunity to attend the open house for the **Rasmussen University Ocala Campus**. It was great to learn more about their programs as well as tour the campus. Thank you to the staff for taking the time to show me around. I’m proud to be able to represent the interests of our community’s higher education institutions in the **Florida House**.
---
| | **Tuesday, May 14 - Florida Chamber Political Institute Jacksonville Reception**
---
|
---
| It was great to attend the **Florida Chamber Political Institute Jacksonville Reception**. I had the opportunity to join fellow **Florida** leaders at this event in support of the improvement of our communities through strong leadership. In order to keep our communities free from the grip of the radical Left, we must continue to elect commonsense leaders to public office.
---
| | **Wednesday, May 15 - Ocala Metro Chamber & Economic Partnership’s exCEPtional Morning Breakfast**
---
| I had a wonderful time at the **Ocala Metro Chamber & Economic Partnership’s exCEPtional Morning** breakfast. This gave me the opportunity to network with businesses in the **Ocala** metro area. I also was able to hear **Chairwoman Michelle Stone of the Marion County Board of Commissioners** speak about all the great things happening in our county.
---
| | **Thursday, May 16 - Marion County Fallen Officer Memorial**
---
|
---
---
| It was an honor to speak at the **Marion County Fallen Officer Memorial**. Thank you to those who have sacrificed their lives for our community. We’re forever in your debt. It is an honor to support and advocate for the needs of our state law enforcement in the **Florida Legislature** as they work diligently to keep us safe.

“The willingness of others to give their lives so others might live never fails to evoke in me a sense of wonder and mystery...” – **Ronald Reagan**
---
| | **Legislation Signed by Governor Ron DeSantis This Week**
---
| Governor DeSantis is working hard to keep our state the Free State of Florida, and it has been an honor to serve alongside his leadership in the legislature to make Florida even stronger.

**Below is a list of the legislation our governor signed into law this week. **
* [HB 7063 – Anti-human Trafficking](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=37cd11703d&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/HB 1645 – Energy Resources](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b9d8bca447&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/HB 1331 – Commodities Produced by Forced Labor](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b8fedd4454&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [HB 7071 – Foreign Investments by the State Board of Administration](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=8e27a94d2c&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/CS/HB 267 – Building Regulations](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=f30fe6f64f&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [HB 5401 – Judges](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=668ccc58cb&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/HB 1567 – Qualifications for County Emergency Management Directors](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=742d8c5b9c&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/HB 1133 – Violations Against Vulnerable Road Users](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=40e2f8fca3&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/HB 793 – Coral Springs Improvement District, Broward County](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=470d213aed&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/HB 867 – North River Ranch Improvement Stewardship District, Manatee County](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b3786377c1&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [HB 1023 – St. Lucie County](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=f2623081b4&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [HB 819 – Lehigh Acres Municipal Services Improvement District, Hendry and Lee Counties](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a227e05b6f&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/CS/SB 382 – Continuing Education Requirements](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=8f4b8c6534&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/SB 328 – Affordable Housing](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4234d967c0&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [CS/CS/SB 994 – Student Transportation Safety](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d56a2ae935&e=d1c1b9864f)

---
|
---
| | I look forward to keeping you updated on my work and important state news in the months to come. It is an honor to represent **House District 24** in the legislature! As always, if anyone has any questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out. My office would be glad to help you in any way we can.

Have a wonderful weekend!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 State Representative Ryan Chamberlin, All rights reserved._
State Representative Ryan Chamberlin

**Our mailing address is:**
1101 The Capitol
402 South Monroe Street
Tallahassee, FL 32399-1300

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=0e327bc563) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=0e327bc563).

name: Marina Jenkins, All On The Line
subject: Breaking news from the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Now, the fight continues.
|
---

Team,
When federal judges tried to toss out Louisiana’s new, more representative, Voting Rights Act-compliant congressional map, this movement immediately got to work.
One of our affiliates, the National Redistricting Foundation, supported Louisiana voters who filed an amicus brief with the Supreme Court — calling on the justices to keep the current map in place while legal proceedings continue.
And that’s exactly what the Supreme Court ordered. As a result, Black Louisianians, who make up about one-third of the state’s population, will have the opportunity to elect candidates of their choice in two of the state’s six congressional districts in the 2024 election.
**This is a clear victory for Black Louisianians, who have fought for years for the equal representation they deserve as citizens. But just like all of our work, this fight is far from over.**
So while we are celebrating this victory, we need to double down on our work to defend democracy and ensure fair representation.
[**Can you rush a donation to All On The Line today to help ensure fair maps across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85199023/473985677/608781345?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_mayfun_email_20240519-AOTL-LASCOTUS-Marina_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4YWVlYTBmLTM4MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kDQo9XjLFECw0EoRpot9CxFux2xLlxYkjviU3tom84s=)

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: Threats on DACA are mounting
body:
There’s an urgent need for permanent solutions | | | Peter, Last week, the Senate Judiciary Committee held a hearing on the urgent need to protect DACA-eligible young people, especially as threats over DACA mount. It has been over two decades since the original Dream Act was introduced in 2001 and received bipartisan support. In the years since, immigrant youth have lived in limbo — finally receiving protections from the DACA program in 2012, having the program closed to new applicants in 2021, and now waiting for a likely Supreme Court decision. **Immigrant youth have never felt truly safe.** Our protections are not permanent, and the clock is ticking. Congress has proven they can take bipartisan action on immigration. Now is the time to deliver. After years of waiting, now is the time for permanent protections. **If you’re able, please add a donation today to help keep up our fight for permanent protections. We’re grateful for any amount you can give in support of our ongoing work to uplift immigrant communities.** ___If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrpCQ4pD4Q9o1KrhcjNJ_XWP6fjOVtlYoxaguTgJKHu4dGK4RHmNGSe6j79mfgG3QE7cW72cDrUGn4zwLo0Kfp8muJXn_LVH2XVlKZKfzBe_FEs3dy86nbvJjJhaHNia0Qx6ZPBicorWBVEA9T-Y-LnGXago7xHCZKqqc_qISubakAZmmSfy8p1A4QmEK0vimC2XAoVBzAL9bWVSW-s8vrAV3Btse8ekVC3Wib4vCenfeIQ0pUnUBVvZs5bug4uISCRIEsP151t2QSDIXpvVA0wPoEalfTvgAPN-knKyb1Qd0I8BwQGirM5LzagnIF7LFGOdMh8E14sHxawpVKnZmkSHlWvxYLLIj6bdH8cSc2aXOxmg9hAElBezMPhEZpToR_-attUy3qcerhqJyHsKyRFQ/46g/6ZYahjPeTBGg6k_Js46KyA/h0/h001.GXY-GC-7ggwWpvN0n6Sr-JoLpmDeKApyIXX2alCHFlw)

clean_body: There’s an urgent need for permanent solutions | | | Peter, Last week, the Senate Judiciary Committee held a hearing on the urgent need to protect DACA-eligible young people, especially as threats over DACA mount. It has been over two decades since the original Dream Act was introduced in 2001 and received bipartisan support. In the years since, immigrant youth have lived in limbo — finally receiving protections from the DACA program in 2012, having the program closed to new applicants in 2021, and now waiting for a likely Supreme Court decision. Immigrant youth have never felt truly safe. Our protections are not permanent, and the clock is ticking. Congress has proven they can take bipartisan action on immigration. Now is the time to deliver. After years of waiting, now is the time for permanent protections. If you’re able, please add a donation today to help keep up our fight for permanent protections. We’re grateful for any amount you can give in support of our ongoing work to uplift immigrant communities. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. Kristen is running in one of the most competitive House races in the country. Control of the House will be decided by voters in our district and how well we organize.
That does not scare us. In 2022, I was Kristen’s Organizing Director when we built a massive coalition and knocked over 75,000 doors to flip the Michigan Senate Blue. The results speak for themselves.
In this toss-up 2024 election, we know that the voters who will put Kristen over the top are the ones volunteers reach out to on the phone or in their neighborhoods. We call this the “field margin.”
**It’s no exaggeration to say this race could be decided by just a handful of votes, so whether or not Kristen wins depends on how strong our voter outreach program is. And that starts today.**
Anything you can donate today will help us contact the voters we’ll need to win, so can Kristen and I count on you to donate today?
Thanks,
Kevin
P.S. It’s my job to ORGANIZE on the ground in MI-08, to make sure we reach all the voters we need to win: whether by knocking on their door, calling them on the phone or sending them a quick text reminding them to vote. Right now, we’re crafting our voter outreach strategy, but how many voters our motivated volunteers can talk to entirely depends on how much money we raise right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Kristen is running in one of the most competitive House races in the country. Control of the House will be decided by voters in our district and how well we organize. That does not scare us. In 2022, I was Kristen’s Organizing Director when we built a massive coalition and knocked over 75,000 doors to flip the Michigan Senate Blue. The results speak for themselves. In this toss-up 2024 election, we know that the voters who will put Kristen over the top are the ones volunteers reach out to on the phone or in their neighborhoods. We call this the “field margin.” It’s no exaggeration to say this race could be decided by just a handful of votes, so whether or not Kristen wins depends on how strong our voter outreach program is. And that starts today. Anything you can donate today will help us contact the voters we’ll need to win, so can Kristen and I count on you to donate today? Thanks, Kevin P.S. name: Powered By People
subject: Volunteer toolkits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Your $5 donation will fund voter registration supplies for a volunteer!
#
Our volunteers are hitting the streets every single day to register new Democratic voters. With no online or automatic voter registration in Texas, the work they’re doing is key to bringing every voter into our elections.
As a grassroots organization, we’re counting on donations from supporters like you to make sure our volunteers have the supplies they need to register voters: **clipboards, pens, water bottles, hand sanitizer, and more.**
[**Will you make a $5 donation right now to support this work? Your contribution will cover the full cost of a voter registration kit for a volunteer!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240517.i6667r&refcode=ema20240518-239588&t=1&akid=239588%2E444211%2EP5Xkzu)

To maintain their grip on power, Texas Republicans have made our state the toughest in the nation to register to vote. Every dollar you donate today will ensure our volunteers have the supplies they need to register, organize, and turn out the voters most targeted by GOP voter suppression.
[**Can Beto count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can today?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240517.i6667r&refcode=ema20240518-239588&t=3&akid=239588%2E444211%2EP5Xkzu)
Thank you for all that you do,

name: Darin Harbick
subject: Final days...have you voted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harbick for Oregon ID 23118
body:
First, I just want to thank you for your dedication, your donations, and your time during this campaign. | | | | | [](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=e16428cda9&e=3362c31595)
---
| Peter,
We’re down to our final days of this campaign!
First, I just want to thank you for your dedication, your donations, and your time during this campaign.
But now it all comes down to turn out.
---
| Have you voted yet? **Please make sure to drop off your ballot and ask your friends and family to as well before 8 PM Tuesday!**
I also want to make a last minute request for a donation to help us complete our Get Out The Vote campaign. Our final mailers, phone calls, TV ads, texts, and even this email cost money! [**Please consider donating $100, $50, or even just $25 to help us close out our campaign.**](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=1ab11ff0ef&e=3362c31595)
Thank you again. I hope to be able to celebrate a win for conservatives next week!
Darin Harbick

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Show President Trump you have his back. Sign our letter of support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They’re keeping him couped up in a freezing, run-down courtroom because they’re terrified of letting him campaign with the American people.
Now more than ever, he needs to know you have his back.

|
---
| | |
Friend,

I went to New York to support President Trump in Court.

He's facing down a corrupt "GET TRUMP" judge and the full weight of a Radical Left, Soros DA.

_**And he 's going through all of this because he cares about YOU and the future of America. **_

---

TRUMP](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04a503c5227440a2b16837dfa7f61b2a&_e=7WGy3ZAbtlwIXVsBRLNjSKpFUZwkeHPuE5e_Z5RASeycbJuK4tam-EnebJhWmKlMORASKB5D2LuwEHrqUXPxWNI16m2ggW99qCrFo-ob7cfEk0To44qa5-r3ut8pDIDAwxbLocFgey-IWaknOzy5CiOica0czqENCTesoFKGbVxYqr2KWtdoq_36Dn6Kdbh-EiIGoWIFFMePC5S1xRsR6Uj1XcgdqygJTMt9dFoVYd_Dr-uXDofb-Z6Xoi-V9iI1OcY-Op7s-mI5zA2nUQW5Y8lUdFAS1WJrl3SkGPB4lYJlND-_fT_ZXKtXFfzqJwubSJuojORoShRcwlklUBFDk7hqPkY4UWbVtNUve4mz13Vqlo1Qt32vX4bjxWPpmQDqmEHEm3ZC-t0Qbq-leO-rLA%3D%3D "Generic Button")

They're keeping him couped up in a freezing, run-down courtroom because they're terrified of letting him campaign with the American people.

I know if we all could be there in New York to show our support we would, but I understand that just isn't possible.

**_So we 're putting a letter together to show President Trump that millions of Americans are there with him in spirit. _

[Read the letter below and then co-sign it to show President Trump you have his back.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04a503c5227440a2b16837dfa7f61b2a&_e=7WGy3ZAbtlwIXVsBRLNjSKpFUZwkeHPuE5e_Z5RASeycbJuK4tam-EnebJhWmKlMORASKB5D2LuwEHrqUXPxWNI16m2ggW99qCrFo-ob7cfEk0To44qa5-r3ut8pDIDAwxbLocFgey-IWaknOzy5CiOica0czqENCTesoFKGbVxYqr2KWtdoq_36Dn6Kdbh-EiIGoWIFFMePC5S1xRsR6Uj1XcgdqygJTMt9dFoVYd_Dr-uXDofb-Z6Xoi-V9iI1Ib9mImsF0QdjntuuIRPU4yI41m6MCfOpQQ9yYWTM5BgD03gWoI2dC3sg20Cm53vpORlxfSvowYPVjeNqp_739BDm0J4AoA_mDnwQwmIvcoTsO4jFtv34sDA4iBM1vKtIDEaMLJG012cRrQLJ23eMxA%3D%3D "Read the letter below and then co-sign it to show President Trump you have his back. ")**

---
| |
---
| | **To: President Donald Trump
From: Friend,

We the American People know that the crooked LAWFARE against you is nothing but a CORRUPT WITCH HUNT for the sole purpose of ELECTION INTERFERENCE!

We know that no President, perhaps in history, has been treated this unfairly.

The treatment you have endured is a NATIONAL DISGRACE! And according to many legal scholars, also ILLEGAL!

President Trump, we know you didn't need to run for President, _but you did anyway. _

They said you couldn't win, _but you did._

They said you wouldn't make America great again, _but you did._

All because you love the people of this great country.

At every step of the way, they tried to thwart you. Whether it was the phony Russia Russia Russia hoax, or the perfect phone call impeachment hoax, you never gave up.

You would NOT surrender, despite their blatant and very disgusting attempts to take you down.

Furthermore, we know that you are the only one standing between us and the deranged lunatics who want to hurt our country.

We know that you represent the best of America, _you represent us._

I, undersigned, add my name to this open letter to you, President Trump, as you head to the courtroom to hear yet ANOTHER phony "GET TRUMP" case against you.

And further, with God on your side, I have complete and total confidence that upon beating these phony charges, you will return to the White House and restore freedom and prosperity to this land once again. **

---

You would NOT surrender, despite their blatant and very disgusting attempts to take you down. Furthermore, we know that you are the only one standing between us and the deranged lunatics who want to hurt our country. We know that you represent the best of America, you represent us. I, undersigned, add my name to this open letter to you, President Trump, as you head to the courtroom to hear yet ANOTHER phony "GET TRUMP" case against you. And further, with God on your side, I have complete and total confidence that upon beating these phony charges, you will return to the White House and restore freedom and prosperity to this land once again. | | | "Generic Button" Now more than ever, President Trump needs to know that you have his back, so I 'm asking you to sign this letter today. "Please, add your name and show President Trump you will always stand with him, Friend. " | | | "Generic Button" For America, Congressman Byron Donalds | | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions .

name: Stand with Bernie
subject: Bernie - "The consequences if we fail are unthinkable"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1011?refcode=email-20240518&akid=6017%2E5885482%2E6OU1rl ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Bernie is
running for re-election because we are at a pivotal point in American
history. “We cannot retreat,” Bernie said in a moving, motivating op-ed in
The Guardian this week.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17778?t=1052&akid=6017%2E5885482%2E6OU1rl ][IMG]

Bernie is calling on our movement to organize and fight for a better
country even as we struggle against a corrupt political system and the
oligarchic billionaire class of corporate CEOs trying to gain even more
power in America.

We’re working alongside Bernie for a better future and to continue
electing the progressive leaders like Ilhan Omar, Jamaal Bowman, Susheela
and Pramila Jayapal, AOC, and others who can help achieve our movement's
policy goals.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240518&akid=6017%2E5885482%2E6OU1rl ]Can you donate today to support Bernie’s fight? Together, we can take on
right-wing billionaires, corporate CEOs, corporate Democrats, and MAGA
Republicans to protect and expand progressive power in Congress. Like
Bernie said, our movement cannot retreat!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240518&akid=6017%2E5885482%2E6OU1rl ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240518&akid=6017%2E5885482%2E6OU1rl ]CHIP IN $27

Just like when he announced his re-election, Bernie talked in his Guardian
article on runaway corporate power, the threats of the climate crisis,
right-wing attacks on abortion rights, healthcare for all, and the
massive, wasteful defense budget. “Tens of billions of those dollars are
currently supporting the horrific war in Gaza waged by the rightwing
extremist Israeli government of Netanyahu,” Bernie said.

Bernie is working on the pressing issues of today and the enduring
challenges he’s been talking about since he first ran for president in
2016, and even before that.

Bernie’s not running for himself. He’s running for our movement, and to
help lift progressives to victory in 2024. As Bernie advocates for Peace
in Gaza, Medicare for All, raising the wage, fighting corporate power,
taxing the rich, and more, he’s building on what we’ve been organizing
towards for years.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240518&akid=6017%2E5885482%2E6OU1rl ]Chip in today to help Bernie and our movement overcome the broken
political system to bring about progressive change in America. As the
largest grassroots political organization in the country, we rely on
small-dollar donations to do this work alongside Bernie.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Stop the Insurrectionists (via DLCC.org)
subject: The reason why so many Trump-enablers have run for state office:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
DLCC is paying attention — and we know that you are too | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Did you know that 15 state legislators who attended the January 6th insurrection are currently serving in statehouses across the country? And since January 6th, 2021, at least 59 Republicans who were in Washington, DC, that day have either ended up in state legislative office or ran for one?** We believe the reason why so many insurrectionists and election deniers have run in state legislative races is because _they're betting that nobody pays attention to local races_ – making it that much easier to win, gain power, and oversee the future of our elections. **But they’re wrong._We’re_ paying attention – we know that you are too – and we’re not going to make this easy for them. ** [But here's the hard truth: Increased awareness and attention is not enough – we need financial investment to organize for state Democrats and defeat these insurrectionists and their enablers. So will you please chip in $7 or anything you can to protect our democracy at the state level? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvLlvOtFHcHSW1T-Hwi1Or_VJtfmrgEjjR84h6dasTO7Cnx2SHJ7b47H57vJ32MRXkAmQffBXljo71EEnkzbDt5GX7bWiVAJtA8PSN58hCKzFw4kC5r41rAVXiMWjIwUKU86fPthhgYmXPzvpW6OzBmdQltGCyOG6_Ar6w1uBEDI0OzmHQllfV6w2x49DupuSo7-0FVBnI02pxQSKAMUESP0DIkbq0FjarxwF_eOf2MS_1XYNbReD_uux0Be0FMYS8TpeaYAsB2FIETP6YUat4VxvAa9Q53tddAAYrLpVHVbrQQIAmBHLnbD7WQRqGT45T4uebXXry6dIMSGT0JzBhmoKjUcXe_6eti51UOvkAFwzc4IkDOIHDriWkgmNzPMlqH8cD7tE79GkSWAh7Tn_vr0cLnIInYWIo66bcR7mLjQwXjoLXVyPdMO02UeOvv6nk/46g/fg5xQ7d7TaiIyJpUjMYbBg/h0/h001.I9v2ItK3f6qmWlixYRk6129dqHIEeGLEhH6emZXUp_Q) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

The good news is that more and more people are realizing the importance of these state legislative races heading into 2024’s elections – and we’re so excited to be growing this team.
But at the end of the day, winning is going to come down to who can earn the most votes – not who has the most attention. **And our voter outreach and organizing work is powered by the contributions we receive from emails like this one.**

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

clean_body: DLCC is paying attention — and we know that you are too | | | | | ---|--- Did you know that 15 state legislators who attended the January 6th insurrection are currently serving in statehouses across the country? And since January 6th, 2021, at least 59 Republicans who were in Washington, DC, that day have either ended up in state legislative office or ran for one? We believe the reason why so many insurrectionists and election deniers have run in state legislative races is because they're betting that nobody pays attention to local races – making it that much easier to win, gain power, and oversee the future of our elections. But they’re wrong.We’re paying attention – we know that you are too – and we’re not going to make this easy for them. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | The DLCC supports countless Democrats who run in incredibly close races against extremist Republicans threatening to restrict abortion access and gut voting rights. The good news is that more and more people are realizing the importance of these state legislative races heading into 2024’s elections – and we’re so excited to be growing this team. But at the end of the day, winning is going to come down to who can earn the most votes – not who has the most attention. And our voter outreach and organizing work is powered by the contributions we receive from emails like this one. Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC PAC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and DLCC PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. name: Brandon Herrera
subject: -$29,453.89 (Getting Close)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Friend,
Thanks to all of you, we had a near-record fundraising day yesterday--we raised almost $30,000 and cut our budget deficit by half.
But we still need to raise just $29,453.89 more to keep our TV ads up for the last week, and we need to make that payment on MONDAY.
Please help us get over the line by contributing at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/uYGtfo50h7xFcOR763k8raQA/7630dESEatd3aDm763YB7630r0gQ).
This has been the most difficult challenge I've taken on in my life (yes, more difficult than completing the AK-50), but I am determined to win this race to protect our constitutional rights and to Make America Great Again.
I've given away many firearms and trips to help fund this race--and I'm doing it again in the homestretch. Every $5 earns you a chance to win a trip for two to San Antonio to fire the very first AK-50.
Whatever you can spare to help us hit our goal by Monday morning would mean the world to me: [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/uYGtfo50h7xFcOR763k8raQA/7630dESEatd3aDm763YB7630r0gQ).
Let's finish the fight together!

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We have a plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We know what it takes to win this year. We can deliver a future that we can all believe in.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240518-3890-footer&t=1&akid=3890%2E420207%2EoaXYjt)
Peter, we know what it takes to win this year.
We can’t tell folks why Donald Trump is bad. We need to show people there is a future we can all believe in. We need to tell people not just what we’re _fighting against_ , we need to tell people what we are _fighting for_.
The good news is: **Pramila has a plan.**
As the chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Pramila has unveiled the Progressive Proposition Agenda–a new vision that shows the American people how we will deliver for them. Raising wages and lowering costs. Protecting abortion rights and voting rights. Affordable housing and health care. Transformative climate action.
**And that's just the start.**
Unlike the unhinged MAGA GOP, progressives have a plan to deliver for the people, Peter. And we’re ready to do everything we can to make it a reality.
The stakes are high — but with your help, we can take back the House, protect the Senate and the White House, and truly make a difference in people’s lives.
[**Pramila is fighting for us in Congress and now it’s time for us to have her back like she has ours. Will you chip in $3 today to help us make this future a reality?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240518.kKr3yw&refcode=em20240518-3890&t=2&akid=3890%2E420207%2EoaXYjt)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240518.kKr3yw&refcode=em20240518-3890&t=21&akid=3890%2E420207%2EoaXYjt)**
Together,
Jayapal HQ

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Team Sharice
subject: National Republicans are determined to defeat Kansas’ only Democratic Congresswoman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85203813/473994740/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTczMzNhNC0zZjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HIL6pQOdwWGjSoFPRYhCyo_4juBOKW9uT8UqQqU03Y=) Hey — there’s a few things we need to catch you up on. **FIRST,** the NRCC released its list of top Democratic targets in this election cycle. Sharice’s name was on the list. **THEN,** both the NRCC _and_ other extremist groups started blasting out attacks on Sharice’s record. **JUST THIS WEEK,** Speaker Mike Johnson personally wired an unprecedented amount of money to the NRCC to step up their attacks on Sharice and other vulnerable Democrats. _He even sent money directly to Sharice’s opponent._ **Here’s the thing: We know that if voters learn the truth about Sharice and all she’s accomplished for Kansas, she earns their vote. But that only works _if we don’t allow ourselves to get drowned out by this flood of outside spending._** [_**Can we count on you to pitch in and help us fight back against the NRCC? body:

Friends,

You know how you can tell our campaign is making a real impact? Look at how folks around the district are reacting.

You saw John’s note about us being up on TV. You’ve seen how John’s earned the endorsement of nearly every Democratic town committees from Huntington to Montauk. In short, the response has been phenomenal so far – from most people.

But one notable non-resident isn’t happy: Nick LaLota.

He’s taking the time from wherever he is right now to try to tear John down. He’s projecting hard . The funniest part? He won’t even see our ad because he doesn’t live in the district.

It’s never been clearer: Nick LaLota and his MAGA allies have nothing to run on. They don’t want to govern. They’re trying to implement a near-total abortion ban. So they’re trying to muddy the waters to save their jobs. We’re not surprised.

We’re on the air right now to make sure voters know the truth. We’re not slowing down or letting LaLota’s attacks get us off track. We know what we have to do to win. Are you with us? name: New knees
subject: What protein does to osteoarthritis in seniors
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Breakthrough new research proves
how you can grow back cartilage in your bone joints.

Modern medicine has been treating
knee pain with drugs and cortisone shots… But once the
treatment wears off, you're right back to agonizing pain…

This is why big pharma HATES
studies like these and why you haven't heard about it…

It turns out, all you need is to
eat more of this protein in the right proportion to restore your
joints and bones.

Studies even show people notice a
difference within 7 days…

So if you want brand new
knees…

==> Click here to read more about
this unique protein and how you can get it now.

Not having enough of this protein
was once considered to be an irreversible step in the progression
of osteoporosis and osteoarthritis…

Until now.

subject: I never thought I’d write this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U

---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this letter because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email - isn't about baseball in fact, it's an email I never thought I'd be writing to you. **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9538d775f9bf4257b1c0549071c33a2b&_e=oXJ7cinEW2TcFfyt5V0MvR9YSXER1Ky7wsbXLJxSrAc4ni6VYPsy0NAbuQClSDwd-Z_OpOK1dCmcnYL6O2IHMkymgOI61LQ8CXeM7SD2Z4HO13QjzuLWkc_cuTGF0VcSCZxvlnw38S5dRuMrf8_BMCe-9s5rk6twXzqdQ6Ab-XKpUoEUWgf-9REIGQNIGORzIeVJXhQHYrx0cmwjEs9TwOVy8NOQdxfYvZ004UEVN-qSTZyrAdw7bp4XM7VENBxYg04JyfmDsqs9fJ4udqPyjre1n_NHm4VFYS0LlaectE33M6S2nBF3IqbTizk5L-Yy8DaOAAmqedA5jbax37GOj35g4ImpUgVDnEMIf0-5Im6MthEaRPW_0UW1uSwxErC8Ie9kyg4wYOkY-nzs2rXzPg%3D%3D)** Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: ► Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** ► Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. _**Remember?**_ ► Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. _**Remember?**_ Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." body:
Petition to STOP Pro-Hamas Radicals from blocking our public roads. Links inside to add your name >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/78f0e9d4b400c97c3947229f28c3afba/052c28e65678669fc3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
Friend, I’m sure you’ve seen the disturbing footage on TV the last few weeks... Pro-Hamas protestors have blocked traffic across the United States, inconveniencing thousands of law-abiding Americans. Make no mistake – these terrorist sympathizers aren’t exercising their freedom of speech. They’re disturbing the peace. I won’t stand for it. That’s why I’m proudly co-sponsoring the Safe and Open Streets Act, which would make it a federal crime to purposely obstruct public roads and highways. **If you agree that we need to crack down on extreme protesters who take the law into their own hands and disturb the peace, please add your name to show your support. **
---

Folks, there are a lot of things that get under my skin about MAGA Republicans' agenda. But little irks me more than the blatant hypocrisy you see from them in Congress on reproductive rights. It's simple to me: We must defend and restore reproductive rights. **[That's what I've fought to do as Congressman, and it's what I'm committed to doing once reelected in November. But I need your help. Our campaign can't take on this fight without you, so can I ask you to chip in $25 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206119/474001485/569902138?amount=25&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.18_B1_AbortionRights_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGM3NmQzYy00MzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErZZP0qjbhM_kpo0HWuQNazr_f8GMxiNikbyJr3kf-A=)** [CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206120/474001486/569902138?amount=25&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.18_B1_AbortionRights_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGM3NmQzYy00MzE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ErZZP0qjbhM_kpo0HWuQNazr_f8GMxiNikbyJr3kf-A=) You've probably seen the news by now that a near-total abortion ban has taken effect here in Florida. The six-week period is before many women even know they're pregnant. Recent reports even show that this ban could deter physicians from wanting to practice in our state. We have the opportunity to undo this near-total ban by voting for "YES" on Amendment 4 in November, but we also need Democrats in office to ensure we continue the work to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. I'm unafraid to have the backs of hundreds of thousands of Floridians in standing up for reproductive rights. And I'll be on the frontlines of the fight to defeat extremists at every corner. **[But we have a tough election coming up, and Democrats will need to win races like ours to retake the House and fight to protect reproductive rights. clean_body: Little irks me more than the blatant hypocrisy you see from Republicans in Congress on reproductive rights. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Folks, there are a lot of things that get under my skin about MAGA Republicans' agenda. But little irks me more than the blatant hypocrisy you see from them in Congress on reproductive rights. It's simple to me: We must defend and restore reproductive rights. = = You've probably seen the news by now that a near-total abortion ban has taken effect here in Florida. The six-week period is before many women even know they're pregnant. Recent reports even show that this ban could deter physicians from wanting to practice in our state. We have the opportunity to undo this near-total ban by voting for "YES" on Amendment 4 in November, but we also need Democrats in office to ensure we continue the work to codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. I'm unafraid to have the backs of hundreds of thousands of Floridians in standing up for reproductive rights. And I'll be on the frontlines of the fight to defeat extremists at every corner. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With you, \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. name: Alice Jones
subject: Help me wish Mondaire a Happy Birthday!
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
My name is Alice and I’m Mondaire’s grandmother.
Hey team—My name is Alice, and I’m Mondaire’s grandmother. I’m reaching out because today is a very special day: **it's Mondaire's 37th birthday!**

My relationship with Mondaire is one that I cherish. He’s my eldest grandchild and I am so proud of him. As a young boy, when child care was too expensive, I would bring Mondaire to work with me as I cleaned homes in our Rockland County community. Life wasn’t easy, but Mondaire always dreamed big and was eager to help folks who faced the same challenges as our family. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206431/474002659/132774807?refcode=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3f2ed69e-4415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJlZDY5ZS00NDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RivE4os6fLeujp2sqtHavrJhqTEUUOYhRQ6FTZqZkz4=) I always knew Mondaire was going to accomplish great things. I couldn’t have been more proud to watch him graduate from Harvard Law School and eventually be sworn into Congress, ready to fight for the same community we called home. As someone who grew up in Jim Crow Virginia, this was my wildest dream for my grandson.

Throughout his time in Congress, Mondaire never lost sight of who and what he was fighting for. Like many seniors in the Hudson Valley, and throughout this country, I worked well past the age of retirement to pay for the high cost of prescription drugs and medical procedures not fully covered by Medicare. When Mondaire ran for Congress, he said he would do something about that—and he did.

Mondaire fought for me—and every senior in America—and passed the Inflation Reduction Act to lower the cost of prescription drugs.

I am so grateful for the work that Mondaire did in Congress—but I know that he isn’t done fighting. He’s ready to go back to Congress so he can pass legislation to help more hardworking families, but he needs our support.

**[Today, on Mondaire’s birthday, will you join me in supporting his campaign to flip New York’s 17th District blue? Chip in $37—or anything you can afford—to help send him back to Congress to fight for the issues that matter most to New Yorkers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206433/474002661/132774807?refcode=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3f2ed69e-4415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJlZDY5ZS00NDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RivE4os6fLeujp2sqtHavrJhqTEUUOYhRQ6FTZqZkz4=)**

Thank you,

Alice

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he's doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. [**Donate today to build our grassroots movement and send Mondaire Jones back to Congress and back to work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206434/474002662/132774807?refcode=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3f2ed69e-4415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJlZDY5ZS00NDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RivE4os6fLeujp2sqtHavrJhqTEUUOYhRQ6FTZqZkz4=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206436/474002664/132774807?refcode=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3f2ed69e-4415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJlZDY5ZS00NDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RivE4os6fLeujp2sqtHavrJhqTEUUOYhRQ6FTZqZkz4=)[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206438/474002666/132774807?refcode=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3f2ed69e-4415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJlZDY5ZS00NDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RivE4os6fLeujp2sqtHavrJhqTEUUOYhRQ6FTZqZkz4=) ** ****[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206440/474002668/132774807?refcode=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_bday_fnd_gq_act___AJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3f2ed69e-4415-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJlZDY5ZS00NDE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RivE4os6fLeujp2sqtHavrJhqTEUUOYhRQ6FTZqZkz4=) name: Derek Marshall
subject: Our young people deserve better than a Republican future.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress

Peter,
There are a lot of different ways we can describe how competitive this race is.
Here are a few:
✅ In 2022, Kirsten lost to her Republican opponent by just one percentage point.
✅ This is one of the only districts in the country that Biden won — but has a Republican representative.
✅ The DCCC has listed our campaign as one of their top targets for a Red-to-Blue seat.
✅ And multiple outlets are now calling this race a toss-up.
Here’s the point:
If we’re going to win back the House this November — so our leaders can focus on passing protections for reproductive rights, investing in climate action, and lowering healthcare costs — we need Kirsten to win.
Chipping in directly to Team Engel will help us build up our field staff, reach voters in the district, and take on the Republican PACs that are pouring millions into defeating us.
This race is critical, and every dollar counts. Can you chip in now to help Kirsten win this November and fight for Arizona? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_051824_Competitive_act]

Here are a few: ✅ In 2022, Kirsten lost to her Republican opponent by just one percentage point. ✅ This is one of the only districts in the country that Biden won — but has a Republican representative. ✅ The DCCC has listed our campaign as one of their top targets for a Red-to-Blue seat. ✅ And multiple outlets are now calling this race a toss-up. Here’s the point: If we’re going to win back the House this November — so our leaders can focus on passing protections for reproductive rights, investing in climate action, and lowering healthcare costs — we need Kirsten to win. Chipping in directly to Team Engel will help us build up our field staff, reach voters in the district, and take on the Republican PACs that are pouring millions into defeating us. This race is critical, and every dollar counts. Can you chip in now to help Kirsten win this November and fight for Arizona? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thank you! Team Engel [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? Florida's Senator = Trump's attack dog
| | |
---
**Rather than fighting for Florida families in the Senate, Rick Scott is hard at work defending Donald Trump in the press:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206726/474003739/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1227-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUxZWRlMDQtNDYxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u53hwiN4ZkrCNzNOPbe1ARDOYzc9sU52hlNGRJROPEc=)
Rick Scott thinks extremists like himself and Trump are victims of "political persecution"**** — **_not_ _the countless seniors and families he swindled to amass a quarter-billion-dollar fortune._**
But whether this is to win Trump's favor or just raise awareness about his highly vulnerable reelection campaign, one this is crystal clear:

name: Chris Murdock
subject: We are in this together, Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Our Tennessee Future PAC, Not Affiliated with Any Candidate or Candidate Committee [contact us](mailto:info@ourtenn
body:
United, we are strong.

| | | | | [ ](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fourtenn.org%2F/1/010f018f8d04dd6e-97397ff5-1adc-4660-b7f6-3a5c25ecad5c-000000/6luDi2b_xKL_0wkfKIP0Q5eegZQ=159)
---
Dear Peter,
---
| | We trust this email finds you ready to make a difference because Tennessee **urgently needs your help. **

We are at a critical juncture, where the actions we take today can correct the course of our state’s political landscape, which has been detrimentally shaped by the current Republican-led legislature.

_First,_ they kicked out duly elected Democrats from the state legislature for standing up for our values.

_Then,_ they passed some of the most restrictive anti-choice measures in the country.

_And,_ then they tried to address the mass-shooting epidemic by arming teachers.

_And somewhere in between_ they found the time to protect Republican Representative Gino Bulso’s right to marry his cousins (_no, really_).

**We have to draw the line.** And this is where your support can ignite real change.

Why support our PAC?

**1. Counterbalance to Harmful Legislation: **Each donation fuels our efforts to support Democrats who are committed to undoing the damage and promoting policies that benefit all, not just a few.

**2. Activating Democrats: **Without National Democrats investing in our state, it’s up to us to take control. We will be using funds to help identify, register, and get out to vote Democrats in districts where this alone can sway an election.

**3. Empowerment Through Representation: **Our candidates represent the diverse voices of Tennessee, advocating for rights, justice, and equality, ensuring our legislature mirrors the values of its constituents.
---
---
The stakes are high, and the time to act is now.

[Can we count on you to donate $20, or whatever you can afford?](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1%3Frefcode=TENN_24_EM_9_Soft_Ask/1/010f018f8d04dd6e-97397ff5-1adc-4660-b7f6-3a5c25ecad5c-000000/ooGjNczXoc4Bymw-4pyTDircP6s=159)
---
| [Donate](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1%3Frefcode=TENN_24_EM_9_Soft_Ask/2/010f018f8d04dd6e-97397ff5-1adc-4660-b7f6-3a5c25ecad5c-000000/l3YBDcyxIxJ4G9zJ4p3p90nsdCs=159 "Donate")
---
Your contribution will directly support campaign mobilizations, grassroots organizing, and critical resources necessary to elevate Democratic leaders who will champion our rights.

We are counting on you to be part of this pivotal moment. Together, we can reshape Tennessee’s future into one that reflects our shared values and aspirations.
Thank you for your urgent attention and support.
---
In solidarity,
Chris Murdock
Our Tennessee Future PAC Team
---
| [Donate](https://zg05qvsd.r.us-east-2.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Four-tennessee-future-pac-1%3Frefcode=TENN_24_EM_9_Soft_Ask/3/010f018f8d04dd6e-97397ff5-1adc-4660-b7f6-3a5c25ecad5c-000000/rxT50O2n79zS4az2ZadPAZWKpgQ=159 "Donate")
---
_Our Tennessee Future PAC has been established as a proactive response to the political landscape in Tennessee, which has been taken over by MAGA ideologies. This PAC is dedicated to supporting state-elected officials who represent alternative, more progressive values contrary to those of the MAGA Republicans who currently dominate the state legislature. Key strategies include voter registration drives and targeted advertising campaigns, especially in districts where MAGA-aligned candidates are entrenched or pose a strong threat in upcoming elections. By mobilizing pro-Democratic voters and enhancing electoral participation, Our Tennessee Future PAC aims to effect substantial change and balance within Tennessee's political sphere, ensuring the state's policies and leadership accurately reflect the diverse perspectives of its residents. Your donation helps us in this fight.___

name: AOC
subject: Thursday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Here’s the problem with “both sidesing” the chaos that was the Republican Oversight hearing on Thursday night.
Republicans voted to allow the rhetoric that was used against Rep. Jasmine Crockett.
**Notice that when Democrats have the majority, these things don’t happen.**
Remember: the hearing was about contempt proceedings — otherwise known as a “markup hearing” — where the full committee must vote at the end.
In markups, both parties offer amendments. This is standard. Amendments are voted on, and then the full proposal.
**This is where the GOP chaos matters.**
After the GOP Chair and members broke official House protocol to allow Marjorie Taylor Greene’s horrific opening silo of rhetoric, they made another change: to dispense with the legislative process.
That part is not getting enough attention. _They ended all legislative debate, and cut straight to a vote on their text without standard procedure._
**Needless to say, this is not normal at all.** You see, this is a microcosm of what authoritarians do on a larger scale:
1\. identify a vulnerable person or community that’s easier to break the rules towards,
2\. normalize it (often with “both sides” rhetoric), and then
3\. use that rule-breaking to undermine deeper processes and rule of law.
That’s why this stuff isn’t just “all-sides chaos” or mere distraction. They want you to think this was some random devolution of conduct — instead of a structured GOP outcome.
We must understand who and what actions created the situation. It matters.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=1&akid=6435%2E2526796%2ErF0fQA) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=2&akid=6435%2E2526796%2ErF0fQA) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=3&akid=6435%2E2526796%2ErF0fQA)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=4&akid=6435%2E2526796%2ErF0fQA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=6435%2E2526796%2ErF0fQA)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206857/474004214/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE4NGFiNy00NjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GL9QrOXbBcq5jLpgIg5uue4L0A4qRe3dbkFxrv_CXfM=)
---
Grassroots support has been at the core of every successful campaign in our state. Nevada’s last Senate race was the closest in the country, and it was grassroots supporters who made the crucial difference and overcame the $55 million in GOP spending, delivering Senate control to Democrats by just 7,928 votes.
**This year is no exception.** _The Cook Political Report_ just downgraded my race to a “Toss Up,” and I’m now falling behind in the polls. The _only way_ we can stand up to Mitch McConnell’s dark money groups and the dozens of far-right megadonors determined to flip Nevada red is with the help of people like **_you._**
Dark money GOP groups have pledged to start spending MILLIONS the second polls close on primary night to attack me and my record. We need a surge of donations today to prepare for anything they throw our way. These final weeks before the general election begins will set the tone for the rest of our race. If we don’t have the resources to start off on a strong footing, we’ll be knocked off balance and will be stuck playing a game of catch-up for months to come.
**As we head into our general election, the stakes of this race are only going to get higher.**[**_So I’m personally asking you: Please, will you donate to my reelection campaign today? Any amount will help us build a winning foundation in this battleground race._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206863/474004218/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE4NGFiNy00NjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GL9QrOXbBcq5jLpgIg5uue4L0A4qRe3dbkFxrv_CXfM=)

But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. [**Will you chip in now to win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206875/474004236/1598999503?refcode=footer&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE4NGFiNy00NjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GL9QrOXbBcq5jLpgIg5uue4L0A4qRe3dbkFxrv_CXfM=) You can also [**text JACKY to 30508**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85206876/474004237/1077135989?refcode=footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGE4NGFiNy00NjE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GL9QrOXbBcq5jLpgIg5uue4L0A4qRe3dbkFxrv_CXfM=&emci=565719c1-c213-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=58a84ab7-4615-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3800590) to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Your full, weekly Mesoscale update will be published midway next week instead of the regular schedule on Sunday.
I'll be leaving for Greece Sunday, where I'll be meeting with international whistleblowers to lobby the United Nations to establish a Whistleblower Protection Office.
Ideally, such an office would assist whistleblowers in expediting the visa process, provide safe harbor and protection, and pursue international charges against offenders whose actions create a multi-national danger.
John Barnett should have had those services. Instead, Boeing was allowed to attack his character, destroy his career, and threaten/intimidate him into permanent silence. John's suicide note said, "The entire system for protecting whistleblowers is fucked up."
The [National Whistleblower Center](https://substack.com/redirect/b1d32e25-add2-4a8d-811f-df9823c70282?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is advocating for the creation of such an office within the United States Department of Justice.
Y[ou can use this link to send a letter](https://substack.com/redirect/d2b9a2ca-34c1-4c56-9759-56094b995cc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the Department of Justice, Congress, and the White House encouraging them to implement best practices in establishing a whistleblower rewards program. The letter is already prepared and takes less than a minute to send.
[Help Us Protect Whistleblowers](https://substack.com/redirect/d2b9a2ca-34c1-4c56-9759-56094b995cc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
My work with the whistleblower community has been among the most rewarding in an otherwise insufferable period of my life.
I'm profoundly grateful to be joining the international community as we navigate policy changes to protect those who protect us.
If you'd like to help me eat while I'm there (everything else is covered) you can c[lick here to donate via PayPal](https://substack.com/redirect/4a31d622-1817-4400-abe1-35725f0e6d81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [click here for CashApp](https://substack.com/redirect/d9dd2212-5273-4a96-b04b-e5c38a25329a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or upgrade to a paid or annual subscription below:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Cgg4yF6JzI2ZHUHwppUari44_epGOl4guGEZzqWgVfc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=144758878)
I'll be documenting my trip here and [on social media](https://substack.com/redirect/c71fc028-7be0-43b9-8843-92b8afb11369?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I have dreamed of going to Greece my entire life. I never thought it would happen. I cannot overstate how excited, nervous and grateful I am to those who helped make this dream - and this work - a reality.
## UPCOMING CHANGES TO MESOSCALE
At your request, I'm adding resources at the end of each brief for one or more ways you can help those impacted by the events I'm covering, starting next week.
I'll run a Charity Navigator check on each non-profit included and do my best to ensure only the most reputable sources are included. In cases where the most effective remedy is congressional or international legislation or intervention, I'll list the appropriate resources to contact.
This will take a bit more time to include. As always, supporting my work with a donation is always appreciated.
[Click here to donate](https://substack.com/redirect/4a31d622-1817-4400-abe1-35725f0e6d81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: Plus upcoming changes to this newsletter | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Public Post (free!) Plus upcoming changes to this newsletter May 18 | | | | | | | | | | | Your full, weekly Mesoscale update will be published midway next week instead of the regular schedule on Sunday. I'll be leaving for Greece Sunday, where I'll be meeting with international whistleblowers to lobby the United Nations to establish a Whistleblower Protection Office. Ideally, such an office would assist whistleblowers in expediting the visa process, provide safe harbor and protection, and pursue international charges against offenders whose actions create a multi-national danger. John Barnett should have had those services. Instead, Boeing was allowed to attack his character, destroy his career, and threaten/intimidate him into permanent silence. John's suicide note said, "The entire system for protecting whistleblowers is fucked up." The is advocating for the creation of such an office within the United States Department of Justice. Y to the Department of Justice, Congress, and the White House encouraging them to implement best practices in establishing a whistleblower rewards program. The letter is already prepared and takes less than a minute to send. My work with the whistleblower community has been among the most rewarding in an otherwise insufferable period of my life. I'm profoundly grateful to be joining the international community as we navigate policy changes to protect those who protect us. If you'd like to help me eat while I'm there (everything else is covered) you can c, , or upgrade to a paid or annual subscription below: I'll be documenting my trip here and . I have dreamed of going to Greece my entire life. I never thought it would happen. I cannot overstate how excited, nervous and grateful I am to those who helped make this dream - and this work - a reality. UPCOMING CHANGES TO MESOSCALE At your request, I'm adding resources at the end of each brief for one or more ways you can help those impacted by the events I'm covering, starting next week. I'll run a Charity Navigator check on each non-profit included and do my best to ensure only the most reputable sources are included. In cases where the most effective remedy is congressional or international legislation or intervention, I'll list the appropriate resources to contact. This will take a bit more time to include. As always, supporting my work with a donation is always appreciated. You 're currently a free subscriber to WBNews with Rebekah Jones. For the full experience, upgrade your subscription. You can continue supporting my work by donating at one of the options below: Make checks payable and send to:** Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371 Silver Spring, MD 20918 -30- | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371, Silver Spring, MD 20918 ? ?

Peter,

Now that Kim has officially filed for reelection, she wanted us to check in with you about what is most important to this grassroots team.

Kim knows that the best way to represent your interests in Congress is to ask you directly what you want your leaders to focus on. So our team just launched our new Priorities Survey to learn what's top of mind for you.

Kim's top priority has always been to listen to her constituents and bring their concerns to Washington to be addressed effectively by our government. But that can only happen when each and every supporter lets us know what's on their mind. That's why this survey is so important, Peter.

**[Before midnight, take our May Priorities Survey and share with Kim what issues you'd like to see her address in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85207644/474006704/241716954?ms=em24_240518_survey_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em24_240518_survey_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em24_240518_survey_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240518_survey_esrv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=FIGlEood5+hTwcVMQM9yq1c4BmTX/u17J1DoN7TnDhQXzQHRCjTovthipGBr3LI8/A902rLUUUVnISx+1obyrZFkgHMCzPpW6Hpuo48owELb10qPfL8LBtOjX07m15bk5zaTLtQ5Y470kcCqdMUuTQy3bF2UGZ9aYB/wjXOFF8k=&refcode2=82a365d3-4815-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmEzNjVkMy00ODE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cR2vf-OjbPcPhEGDwSJ2waPs4KsKcS8OqP1KFlE9NQ4=&emci=47cbf30f-9514-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&emdi=82a365d3-4815-ef11-86d0-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15820338)**

Thanks,

Team Schrier

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Why Your First Gift Matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This campaign advances solely through the contributions of faithful supporters like you.

|

Dear Peter,
Right now, we are facing monumental challenges that could shape our nation for generations to come, and the solutions we need cannot be found in the status quo.
With stakes this high, stepping forward with determination is our only option. But before I go on, _I need to ask you to stay in this fight with me._
This campaign advances solely through the contributions of faithful supporters like you. This is a team effort, and _I can’t do it without 100% participation from every single friend we have_!
[If you are receiving this email and haven’t yet donated, please consider chipping in $5, $10 or whatever you can spare.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_18_24_nd3&n=5) I need you!
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_18_24_nd3&n=6)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_18_24_nd3&n=7)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=20&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_18_24_nd3&n=8)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_18_24_nd3&n=9)
---
I can win this election, but we can't do it without your help. _And here are three reasons why we must win:_
1. I believe that neither President Biden nor President Trump will navigate us through the looming debt crisis that threatens our country's very foundation.
2. Their strategies fall short in confronting the perpetual foreign conflicts. There’s no sign that either will halt the relentless cycle of these forever wars.
3. Nor do I see them severing the ties of vested interests that have led to the corporate capture of crucial agencies — whether it’s the Military Industrial Complex’s hold on the CIA, Big Pharma’s influence on the NIH, CDC, and FDA, or the USDA’s sway under Big Ag.

If either Biden or Trump are elected, change will only graze the surface; we’re likely to see minor shifts in policy areas like taxation or abortion rights, but not the sweeping reforms we so desperately need.
No, they won’t dismantle our democracy within their term—the resilience of American institutions is formidable—their presidencies are simply not set to veer away from the well-worn path of politics as usual.
But here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance, to rejuvenate the spirit of our democracy, and to rebuild our nation's standing on a global scale.
| | **"Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance."**
---
—Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
This is about instilling a foreign policy not predicated on the show of military might but on the strength of our economy and the power of our values.
The possibility of enacting such pivotal change, of steering our country back to its principled course, is a calling too pivotal to ignore.
That's why the thought of backing down from this contest doesn’t cross my mind.
The prospect of what we can achieve together is immense, demanding unwavering commitment and a relentless pursuit of the vision we share for America.
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_18_24_nd3&n=10)
