clean_body: This campaign advances solely through the contributions of faithful supporters like you. | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Right now, we are facing monumental challenges that could shape our nation for generations to come, and the solutions we need cannot be found in the status quo. With stakes this high, stepping forward with determination is our only option. But before I go on, I need to ask you to stay in this fight with me. This campaign advances solely through the contributions of faithful supporters like you. This is a team effort, and I can’t do it without 100% participation from every single friend we have! I need you! | I can win this election, but we can't do it without your help. And here are three reasons why we must win: 1. I believe that neither President Biden nor President Trump will navigate us through the looming debt crisis that threatens our country's very foundation. 2. Their strategies fall short in confronting the perpetual foreign conflicts. There’s no sign that either will halt the relentless cycle of these forever wars. 3. Nor do I see them severing the ties of vested interests that have led to the corporate capture of crucial agencies — whether it’s the Military Industrial Complex’s hold on the CIA, Big Pharma’s influence on the NIH, CDC, and FDA, or the USDA’s sway under Big Ag. If either Biden or Trump are elected, change will only graze the surface; we’re likely to see minor shifts in policy areas like taxation or abortion rights, but not the sweeping reforms we so desperately need. No, they won’t dismantle our democracy within their term—the resilience of American institutions is formidable—their presidencies are simply not set to veer away from the well-worn path of politics as usual. But here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance, to rejuvenate the spirit of our democracy, and to rebuild our nation's standing on a global scale. | | "Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance." —Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. This is about instilling a foreign policy not predicated on the show of military might but on the strength of our economy and the power of our values. The possibility of enacting such pivotal change, of steering our country back to its principled course, is a calling too pivotal to ignore. That's why the thought of backing down from this contest doesn’t cross my mind. The prospect of what we can achieve together is immense, demanding unwavering commitment and a relentless pursuit of the vision we share for America. | I know I can count on you! | | Sincerely, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

Read more >> | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Today, I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message. My Democrat opponent, Colin Allred, outraised my campaign in the first quarter by over TWO MILLION dollars. He's even outpacing Beto O'Rourke's numbers from six years ago. Yes, that's the same Beto who raked in $80 million and almost beat me in 2018. I'm going to level with you, Fellow Conservative. We need to catch up and we need to do it fast! Will you please rush in an emergency donation right now to defeat Allred and Keep Texas, Texas? Fellow Conservative, I'm not taking ANYTHING for granted in this race. My strength to fight and win comes from patriots like YOU. Thanks so much for taking a stand today, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: If you care about keeping the House blue, you need to read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
There’s a lot at stake this election cycle
| | |
---
What if we told you the path to flipping the House blue runs through New York, friend?
That’s why Kirsten and other New York Democrats set up the **New York Majority Fund** , a coordinated campaign here in New York that will retake the House majority and defend Kirsten's must-win seat.
It’s more important than ever before for us to invest in this fund, and we’re counting on top supporters like you to help us. [**Friend, will you please chip in $5, $25 or more before midnight tonight to help us meet our $75,000 goal and invest in New York?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85208005/474007827/-1037072713?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5044-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTEwYTQ4Ni00OTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AO3qmFKiAO252zg5-UGoqIS1bwx606dVUKfta0dlgQ=)

---
There’s a lot at stake this election cycle — reproductive rights, health care, government benefits — and it’s critical for us to do everything within our power to defeat far-right extremists in our state. The only way to retake the House and the Senate is by flipping key seats in New York back to blue.
But the GOP knows it needs New York to keep its House majority, and they’re not going down without a fight. In fact, they’re gearing up for an even bigger red wave this year — and they're even coming after Kirsten's Senate seat. **With your support, friend, we can help New York Democrats get the resources they need to protect New York from extremist Republicans.**
[**Will you give $5, $25 or more to the New York Majority Fund before midnight tonight? Every dollar goes toward electing New York Democrats and defeating extremist Republicans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85208007/474007829/-1037072713?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5044-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTEwYTQ4Ni00OTE1LWVmMTEtODZkMC02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AO3qmFKiAO252zg5-UGoqIS1bwx606dVUKfta0dlgQ=)

clean_body: There’s a lot at stake this election cycle | | | What if we told you the path to flipping the House blue runs through New York, friend? That’s why Kirsten and other New York Democrats set up the New York Majority Fund , a coordinated campaign here in New York that will retake the House majority and defend Kirsten's must-win seat. It’s more important than ever before for us to invest in this fund, and we’re counting on top supporters like you to help us. = | | = There’s a lot at stake this election cycle — reproductive rights, health care, government benefits — and it’s critical for us to do everything within our power to defeat far-right extremists in our state. The only way to retake the House and the Senate is by flipping key seats in New York back to blue. But the GOP knows it needs New York to keep its House majority, and they’re not going down without a fight. In fact, they’re gearing up for an even bigger red wave this year — and they're even coming after Kirsten's Senate seat. name: Bernie Moreno
subject: I am under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
He just released a TV ad and is spending MILLIONS to take a cheap shot at me – trying to make my background in car sales sound like some sort of scandal. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fa0c1a388f6d4d65b9a3dbca32599e6f&_e=diqNgmlEoSxIaDd6hlWVKyMMBORD5kqdtqpVA8DrjdD3zE74XjX4-B-0qqt7rV0oEu71s0KMvTc0AZidlui7_TpJmZ0UDCbRO2dQwMb19BrvgjZWVp-1f8UuyK4TVxtXXadwV6kMmFqx1DAj58oLf5WUq_bVEDKjy9oLSx3mXXtAi9XEgPSnXPhtH0OnBwQRRaI2uoeNhQJVfdmZy4g5WBtrrHJp1j9EJq1SyETM7YfTnbT5YDcz--ZOoxqM4YSUOedOvmWLMNd93kRyefBDRd-9GgXSfVMFFKVDJkvloJ76FuqQRAEUc7Yb0v8atcNYhrH9kkTdo6Ug6m_SmsHypMj2rh68FiF-sFYAn49IHg5j6-H2O5wjs8J-Ub0oXZtXz60Kq5g8pTDryqSbpvlYQjkwW3EelELjp4t2pPqT1Z-ysUveE83V74d-5DzNbcJ1)
---
Peter,

I’m not going to sugarcoat it – _we’re under attack._ Shady Sherrod Brown is throwing everything he’s got at us, spreading lies and slandering my name and hardworking reputation in a desperate bid to cling to power.

**He just released a TV ad and is spending MILLIONS to take a cheap shot at me – trying to make my background in car sales sound like some sort of scandal. **

[ **FIGHT BACK NOW >>** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=fa0c1a388f6d4d65b9a3dbca32599e6f&_e=diqNgmlEoSxIaDd6hlWVKyMMBORD5kqdtqpVA8DrjdD3zE74XjX4-B-0qqt7rV0oEu71s0KMvTc0AZidlui7_TpJmZ0UDCbRO2dQwMb19BrvgjZWVp-1f8UuyK4TVxtXXadwV6kMmFqx1DAj58oLf5WUq_bVEDKjy9oLSx3mXXtAi9XEgPSnXPhtH0OnBwQRRaI2uoeNhQJVfdmZy4g5WBtrrHJp1j9EJq1SyETM7YfTnbT5YDcz--ZOoxqM4YSUOedOvmWLMNd93kRyefBDRWzYZYFH3OKIzHJK3Ljppa6mvcy6tIh7Oyui6GQC3PGkdB_dAFO3j8p5s9kSuosP_jOrWsvyqd1_JiWSIBhGNjMHBXwxMDVSky0XOSA8WEKbVSmpTBoKgDQxsBUfYtb8zw7mx-QqLgYdRAffnFUz1LUzUefnXz5Wc4USEwtd92Y-)
**_But let me tell you something: I didn’t come this far to back down now._** I’ve faced challenges before, and I’ve always emerged stronger. And I won’t let a career politician who's been in office since 1975 and hasn’t created a single job in his life tear down everything I’ve worked for.

[**Before I continue, we’ve got to raise $100,000 in the next 72 hours to set the record straight and kick Sherrod Brown out of office for good. Even if it’s just the spare change from your dresser, donations of any amount go a long way in a campaign like ours.
I don’t take orders from super PACs or special interests, and I’m damn proud of it. I take my cues from the hardworking folks of Montana, and that’ll never change.

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: 146 years later
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
Derek, this
is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to
vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years
later, I’m running to become the first woman and person of color to
represent Delaware in the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em_blunt_rochester.KaZBkh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240518_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1003&akid=6482%2E5257348%2E2jfvGe ]I can’t make history without your help. Will you rush
$10, split
between my campaign and Adam Schiff’s, to send another Black woman to the
Senate, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em_blunt_rochester.KaZBkh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240518_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6482%2E5257348%2E2jfvGe ]Lisa Blunt Rochester posing with e scarf of a letter stating that her
great-great-great grandfather was granted the right to vote in 1867

I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to
me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf.

The day I was sworn in, I carried that scarf.

It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color,
had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to
vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On
such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that
every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power
and reason.

And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em_blunt_rochester.KaZBkh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240518_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=6482%2E5257348%2E2jfvGe ]If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in
$10 split
between Adam Schiff and my Senate campaign? Every donation goes towards
creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll
get on board.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation between Adam Schiff and Lisa Blunt Rochester will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=may2024_abs_em_blunt_rochester.LSCFeH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240518_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1006&akid=6482%2E5257348%2E2jfvGe ]EXPRESS DONATE

clean_body: Derek, this is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, I’m running to become the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the Senate. [ ]I can’t make history without your help. Will you rush $10, split between my campaign and Adam Schiff’s, to send another Black woman to the Senate, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [ ]Lisa Blunt Rochester posing with e scarf of a letter stating that her great-great-great grandfather was granted the right to vote in 1867 I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf. The day I was sworn in, I carried that scarf. It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate. [ ]If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in $10 split between Adam Schiff and my Senate campaign? Every donation goes towards creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll get on board. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Lisa Blunt Rochester will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you, Lisa [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. Hi there, I’m Sam! 👋

I just started as the field director for Marlene Galán-Woods’ campaign to flip AZ-01 blue. I’m fired up to be on the ground to elect Marlene and finally unseat David Schweikert.

It’s my job to make sure we’re meeting as many voters as possible. That includes everything from knocking on doors, calling voters, hosting community events, and more.

As you know, there’s a lot on the line – both in this community, and across the country. Arizona is ground zero in the fight for reproductive freedom and for our democracy.

We’re up against one of the most far-right, anti-abortion, anti-democracy Republicans in Congress – David Schweikert. His extremism has no place in AZ-01, and from everything I’m seeing on the ground, 2024 is our year to finally finish the job.

We need to elect a pro-choice woman to Congress, and Marlene is the perfect candidate for the job. I’m fired up to meet voters and explain why Marlene will represent us best in Arizona.

**[Step one is ensuring we have the resources to keep our strong momentum on the ground. Will you show your support for Marlene with a donation of $3 or any amount? Your contribution will directly impact our ability to reach voters and flip this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/85209328/474013039/-1414337131?refcode=em-5.18.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGZkZWVlNjYtNGYxNS1lZjExLTg2ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZGHAPSmSWUUbEPUwyWEbZ7FPcyQ4gUsSrwBDMLdcL-Y=)**

name: David Hogg
subject: Ok now I’m worried
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We have a lot of work to do between now and November.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240518-1&t=1&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)
**Now I'm really worried, Peter.** I’m sure you’ve seen the recent headlines:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240518-1?refcode=em20240518-1&amount=5&refcode2=698_587540_qtRqh2&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)
**[This is why the work we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve is so important. I’m about to explain why, but first – can you donate $5 to join us in the fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240518-1?refcode=em20240518-1&amount=5&refcode2=698_587540_qtRqh2&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)**
**President Biden’s support is eroding in critical battleground states, especially among young and nonwhite voters.** It’s an unfortunate reality, but if voters stay home in November, the likelihood of another Trump term increases dramatically.
We can’t control what happens at the top of the ticket – or truly know how accurate these polls are. But we do have an insurance policy for November regardless of the polls that the Republicans aren’t counting on: _young, progressive candidates running in pivotal districts all across the country._
Our endorsed candidates – like Bryce Berry and Ashwin Ramaswami in Georgia, Anna Thomas in Pennsylvania, and Oscar De Los Santos in Arizona – have the potential to inspire young people to vote this November. And the more voters they bring to the polls, the better the chances of Biden winning those same districts.
**Consider this, Peter:** President Biden only won Georgia by 11,779 votes in 2020.1 Ashwin is running in a state Senate district with a population that is 28% Asian American, according to Census data.2 As a young, progressive Indian American on the ballot, Ashwin could inspire thousands of new Democratic voters to the polls as he would be the first Indian American state legislator in Georgia state history.
The same can be said for another of our candidates in Georgia: Bryce Berry, a middle school math teacher who would be the first Gen Z member of the Georgia House. As Biden struggles with young men of color in the polls, he could benefit from exciting candidates like Bryce running with him on the Democratic ticket.
I’m sure you’ve heard about candidates down the ballot “riding the coattails” of the presidential nominee – meaning that Democrats running for local and state offices need a strong candidate at the top of the ticket to get people out to vote.
👉 **We think the opposite can be true, as well.** President Biden can ride the reverse coattails of our bold, progressive candidates, all Gen-Z or Millennials, to victory. Candidates like Anna Thomas in Pennsylvania who actually have the chance to prevent an abortion ban or the repeal of gun laws in their state. Your investment in these important local races is contributing to Biden’s reelection and protecting democracy from Trump’s march to authoritarianism.
**We have a lot of work to do between now and November, but I believe that we can get young people out to vote, elect a new generation of leaders, and stop Trump and his MAGA Republicans from taking over our government again.**
**[Peter, we’re doing everything we can to get young people to the polls and elect the leaders we deserve in November — but we can’t do it without your support. Will you pitch in $5 to Leaders We Deserve to make it happen?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240518-1?refcode=em20240518-1&amount=5&refcode2=698_587540_qtRqh2&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240518-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240518-1-698&refcode2=698_587540_qtRqh2&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)**
Thanks for your support,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
1 - [Wikipedia](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/977?t=2&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)
2 - [Census Reporter](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/978?t=3&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240518-1&t=4&refcode2=698_587540_qtRqh2&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=698%2E587540%2EqtRqh2)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

I'm as nervous as a pregnant Jenny. **_The month's halfway over, and I 've yet to meet any of my fundraising goals..._**

It's been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden's been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right.

**_I 'm more of a traditional kind of guy._**

So, let me cut to the chase: _I 'm behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead._ How much am I short by?

I know this is no big deal for big Dem donors, but for an average American like myself, this makes all the difference. My team and I will be forever grateful to you personally when we sit down and go over our donor list tomorrow. Thanks for stepping up. Hi Derek, it’s Lisa Blunt Rochester and I’m running for Senate in Delaware. My friend Adam asked me to reach out because this moment is critical.
I want to be respectful of your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase – our democracy is still in serious danger. With Republicans just one seat away from taking back the Senate, every state is in play – even Delaware and California.
**[Can you chip in $10 to our campaigns before our critical fundraising deadline to help us reach our goals and ensure that Trump Republicans don’t take back the Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em_blunt_rochester.KaZBkh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240518_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=6483%2E5257348%2EjNPJzp)**
Across the country, Donald Trump is propping up some of the most extreme MAGA candidates and conspiracy theorists. Already, millions of dollars in dark money is being funneled into taking back our Senate majority.
The attacks are only escalating and we need to fight back against the smears from Trump and his backers. That’s why Adam asked me to reach out to you.
We can’t let Trump’s army of MAGA millionaires overwhelm and drown out our incredible base of grassroots donors.
**[With our democracy at stake, will you split a contribution of $25 or more right now to our campaigns? We must ensure we keep Delaware and California blue to maintain our razor-thin majority in the Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em_blunt_rochester.KaZBkh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240518_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=25&t=5&akid=6483%2E5257348%2EjNPJzp)**

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr] Peter, Since we launched our campaign last April, we've built an incredible grassroots movement without a dime of corporate PAC money. But we need to keep our momentum up until Election Day, to make sure we have the resources we need to keep knocking doors, making phone calls, registering new voters, and delivering progressive victories for Phoenix and Glendale. Here are three reasons why now is a great time to get involved in our campaign: 1. Yassamin is the most progressive - and effective - candidate in this race, with a proven track record of delivering climate action, affordable housing, and reproductive rights protections. 2. Our district has one of the lowest voter turnout rates in the country, which means that there are thousands of registered voters who may not make their voices heard unless we reach them. 3. Arizona is a decisive battleground for the Senate and the White House, and the state hinges on Maricopa County. Turning out the vote here in our district has huge implications for the future of our community, our state, and our nation. If you can, will you pitch in a few dollars or a few hours of your time to help our grassroots progressive campaign win? name: David Hogg
subject: The NRA’s fall from grace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
“The NRA is little more than a shell of itself."

| One thing is for sure, Peter: **The once mighty NRA is on its last legs.**

What once appeared to be an unstoppable force in American politics, the NRA has seen a mass exodus of over one million members, corruption charges, and millions of dollars in legal fees — meanwhile, their overall revenue dropped 52% since 2016.

A former top NRA official told _The New York Times_ : “The NRA is little more than a shell of itself.”

I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered—but I also know that the gun lobby is scrambling to keep their influence in Congress by pouring money into the NRA’s replacements.

When I see these headlines, Peter, I know our work is far from done.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85210764/474017854/150752135?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNmQ1Mjg5LTU1MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=38JQttUL5MqZVxBrsYFUnPx7tC4hev5rasBveq1H1xU=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85210765/474017855/150752135?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNmQ1Mjg5LTU1MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=38JQttUL5MqZVxBrsYFUnPx7tC4hev5rasBveq1H1xU=)
With or without the NRA, as long as there are corrupt, purchased politicians in Congress, the gun lobby will buy their votes and strike down any chance we have for common sense gun reform.

But, if we elect a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action, we can stop the scourge of gun violence in America and block the gun lobby’s agenda.

Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders to state legislatures across the country and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning from now to Election Day.

[_**So if you want to make an impactful difference in this year’s election, can you split a $10 contribution between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85210766/474017856/150752135?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-17_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNmQ1Mjg5LTU1MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=38JQttUL5MqZVxBrsYFUnPx7tC4hev5rasBveq1H1xU=)

Last month, we announced our first six endorsed candidates for the 2024 election and are actively helping these campaigns reach as many voters as possible. Every dollar helps us support these grassroots campaigns where the difference between winning and losing could be as little as a few hundred votes.

Together, with your support, we can give the school shooting generation a voice in public office to pass the gun reform laws we need, end mass shootings, and counter the gun lobby’s agenda.

But our success depends on grassroots donors like you, chipping in what they can, when they can. [_**So if you can, please chip in a split $10 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress today.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/85210767/474017857/150752135?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-17_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkNmQ1Mjg5LTU1MTUtZWYxMS04NmQwLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=38JQttUL5MqZVxBrsYFUnPx7tC4hev5rasBveq1H1xU=)

clean_body: “The NRA is little more than a shell of itself." | One thing is for sure, Peter: The once mighty NRA is on its last legs. What once appeared to be an unstoppable force in American politics, the NRA has seen a mass exodus of over one million members, corruption charges, and millions of dollars in legal fees — meanwhile, their overall revenue dropped 52% since 2016. A former top NRA official told The New York Times : “The NRA is little more than a shell of itself.” I firmly believe that the NRA’s days are numbered—but I also know that the gun lobby is scrambling to keep their influence in Congress by pouring money into the NRA’s replacements. When I see these headlines, Peter, I know our work is far from done. = = With or without the NRA, as long as there are corrupt, purchased politicians in Congress, the gun lobby will buy their votes and strike down any chance we have for common sense gun reform. But, if we elect a new generation of bold, courageous leaders who aren’t afraid to take urgent, necessary action, we can stop the scourge of gun violence in America and block the gun lobby’s agenda. Leaders We Deserve is already playing an integral role in electing the next generation of leaders to state legislatures across the country and we’re counting on your continued support so we can keep winning from now to Election Day. = Last month, we announced our first six endorsed candidates for the 2024 election and are actively helping these campaigns reach as many voters as possible. Every dollar helps us support these grassroots campaigns where the difference between winning and losing could be as little as a few hundred votes. Together, with your support, we can give the school shooting generation a voice in public office to pass the gun reform laws we need, end mass shootings, and counter the gun lobby’s agenda. But our success depends on grassroots donors like you, chipping in what they can, when they can. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your consideration, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: What can I say
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I can’t win this race and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate without your help.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2624%2E35263%2E9_zCSg)
Peter, is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign today? _What if I told you that races in Wisconsin are won and lost by close margins?_ Republicans won our state’s last Senate race by 1% and our last two presidential elections were even closer than that... _Or that our Senate race is one of the most expensive races in the country?_ A whopping $18 million has already been spent on advertising in Wisconsin, including more than $6 million from Eric Hovde alone. _What if you knew that my out-of-touch opponent is an anti-abortion extremist?_ Eric Hovde would help Republicans pass a national abortion ban in the Senate if elected. _Or that he’s pledged to spend at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me?_ The self-funding megamillionaire cut himself an $8 million check last quarter, and that’s only the beginning. Republicans are going all-in to flip the one additional seat they need to win back the Senate majority. **Simply put, I can’t win this race and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate without your help.** **[So Peter, can I count on your to chip in $5, $10, or any amount to help me keep Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240518_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2624%2E35263%2E9_zCSg)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-may24.viyL1N&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240518_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2624%2E35263%2E9_zCSg)

name: Bob Casey
subject: I can’t do it alone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06)
Peter, we must win this race to protect our Senate majority, but I can’t do it alone.
What can I say to get you to donate to my re-election campaign today?
If you don’t need any convincing, you can chip in here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?refcode=em20240518-3 &recurring=1**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?refcode=em20240518-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06)
What if I said that Roll Call named me as one of the top five most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election?
Or that a new New York Times poll shows my opponent within the polling margin of error among likely voters?
Or that a billionaire-funded super PAC is blanketing Pennsylvania’s airwaves to prop up my opponent?
Or that there is no Democratic Senate majority without winning in Pennsylvania?
[**These are the stakes in our race, so I hope I can count on you to chip in $5 or more today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?refcode=em20240518-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240518-3-el&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240518-3-el&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240518-3-el&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240518-3-el&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240518-3-el&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240518-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240518-3&refcode2=2998_552475_mgTz06&akid=2998%2E552475%2EmgTz06)

JUST IN »
https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240518_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917 [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240518_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
SIGN ON: TELL CONGRESS TO PASS THIS BILL [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240518_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Peter, leaders like Senator Jon Ossoff and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have been calling for a ban on members of Congress for being allowed to trade stock.
Why? Because they are given timely information about industries, updates from agencies, and much more before the average person, giving them the advantage to make decisions that lead to profit.
And now that there are a few Republicans on board with Democrats, we have a real chance to get this bill through.
That’s why we’re calling on 10,000 supporters to sign our petition to tell Congress to ban congressional stock trading! [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240518_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
SIGN ON: TELL CONGRESS TO PASS THIS BILL [https://secure.everyaction.com/pZ-opeXJpE-LKJs00OH1Hw2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240518_2_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Thank you in advance for signing on!
– DR

We need the help of supporters like you to turn things around. | | |

Peter -- On Sunday, we reached out to ask for your help because we can’t afford to fall short after Donald Trump raised $50 MILLION in one day. Then yesterday, Kamala reached out again because we hadn’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped and we need the help of supporters like you to turn things around. clean_body: We need the help of supporters like you to turn things around. | | | Peter -- On Sunday, we reached out to ask for your help because we can’t afford to fall short after Donald Trump raised $50 MILLION in one day. Then yesterday, Kamala reached out again because we hadn’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped and we need the help of supporters like you to turn things around. And this morning, Joe reached out himself one last time because he knows how important hitting our goals are -- especially right now before our next FEC deadline at midnight. You’ve heard from Joe and Kamala personally and they know what’s on the line in the next few hours. So before time runs out, we have to humbly ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in and for helping us hit this critical goal. Your support will give us the ability to fight back against whatever Trump and MAGA Republicans decide to throw at us next. Thank you again, we couldn’t do this without you! Team Biden-Harris

Jon Tester in Montana told you...

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14633%2E878179%2EhF6kvo). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14633%2E878179%2EhF6kvo).**

name: Team Gallego
subject: Not on your to-do list
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Control of the Senate is hanging by a thread. Arizona is critical if we’re going to have any chance at keeping our majority.
#

Peter,
We know that making a donation to Ruben Gallego probably wasn’t on your to-do list this weekend.
That’s totally understandable.
At any normal time, we’d be right there with you.
But the truth is... this isn’t a normal time. Extremists are rising in every corner of the country. Control of the Senate is hanging by a thread. Arizona is critical if we’re going to have any chance at keeping our majority. And the Republican running for Senate in Arizona, Kari Lake, has a real shot at winning.
She’s consolidated control over the state party and has Trump and the National GOP on her side. She’s raising tons of money. And she just rolled out a $10 MILLION advertising campaign — aimed directly at attacking Ruben Gallego, day-in, day-out.
So, even though making a donation to Ruben probably wasn’t something you planned to do today, we really need to ask you:
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to Ruben’s campaign and help him defeat Kari Lake in Arizona and take back this seat in the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240518-2-160&t=1&akid=2351%2E734936%2EkVXQXq)

Dear Peter,
Great news.
With only 6 months until election day new polls reported by the _New York Times_ say it all...
| ➢ RFK Jr. “is polling stronger than any third-party candidate in decades.”
---
➢ RFK Jr. “has emerged as an unpredictable X factor” and “a force of unpredictability.”
➢ Pollsters & Democrat and Republican insiders are alarmed” by RFK Jr.’s growing support.
This is amazing news.
Most Americans thought the presidential election would be a very close yet disappointing 2020 rematch between Trump and Biden.
NO MORE! _RFK Jr. is blowing up that idea_.
It's hardly surprising that recent polls show strong support for RFK Jr. among those disillusioned with Trump and Biden. Why should voters trust the traditional two-party candidates?
Neither Trump nor Biden are offering fresh ideas. Instead, they're caught up in petty arguments over how little they should have to debate RFK Jr., or even each other, before the election. It's outrageous!
We can win this election, [but it requires every supporter to step up.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=break_mold_5_18_24_nd1&n=3) We're up against the vast resources and corporate backing of our opponents, and full participation is critical to level the playing field.
You see, RFK Jr. can’t self-fund his campaign and needs folks like you generously standing by his side. [Will you stand with RFK Jr. today?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=break_mold_5_18_24_nd1&n=4)

name: Jill Stein
subject: That was a lie, Mr. President.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
There never was a red line.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_lies&n=1)
---
Peter,

Five long, agonizing days...

...after Israel unilaterally rejected a ceasefire agreement that would have resulted in a return of all hostages.

...after Israel invaded Rafah and began firing tanks at starving Palestinians huddled in tents.

...after aid organizations and the UN and our allies and _millions_ of Americans spoke out and demanded a halt on weapons to Israel.

It took five long, agonizing days for Joe Biden to act.

Five days after the invasion of Rafah, Biden made headlines announcing a “pause” on a single shipment of 3500 bombs to Israel, stating he was “concerned” the bombs would be used in Gaza.

**Rafah was supposed to be Biden’s red line for Israel. This “pause” (already too little and far too late) was meant to be proof that he meant it.

****But that was a lie.******
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_lies&n=2)
---
Just days after pausing a few thousand bombs from shipping out, Biden is now rushing another billion dollars worth of weapons to Israel.

Yesterday, the foreign ministers of 13 countries – including most of the G7 – issued statements calling on Israel to open the Rafah gate and allow aid into Gaza. The United States was not among them.

**There is no red line for Biden with Israel. There never was.

** For 224 days Biden has repeatedly delivered material support for Israel’s brutality against Gaza. Biden has now made it clear that he won’t stop for any reason.

Our government’s complicity in this genocide is a stain on all of us, but **this will always be remembered as Joe Biden’s genocide.

** America needs a president who won’t cede control of our foreign policy to an authoritarian, genocidal apartheid state, but who will instead work diligently for peace. I urge you to donate to our campaign today.
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_lies&n=3 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_lies&n=3)
---
Biden has continued the long tradition of American presidents who wage war in the name of keeping the peace and who violently displace people in the name of freedom.
It’s time for a new definition of what it means to be an American. It’s time to commit ourselves to the service of people, planet, and peace.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_lies&n=4 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_lies&n=4)
---

clean_body: | Peter, Climate change will not wait for anyone or anything. It will continue to ravage our communities from floods and fires to asthma and our lung health. We’ll let him give you all the details, but we are still short $3,056 from hitting our mid-month fundraising deadline.= If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. | | = | = | = Ami's Original Message = Peter, In exchange for campaign contributions, Trump promised to roll back climate regulations. He is saying exactly what he would do if he became president again, and the consequences would be severe for our country. The climate crisis is a cause for concern and one that every single legislator should work towards ending. I serve in Congress because I care deeply about the futures of our future generations. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. = = = = = The four years of Trump’s presidency should have been enough to prove to voters that he does not care about the future of our children and planet. While we are seeing the worst climate crisis in the history of the planet, Trump is rubbing shoulders with the same companies that are directly responsible for such a crisis. I am committed to working across the aisle with all of my colleagues in developing effective climate action. Democrats like me are standing up for voting rights, reproductive freedom, and more. We are the only force stopping the GOP from causing any more damage. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. = = = = = Be well, Dr. Ami Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States ** **

Rep. **Andrea Salinas'** race was one of the closest in 2022, and it will likely come down to the wire again this year. Rep. Salinas is holding the line for reproductive rights and democracy in Oregon, and her seat is a _critical blue hold_ this cycle.

**Janelle Bynum's** red-to-blue flip race has been deemed a pure TOSS UP, and named one of the _most flippable_ seats in the entire country. Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the House majority from the anti-abortion, anti-democracy Republican extremists — and Janelle has what it takes to bring this race home.

| | Just over a week ago, Republican Governor of Georgia Brian Kemp’s first Lieutenant Governor, Geoff Duncan, **endorsed Joe Biden.**

It may not seem like that big of a deal – after all, Mike Pence, Nikki Haley, and Mitt Romney all refuse to endorse Donald Trump – but it’s a HUGE deal.

Let us explain: In 2020, Joe Biden beat Trump in Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast. _**It was the closest margin in the entire country.**_

**FIRST:** Democrats just barely kept Nevada blue in last year’s Senate race – winning by only 7,928 votes.

**THEN:** _The Cook Political Report_ downgraded Jacky Rosen’s must-win race for Democrats from "Lean Democratic" to a "Toss Up”!

**NOW: Jacky is falling behind on her critical fundraising goal with just hours left before her midnight deadline.**
If Jacky loses in Nevada, extreme Republicans WILL take over the Senate. That’s why the GOP’s dark-money allies like the Koch network are pouring millions and millions of dollars into Nevada to flip it red.
**Friend, Jacky can win this race if she has the resources to go all rounds in this fight. But right now, she’s far behind her $10,000 midnight fundraising goal.**

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: 🚨 Trump just got off the NRA stage 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Our ability to have a future free from gun violence is on the ballot this November
#

Team -
Trump just got off the stage at the NRA convention, and as usual, he lied his way through his speech to rile up his base.
Trump hurled attacks at President Biden and claimed that the Second Amendment is “under siege,” our country is “going to hell,” and that our Constitution is “running through the shredder.”
**Trump said it himself: The NRA has stood with him since the very beginning. And today, they announced proudly that he has their full endorsement.**
[**Will you please make a $3 donation to GIFFORDS PAC today? We need your with us to fuel our work to ensure that Donald Trump doesn’t take back the White House this November.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240518-2-bl&t=1&akid=8132%2E3935704%2EByMyfx)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240518-2-bl&t=2&akid=8132%2E3935704%2EByMyfx)**
We have made historic progress in our movement for gun safety thanks to President Biden. In 2022, he signed the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ into law, the most historic gun safety legislation passed in nearly 30 years.
Today, Trump painted a clear picture that if we let him back into the White House, all of the progress we have made in our movement for gun safety with President Biden will be reversed. He said if he wins, he will remove our current ATF Director at noon on his Inauguration Day and will get right to work in rolling back President Biden’s gun safety policies.
[**We mean it when we say this: Lives are on the line, and our ability to have a future free from gun violence is on the ballot this November. So please, will you make a $3 contribution to make sure we keep Donald Trump out of the White House?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240518-2-bl&t=3&akid=8132%2E3935704%2EByMyfx)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=8132%2E3935704%2EByMyfx) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Our ability to have a future free from gun violence is on the ballot this November Team - Trump just got off the stage at the NRA convention, and as usual, he lied his way through his speech to rile up his base. Trump hurled attacks at President Biden and claimed that the Second Amendment is “under siege,” our country is “going to hell,” and that our Constitution is “running through the shredder.” Trump said it himself: The NRA has stood with him since the very beginning. And today, they announced proudly that he has their full endorsement. We have made historic progress in our movement for gun safety thanks to President Biden. In 2022, he signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law, the most historic gun safety legislation passed in nearly 30 years. Today, Trump painted a clear picture that if we let him back into the White House, all of the progress we have made in our movement for gun safety with President Biden will be reversed. He said if he wins, he will remove our current ATF Director at noon on his Inauguration Day and will get right to work in rolling back President Biden’s gun safety policies. I know you've been one of my father's biggest supporters since before he entered the White House.

You've stood by him as he's been attacked by the media, spied on by the Deep State, and dragged through the courts. All because he will never stop fighting for the American people.

One patriot has stood with him through this entire witch hunt. She's been on the front lines fighting against these corrupt indictments and lawfare thrown his way. That patriot is Kari Lake, and I'm proud to announce I'm endorsing her for the United States Senate in Arizona.

Kari is the ultimate MAGA patriot, and she would be the perfect candidate to stand up to the Democrat Party and pass my father's agenda in Washington. [**Chip in here to join me and my father in supporting the ultimate MAGA fighter, Kari Lake.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=d11747b8e91b4b698c74d556a68e1019&_e=msw0I77MaoG-5Y_q_ZgV5GpiSwo9TRTWGs2qqtwQJSeMizwCGf2_8V3in-QRTSdfaOHbpzSfv8e75YsSwzSGb6caDkllfFA_lpiKNbOL7t9yGqkcJOn9v3txOLSJ57oD5wMZhgwNNplDeuohgU7Ys1gVgmO2JA1utrW4y3AxCmiTCE2OXJiv21GjwgvMhxzg7wGKIxb6hzzOI-KkbiYNW0V1boOgxr85KeCt6sfeUgh7LmrUoNgOHRdpKWg3CLP9xKbwIATcGKe8EhEKTV6YexXg8tphWg8sO4MtWBfrXK9opEPi3N5T4-7a8ued14ITvtfm3ky8d_5DwbOzRiFtjsQjevd5LN7DyYLpOUhjsOP4ezrtCmq0hOjnUJzUvdblY_3qxJFJ26CviQDI4UzeDW76gALMEzslqmvmrt7L7Rg%3D)

The power brokers in Washington know Kari is a threat to their globalist agenda, Just like my father. They've smeared her in the press, they've tried to bribe her out of the race, they've even weaponized the legal system to try to bankrupt her. Sound familiar?

Despite all this, Kari has refused to back down. The Democrats' latest plan is to spend millions of dollars to keep her from the Senate. * Trump and his cronies will flood the Virginia airwaves with ads attacking Tim and other Democrats.

body:
| I’ve been so overwhelmed by the groundswell of support since we won our primary. Since becoming the Democratic nominee for Senate here in Maryland, we’ve received thousands of grassroots donations from folks who are ready to do whatever it takes to defeat Larry Hogan and keep this seat blue. But here’s the thing: _**The GOP is celebrating, too.**_ Hogan is Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate for this race, and it’s going to be incredibly difficult to defeat him and the dark money super PACs behind his campaign. **_[Whoever capitalizes on this momentum right now will have a huge advantage in the weeks and months ahead, which is why we set a 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal. Hogan’s victory is a win for the MAGA agenda.
Mitch McConnell got his guy, and now he sees an opportunity to flip this seat red, retake the Senate, and pass a national abortion ban.
_But if we win in November, we’ve got a shot at defending our narrow Senate majority, which means we could restore and expand abortion rights, lower costs for families, and empower workers and unions._
It’s going to take all of the grassroots supporters who got us here — plus we need to bring even more folks into our nationwide coalition of support — to make sure we put Larry Hogan on blast.
**_[Hitting our 10,000 General Election Founding Donor Goal will give us the boost we need right out of the gate to spread our campaign message and set the record straight on Hogan. clean_body: | I’ve been so overwhelmed by the groundswell of support since we won our primary. Since becoming the Democratic nominee for Senate here in Maryland, we’ve received thousands of grassroots donations from folks who are ready to do whatever it takes to defeat Larry Hogan and keep this seat blue. But here’s the thing: The GOP is celebrating, too. Hogan is Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate for this race, and it’s going to be incredibly difficult to defeat him and the dark money super PACs behind his campaign. = | = = Hogan’s victory is a win for the MAGA agenda. Mitch McConnell got his guy, and now he sees an opportunity to flip this seat red, retake the Senate, and pass a national abortion ban. But if we win in November, we’ve got a shot at defending our narrow Senate majority, which means we could restore and expand abortion rights, lower costs for families, and empower workers and unions. It’s going to take all of the grassroots supporters who got us here — plus we need to bring even more folks into our nationwide coalition of support — to make sure we put Larry Hogan on blast. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = All eyes are on Maryland, and with the Senate majority on the line, they will be right up to Election Day. So let’s get to work. — Angela Alsobrooks = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible.
